stem_zh: 1. (b)Key controls and tests of control Key control Test of control Allstaff members are issued with a sequentially numbered key card.Sequence checks and checks on the data recorded are carried out by the human resources(HR)supervisor. This ensures that payroll records are complete,that employees are paid for hours worked and that all hours are recorded. For a sample of key cards and data recorded in the clocking-in system,carry out a sequence check to identify if there are any gaps in the sequence. Review details of checks carried out by the HR supervisor to identify any gaps in the sequence and check they have evidenced their review by way of signature. 相关控制：员工的相关信息是被连续编号的，并且该项过程是由hr 部门的人来做的和检查 的。 控制测试：随机抽取一些员工的信息，去检查是否是连续编号的，并且这个过程是由hr 部 门的人员进行检查的。 2. The clocking-in process is monitored by a camera on entry to the distribution centre and video footage is reviewed by HR every week. This will prevent staff members fraudulently clocking-in for other employees and hence employees will only be paid for actual hours worked. For a sample of weeks,review the log of the recordings to identify who reviewed that week's footage to ensureit has been reviewed by a member of the HR department. Review the log for any gaps in the review process and discuss these findings with HR. 相关控制：员工在进出工作中心时候是都要刷卡的，并且这个过程在全程监控下完成的。这 样就能保证员工只有在工作的时间是被付钱的。 控制测试：随机抽取员工的进出的打卡记录进行核对。并且检查hr 的复核过程。 3. The payroll clerk confirms the transfer of hours and calculations has been done accurately by recalculating,for a sample of employees,their gross to net pay.This check is also reviewed by the payroll supervisor who evidences their review. This reduces the risk that errors occur in the automated transfer and calculations during the payrollprocessing. Any errors would be identified on a timely basis to prevent salaries being over or under paid. For a sample of months,review the calculations of gross to net pay for evidence that the calculations have been performed.Confirm the signature of the payrollsupervisor as evidence that they have reviewed the report.For any anomalies,enquire of the reasons and what action was taken to resolve the issue. For a sample of months,reperform the gross to net pay calculations and compare to the payroll system and the calculations prepared by the payroll clerk.Discuss any discrepancies with the payroll supervisor. 相关控制：薪酬部门员工将系统自动计算出的薪酬进行重新加总计算。如果有系统的计算错 误就能够被及时的发现。 控制测试：随机抽取一部分的薪酬记录去检查有薪酬部门员工的检查痕迹，比如说有薪酬部 门员工的签名。审计师还可以随机抽取一些薪酬进行重新加总计算。

4. The payroll system is password-protected and the payroll manager changes the password on a monthly basis using a random password generator. This reduces the risk of fraud by preventing unauthorised changes being made to the standing data and unauthorised access to sensitive payroll information. Attempt to login to the payroll system using a password which should be out of date.Confirm that the system has rejected access. 相关控制：薪酬部门的经理每个月度去更新密码，定期的密码更新，能够降低舞弊的风险。 控制测试：随机用一些错误的密码或者历史密码去确认，薪酬系统无法被打开。 5. Each month,the finance director carries out a payroll control account reconciliation and investigates any differences. This wil ensure the payroll expense and employment tax liability is accurate and is not misstated in the year-end financia statements. For a sample of months,review the control account reconciliations and make enquiries of the finance director of any errors on the control account,how they arose and what action was taken to ensure they do not arise in the future. Reperform a sample of control account reconciliations and compare results with those prepared by the finance director Discuss any discrepancies with the finance director. 相关控制：每个月，财务总监都会做账户的余额调节，并且查出相关的异常。这样有助于发 现相关的应付职工薪酬的错误或者是员工所得税的错误。 控制测试：抽取一部分月度余额调节记录，去核对财务总监确实是做了月度的余额调节，并 且随机抽查一部分去做余额调节的测试。

6. Key control The amount due to the tax authority is calculated by the payrollsupervisor who then passes it to the financial controller for review. This ensures that the amount paid to the tax authority is correct.It also creates segregation of duties between the payroll supervisor calculating the liability and the financial controller reviewing the calculation which reduces the risk of error. Test of control Revew a sample of calculations of the monthly employment taxliability for evidence of review by the financial controller confirming the calculation is correct and that payment can be made. 相关控制：相关的员工所得税被薪酬部门的管理层检查过之后，还被财务总监进行复核。负 责薪酬的部门和负责发工资的部门应该做到职责分离。 控制测试：抽一些样本去做重新计算工资的金额和相关的税。 (c)Identify and explain SIX DEFICIENCIES in Castle Courier Co's payroll system and provide a control recommendation to address each of these deficiencies. (12 marks) Control deficiency Control recommendation 本题核心知识点： Internal control-control deficiency and control recommendation 题目类型： word 官方答案： (与下方解析在一起) 得分标准： (c)Control deficiencies and recommendations(only 6 required) Holiday requests not authorised FC prepares and authorises bank transfer Edit report not checked Temporary staff not processed by HR Only overtime above five hours authorised Cash wages collected without identification No approved bonus parameters Drivers breaks not monitored Max 6 issues,2 marks each 知识点标签：Syllabus C Internal control-Cl internal control system 难易程度： 中
explanation_zh: Contro deficiency Depatment managers are required to approve all employees' holiday forms,however,this does not always occur. This could result in employees taking unauthorised leave which could lead to operational difficulties if there are shortages of staff at critical periods.In addition,payments for untaken holiday may be made in error as holiday records may be incorrect. Control recommendation Employees should receive written confirmation when their holiday has been approved and should be informed that they will not be able to take holiday without this notification. Any payments for unused holiday should be authorised by department managers prior to payment.

stem_zh: 1. 控制缺陷：员工可以不用请假就可以去休假，这种情况经常发生，所以无法保证员工的 休假记录是真实完整的。 建议措施：员工休假之前应该要提前申请，并且拿到部门经理的相关的审批同意才可以。 The financial controller prepares the bank transfers for the payroll and also authorises these to be paid. This lack of segregation of duties increases the risk of fraud/error as the financial controller could pay themselves or certain employees more than they are due without this being detected. Once the bank transfer has been prepared by the financial controller,it should be passed to the finance director to be reviewed and authorised for payment.The review and authorisation should be evidenced by the finance director.

2. 控制缺陷：财务总监去做应付职工薪酬的管理以及去批准付款。没有能够实现职责分离 建议措施：薪酬部门和财务部门应该做到职责分离，薪酬部门的员工负责去计算薪酬， 同时财务部门的人员负责去发薪酬。 The payroll clerk amends the payroll and an edit report of changes is produced but this report is not reviewed. As the edit report is not checked,errors made by the payroll clerk when updating the system willnot be identified promptly.This may result in new employees not being paid at all,errors being madein payments to new employees or leavers being paid after they have left the company. This would lead to loss of employee goodwill and errors in accounting records for wages and salaries. The payroll supervisor or a member of the finance team should review all edit reports and agree changes made to the details on the joiner/leavers formsAny discrepancies should be investigated promptly and the payroll system updated for any errors or omissions. The payroll supervisor should evidence their review on the edit report with their signature.

3. 控制缺陷：薪酬部门的员工修改了薪酬记录，但是没有人去复核这个修改。如果没有人 复核这个修改，那么这个薪酬记录就可能被随意更改，以及产生舞弊。 建议措施：应该有人去复核薪酬部门员工修改的薪酬记录，并且应该有相关的复核人员 的签名。 The HR department is responsible for processing joiners and leavers,but due to staff llness,the operations manager has processed temporary new drivers and notified payroll. The operations manager may not carry out all the required procedures for processing temporary new drivers as the manager may not be using appropriate documentation. This could result in temporary employees not being set up in the payroll records correctly,resulting in the late payment of wages,incorrect statutory deductions being calculated and incomplete payroll records. All staff appointments,including temporary staff,should only be processed by the HR department to ensure thatcorrect procedures are followed. If it is not possible for the HR department to carry out allof the detailed processing due to staff shortages,a member of the HR team should review the leaver/joiner form and authorise it before it is sent to the payroll department. The payrolldepartment should be notified not to accept any new joiner information unless approved by a member of HR.

4. 控制缺陷：临时员工的信息不是由hr 部门的员工录入并且经理检查的，因此在这里没 有做到职责分离，营运部门的经理无权去做这个。 建议措施：所有员工的任命，都应该是hr 部门的员工去做的，如果由于hr 部门缺少员 工，那也至少应该有一个hr 部门的人去复核。 Only overtime in excess of five hours per week needs authorisation by the operations manager. This means that employees could claim to have worked up to five hours overtime without authorisation resulting in payments being made to employees for hours not worked and additional payrll costs. All overtime,including that below five hours,should be authorised by a responsible official before being processed in the payroll.This authorisation should be evidenced by way of signature.

5. 控制缺陷：只有超过五个小时的加班才需要被复核，5个小时以内的加班都不需要被授 权批准就可以得到加班费。 建议措施：所有的加班都应该做到提前授权审批的，尤其是签字检查。 Where cash wages are paid,the driver is only required to provide their name to collect their pay packet. Payment of wages without proof of identity or signature increases the risk that wages could be paid to incorrect employees either in error or due to fraud resulting in a loss of cash. All drivers collecting cash pay packets should provide a form of identification to the finance staff member before the pay packet is handed to them.The driver should also be required to sign for their pay packet.

6. 控制缺陷：给员工付现金的时候，不需要员工的签名，这样的话有可能工资会发错。 建议措施：所有的现金付款(付工资)都需要确认签字。 The operations manager decides on the bonus to be paid to delivery drivers each quarter and there are no approved parameters for the bonus levels. Without approved parameters,the operations manager may award excessive bonuses or pay additional sums to friends and family members resulting in additional payroll costs. Approved bonus parameters should be established by the board.Allbonuses should be determined by a senior official, such as the sales director,in line with these parameters, who should communicate the bonus in writing to the payroll department.

7. 控制缺陷：生产部门的经理一个人可以确定奖金的金额，没有更高级别的人员的审核。 这样有可能会导致舞弊的产生。 建议措施：奖金的范围应该由更高级别的官员设定 Delivery drivers must take breaks throughout the day which are not monitored. Drivers could take longer breaks than those authorised resulting in payments being made to employees for time not worked.Conversely,if drivers do not take the required breaks,they may be in breach of law and regulations which require drivers to take regular breaks,hence the company is at risk of fines. The company should monitor the activity of the delivery drivers through electronic means,for example,by using tracking devices attached to their vehcles to ensure that the prescribed breaks are taken by the employees. Data should be downloaded and reviewed by a responsible official on a regular basis.

8. 控制缺陷：员工的休息是没有被监督的，如果不按照规定时间休息，那就很有可能会导 致罚款。 建议措施：公司应该强制要求司机定期的去休息，并且做记录。 (d)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to Castle Courier Co's payrollexpense. (6 marks) 本题核心知识点：audit evidence-substantive procedures 题目类型：word 官方答案： (与下方解析在一起) 得分标准： (d)Substantive procedures for payroll expense 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：易 解 析： (d)Substantive procedures on payroll expense - Cast a sample of payroll records to confirm completeness and accuracy and agree the total wages and salaries expense per the payrollsystem to the trial balance. - Recalculate the gross and net pay figures for a sample of employees and agree to the payroll records. - For a sample of wage payments,agree the total net pay per the payroll records to the bank transfer listing and to the cash book. - Perform a proof in total of wages and salaries,incorporating joiners and leavers and the pay increase/bonuses.Compare this to the actua wages and salaries expense in the fnancial statements and investigate any significant differences. - Compare the total payroll igure this year to the prior year,identify any significant differences and discuss with management. - Review monthly payroll charges,compare this to the prior year and budgets and discuss any significant differences with management. Calculate overtime costs as a percentage of total wages.Compare this to the prior year and discuss any significant differences with management. Agree a sample of individual wages and salaries per the payroll to personnel records and records of hours worked per the clocking-in system. Reperform the calculation of statutory deductions and agree to supporting documentation to confirm whether correct deductions for this year have been made in the payroll. Select a sample of joiners and leavers,agree their start/leaving date to supporting documentation,recalculate their first/last salary to ensure it is accurate. Recalculate holiday pay for a sample of employees and agree to holiday records and daily rate applied. Select a sample of employees from HR records and agree salaries per HR records to the payroll records to confirm the accuracy of the payroll expense. - Agree the payroll control account reconciliation to accounting records and investigate any differences. 应付职工薪酬的实质性程序，可以结合本题的案例去回答，也可以回答通用的实质性程序。 2021MJQ17 This scenario relates to three requirements. It is 1 July 20x5.You are an audit supervisor with Woodward&Co and you are in the process of planning the audit of Corley Appliances Co,a company which sells domestic electrical appliances such as fridge freezers,TVs and washing machines.The company's year end is 31 August 20x5 and forecast revenue for the year is$12.2m,total assets are $6.8m and profit before tax is $2.8m. the auditor manager held a meeting with the finance director and the notes from that meeting are provided below: Notes from meeting with finance director The company operates nationwide with 20 branches located across the country and sells goods to members of the public and to retailers.The company has returns policy which allows a customer to return goods within 28 days of purchase if they are not satisfied with the product.Historically, 5%of customers return goods within the return period.The company also provides a six-month warranty on its products which requires Corley Appliances Co to repair any defects,at its own cost,which arise within the warranty period.It is anticipated that the warranty provision in the draft financial statements will be lower than the prior year as the directors are confident the products sold by the company are built to a very high standard. The company is based in Europe and its main supplier of appliances is based in Asia.Goods are shipped to the company's central warehouse by sea and are usually in transit for up to one month. Corley Appliances Co has responsibility for goods in transit,from the point of dispatch by the supplier.The central warehouse and all 20 branches will be carrying out a full year-end inventory count on 31 August 20x5 and it is expected that the value of inventory in Corley Appliances Co's financial statements will be 0.95m. Over the last six months,the finance director has noticed that the company's receivables collection period is now an average of 55 days,whereas the company's target is 42 days.The credit controller has informed the finance director that she is confident that all receivables will eventually pay as increases in receivables collection periods are starting to become common in the industry.The finance director believes it is unlikely that any increase in the allowance for receivables will be necessary at the year end as compared to the prior year. In June 20x5,a fraud was uncovered in the finance department.A payables ledger supervisor had diverted funds from the company's bank account using a fictitious supplier on the payable ledger. The employee was immediately dismissed,and the value of the fraud will be recognised as an expense in the statement of profit or loss.Since the dismissal of the supervisor,purchase invoices have not been recorded in the payables ledger and it is unlikely that this backlog of invoices will be cleared by the year end. During the year,the company purchased and installed a new automated dispatch system for its central warehouse.The cost of the dispatch system was $0.9m and has been recognised as an addition to property,plant and equipment.These capitalised costs include the purchase price of $0.6m,installation costs of$0.2m and staff training costs of $0.1m. Due to the costs incurred in purchasing the new dispatch system and the increase in the receivables collection period,the company's overdraft facility has increased significantly and at one point went over the agreed limit of $0.7m in early June 20x5.The bank has expressed concern about the way that the company is operating its bank overdraft and a decision will be made in November 20x5 as to whether the bank will continue to provide this overdraft facility,which the company is dependent on.The auditor's report is due to be signed in October 20x5. ISA 210 Agreeing the Terms of Audit Engagements states that auditors should only accept,or continue an existing audit engagement,if the preconditions for an audit are present. 本题核心知识点：Audit risk-Risk assessment &audit response (a)Describe the PRECONDITIONS required for an audit. (3 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (a)Preconditions required for an audit Auditors should only accept a new audit engagement or continue an existing audit engagement if the preconditions for an audit are present. ISA 210 Agreeing the Terms of Audit Engagements requires the auditor to: - Determine whether the financial reporting framework to be applied in the preparation of the financial statements is acceptable (for example IFRS®Standards).In considering this,the auditor should have assessed the nature of the entity,the nature and purpose of the financial statements and whether law or regulation prescribes the applicable reporting framework. - Obtain the agreement of management that it acknowledges and understands its responsibilities for the following: 0 preparing the financial statements in accordance with the applicable financial reporting framework; o internal control necessary for the preparation of the financial statements to be free from material misstatement whether due to fraud or error;and 0 providing the auditor with access to information relevant for the audit and access to staff within the entity to obtain audit evidence. 得分标准： (a)Preconditions required for an audit 1 mark per well-explained point Restricted to 知 识 点 标 签： Planning and risk assessment -Accepting audit engagements -The preconditions for an audit 难易程度：易
explanation_zh: 本题考察审计的先决条件，属于常规高频的简答背诵题。考生只要答出其中3点并合理解释， 就可以拿到相应分数。 (b)Describe SEVEN audit risks and explain the auditor's response to each risk in planning the audit of Corley Appliances Co. Audit risk Auditor's response 题目类型：word ONI 官方答案： (与下方解析放在一起) 得分标准： (b)Audit risks and auditor's responses(only 7 required) Refund liability Reduced warranty provision Goods in transit Inventory count atendance Allowance for receivables Fraud Payables ledger backlog Training costs capitalised Renewal of overdraft facility Max 7 issues,2 marks each 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 22 2 2 2 14 知 识 点 标 签：Planning and risk assessment-Assessing audit risks -The auditor's response to each risk 难易程度：中 解 析：

stem_zh: 1. Audit risk The company has a returns policy allowing a customer to return goods within 28 days of purchase if they are dissatisfied with the product. IFRS®15 Revenue from Contracts with Customers requires that revenue should only be recognised to the extent that goods will not be returned.The company should recognise a refund liability for goods which are expected to be returned. If the company has not correctly accounted for the refund liability,revenue will be overstated and the refund liability understated. Auditor's response Enquire with the finance director how the returns policy has been applied at the year end and whether the provisions in IFRS 15 have been reflected. Review the assumptions underpinning the refund liability for reasonableness and whether they meet the historic 5%value of returns. Compare the level of post year-end returns to the refund liability and discuss any significant differences with management. 风险：如果题目中明确说明公司有退货政策，那么根据收入的会计准则，只有那些确定不会 退货的收入才能确认，可能发生退货的要计提退货负债refund liability。否则会导致收入被 高估、负责被低估。 应对：对于该风险，审计师应当与财务总监了解公司退货政策，并估算退货水平，与往期退 货 水 平 相 比 确 认 计 提 的 负 债 是 否 合 理 。

2. The company provides a six-month warranty on its products which require defects to be repaired at Corley Appliances Co's own cost.The directors have reduced this provision during the year on the grounds they feel the products they sell are built to a high standard. The company does not manufacture the goods (they only sell them)and therefore this is not a reasonable reason for reduction,hence if the company has reduced the warranty provision excessively at the year end,liabilities and expenses may be understated. Review the calculation of the warranty provision and assess its reasonableness in light of the value of claims received in the period. Review the assumptions underpinning the warranty provision for reasonableness. Review the level of claims made under warranty post year end to assess the reasonableness of the reduced provision. 风险：如果题目中明确表明公司提供保修服务，那么公司应当计提相应的保修产生的预计负 债。本题中该公司不生产该产品，只负责售卖，所以被审计客户单方面认为产品质量高，减 少计提保修的预计负债是不合理的，因此会导致负债和费用的低估。 应对：审计时应当重新计算预计负债，并于以往年度水平对比，评估其合理性。 3. The company purchases their goods from its main supplier in Asia and has responsibility for goods at the point of dispatch,the goods are in transit for up to one month. At the year end,there is a risk that the cut-off of purchases may not be accurate as they may not correctly recognise the goods from the point of dispatch.There is also a risk that inventory and trade payables are understated at the year end. Discuss with management the point at which inventory is recorded and review the contract with the supplier to verify the requirements in place. Review the controls the company has in place to ensure that inventory is recorded from the point of dispatch. The audit team should undertake detailed cut-off testing of purchases of goods at the year end and the sample of shipping documentation immediately before and after the year end relating to goods from its main supplier in Asia should be increased to ensure that cut-off is complete and accurate. 风险：如果题目中出现了海外采购，由于货物运输周期较长，往往会出现采购确认的截止性 问题。海外采购的应付账款确认时点是货物发出的那一刻，而非收到货物，因此如果没有恰 当记录，则会导致应付账款和存货的低估。 应对：审计师应当复核被审计单位的采购协议，确认记账的时点，并增加截止性测试来应对 该风险。

4. The company's central warehouse and all 20 branches will be carrying out an inventory count at the year-end date of 31 August. It is unlikely that the auditor wil be able to attend allsites which increases detection risk.It may not be possible to gain sufficient appropriate audit evidence over the inventory counting controls and completeness and existence of inventory for those sites which are not visited. The audit team should assess which of the inventory counts they willattend.This should include the count for the central warehouse and a sample of branches which contain the most material balances of inventory and those which have historically had exceptions reported during the inventory count. For those not visited,the auditor will need to review the level of exceptions noted during the count and discuss any issues which arose during the count with management. 风险：如果题目中出现客户所有的仓库都需要盘点，那么审计师很难保证在年末参与所有的 盘点，所以无法对所有的存货完整性和存在性获取充分恰当的审计证据。 应对：审计师应当评估哪些仓库必须参与盘点，并对未参与盘点的存货获取相关的资料，尤 其是出现例外报告的存货仓库。

5. Over the last six months,the receivables collection period has increased from 42 days to 55 days and the allowance for receivables will be at the same level as the prior year. Some receivables may not be recoverable and if an additional allowance for receivables is not included in the fin ancial statements,receivables will be overstated and the allowance for receivables understated. Review and test the controls surrounding the way in which the finance director assesses the recoverability of receivables balances and other credit control processes to ensure that they are operating effectively. Perform extended post year-end cash receipts testing and a review of the aged receivables ledger in order to assess valuation and the need for an increased allowance for irr ecoverable receivables. Discuss with the finance director whether an additional allowance for receivables willbe required against balances older than the company's credit terms. 风险：应收账款的周转天数增加说明应收账款回收的慢了，存在收不回来的可能，如果没有 额外计提应收账款坏账准备，那么应收账款余额可能被高估。 应对：审计师应当关注客户是否有做对应收账款回收相关的控制，并对应收账款执行期后回 款测试来评估应收账款余额的合理性和坏账准备是否合理。

6. The payables ledger supervisor was dismissed in June 20X5 due to a fraud.The value of this fraud has been recognised as an expense in the draft statement of profit or loss. If additional frauds committed by the payables ledger supervisor are not discovered,this could result in expenses being understated and payables being overstated.Control risk is also increased if the fraud has gone undetected for a period of time. Discuss with the finance director the details of the fraud perpetrated by the payables ledger supervisor and what procedures have been adopted to date to identify any further adjustments which are needed in the financial statements. In addition,discuss with the finance director what additional controls have been put in place to prevent any similar frauds. The audit team should undertake additional substantive procedures over the payables balance,particularly the fictitious supplier set up on the payables ledger to ensure this has been removed. In addition,the team should maintain professional scepticism and be alert to the risk of further fraud. 风险：舞弊对财务报表的影响往往是比较广泛的。尤其有些舞弊未必能及时发现，导致控制 风险增加。 应对：针对财务报表存在舞弊状况的，审计时应当保持警惕并增加对舞弊涉及科目的实质性 程序。

7. Since the dismissal of the payables ledger supervisor, purchase invoices have yet to be logged onto the payables ledger. There is a risk that the purchases and trade payables balance at the year end wil be understated if these invoices are not logged onto the payables ledger before it is closed down for the year or accrued for. Review the unprocessed invoices file at the year end to identify any invoices which relate to the supply of pre year-end goods and ensure they have been properly accrued for in the year-end financial statements and recognised as a liability. Discuss with the finance director the approach to be adopted to resolve the issue of unprocessed purchase invoices. 风险：由于解雇了应付会计，有些采购发票没有及时入账，那么应付账款余额就很可能被低 估 。 应对：审计师应当复核未处理的发票并与财务总监讨论如何处理该事项。

8. The company purchased and installed a new dispatch system.The costs which have been capitalised include staff training costs($0·1m). As per IAS®16 Property,Plant and Equipment,the cost of an asset includes its purchase price and directly attributable costs only.IAS 16 does not allow staff training costs to be capitalised as part of the cost of a non-current asset,as these costs are not directly related to the cost of bringing the asset to its working condition. The training costs should be charged to profit or loss. Therefore property,plant and equipment(PPE)and profits are overstated. Discuss the accounting treatment with the finance director and request that the training costs are written off to profit or loss to ensure treatment is in accordance with IAS 16.If adjusted,review the journal entry for accuracy. 风险：根据IAS16PPE 初始计量的要求，培训费用是不可以计入初始成本的，所以PPE 会 被高估、费用被低估。 应对：审计时应当与财务总监确认培训费应当从PPE 中扣除，并计入费用。 9. The company breached the terms of its overdraft facility in June 20X5 and the bank will only confirm the decision whetheror not,to continue to support the business in November 20X5,which is after the auditor's report will be signed.The company is dependent on the overdraft facility. If the bank refuses to continue to support the company, there may be doubts as to the company's ability to continue as a going concern.The uncertainties may not be adequately disclosed in the financial statements. Discuss with the finance director the availability of alternative financing if the bank is unwilling to continue to support the company and review the adequacy of any going concern disclosures in the financial statements. The audit team should undertake detailed going concern testing,in particular,reviewing the impact of a non-renewal of the overdraft facility 风险：被审计客户违反了银行透支的要求，银行表示不再为该公司提供财务支持。这会影响 到可持续经营。 应对：审计师应当与财务总监讨论是否能获取额外的资金支持，证实公司是否可以持续经营， 并执行相关的可持续经营测试。 (c)Define the term ‘professional scepticism'and explain TWO examples from,the audit of Corley Appliances Co where the auditor should apply professional scepticism. (3 marks) (20 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (c)Professional scepticism and examples where professional scepticism should be applied Professional scepticism is defined in ISA 200 Overall Objectives of the Independent Auditor and the Conduct of an Audit in Accordance with International Standards on Auditing as an atitude which includes a questioning mind,being alert to conditions which may indicate possible misstatement due to fraud or error,and a critical assessment of audit evidence. Examples where the auditor should apply professional scepticism for Corley Appliances Co are as follows: Revenue recognition ISA 240 The Auditor's Responsibilities Relating to Fraud in an Audit of Financial Statements contains a rebuttable presumption that fraud in relation to revenue is high risk and hence the auditor must apply professional scepticism to Corley Appliances Co's revenue recognition policies,especilly in relation to the company's returns policy which due to the judgement involved may be used as a way to manipulate revenue. Warranty provision Accounting for warranty provisions will include an element of estimation based on previous experiences of the costs incured by the company to repair defective goods.The auditor should maintain professional scepticism keeping in mind that warranty provisions may include management bias to either deliberately over or understate the provision.Management has reduced the warranty provision in the year on the grounds they feel the goods they sell are built to a high standard.As the company is not involved in the manufacturing of the goods they sell,it may be unreasonable to reduce the warranty provision on this basis. Fraud As a fraud has been committed during the year,the auditor must maintain professional scepticism recognising the fact that internal controls may be weak,hence allowing for employee manipulation of such internal control deficiencies.The auditor must also consider the possibility that other frauds may have taken place during the year through management override of the entity's internal controls. Bank overdraft The company is reliant on its bank overdraft due to the significant levels of expenditure which it has incurred during the year on the new dispatch system.Management may want to deliberately overstate profit and understate liabilities so that the bank renews the overdraft facility. Receivables valuation The receivables collection period has been increasing over the past six months,but the finance director does not envisage that an increase in the allowance for receivables is required.The auditor must apply professional scepticism in considering whether management's assessment of recoverability is reasonable,as any increase in the allowance will reduce profits. 得分标准： (c)Professional scepticism and examples where professional scepticism should be applied Professional scepticism definition Examples 知识点标签：Planning and risk assessment-Objective and general principles-Professional scepticism 难易程度：难 解 析： 本题考察考生对于职业怀疑态度概念的理解，考生需要简要解释什么是职业怀疑态度，即定 义的概念默写，言之成理可以拿到1分；另外针对职业怀疑态度要举出两个恰当的例子，比 如对于收入确认、舞弊、应收账款的估值等等，这些例子需要与题目背景相结合，恰当解释 即可拿到另外2分，此题与以往年度的简答题相比，出题较为灵活，但考频不高，建议平时 可以作为积累知识的题目练习。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PL 2021MJ Q18 This scenario relates to four requirements It is 1 July 20x5.Purrfect Co manufactures and sells a variety of food for dogs and cats.Your firm, Kirano &Co,has audited the company for a number of years.You are about to commence the final audit for the year ended 31 March 20x5 and the draft financial statements show profit before tax of $23.1m and total assets of $99.2m. Vego Dog-inventory valuation Purrfect Co launched a new brand of dog food,Vego Dog,in December 20x4 but sales have been lower than expected and the directors are considering a discounted sale price.Vego Dog products are valued using a standard costing method and the standard cost comprises raw materials,labour costs and production overheads.As at 31 March 20x5.Vego Dog products with a standard costs of $2.4m were included as finished goods in inventory. Receivable-Ellah Co One of Purfect Co's major customers,Ellah Co,operates a chain of pet stores with 23 stores across the country.there have been report in the press for several months that Ellah Co's sales and profits has been included for this balance at the year end. Contamination-legal claims On 25 February 20x5,it was discovered that a batch of canned cat food had been contaminated with insecticide,which could be harmful to cat.This batch had been dispatched in November 20x4 to 247 retail stores.By 31 March 20x5,Purrfect Co had received legal claims totalling $1.9m from consumers whose cats had eaten the contaminated food. 本题核心知识点：Substantive Procedures (a)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to the matters identified regarding the inventory valuation of Vego Dog products. (6marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (a)Inventory of Vego Dog - Obtain and cast the inventory listing of Vego Dog products and agree the total cost of $2·4m to inventory records. - Agree the quantity of Vego Dog products shown as held at the year end to the year-end inventory count records. - Request a breakdown of the cost calculation of each unit of this product and discuss with management how the standard cost was derived. - Recalculate the cost calculations to confim that the quantity multiplied by the standard cost is $2·4m. - For a sample of finished goods items,obtain standard cost cards and agree: 一 raw material costs to recent purchase invoices; - labour costs to time sheets or wage records; - overheads allocated to invoices and that they are of a production nature. Compare sales prices over time to establish if the price has been reduced because of falling demand to determine whether an allowance is required. Compare actual sales units per month to budgeted sales per month from before and after the year end to establish how much lower actual sales are than expected and discuss with management. Select a sample of items included in inventory of Vego Dog and review post year-end sales invoices to ascertain if net realisable value(NRV)is above cost or if an adjustment is required. 得分标准： (a)Substantive procedures for inventory of Vego Dog 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 知识点标签：Syllabus DAudit evidence-4.The audit of specific items-Valuation 难易程度：中 解 析： 本题考察的是与存货计价相关的实质性审计程序。公司原本是用标准成本法来进行计量，入账成 本为2.4m ,但是现在实际销售低于预期，公司决定打折出售，因此存在NRV<cost 的问题，存货 发生减值。 每条一分，写出六条即可得满分。 (1) 获取存货清单并进行加总，将总金额2.4m与存货账簿进行核对。 (2) 将年底存货清单上的数量与存货盘点的情况进行核对。 (3) 对标准成本进行重新计算，确保标准成本数字应为2.4m。 (4) 选取一些产成品样本，将原材料的成本与购买发票核对；将人工成本和工时表或工资记 录核对；将管理费用按发票金额进行分配，并确保管理费用是与生产息息相关的。 (5) 比较这段期间的销售价格，如果由于需求降低，导致售价下降的话，应考虑存货是否需 要计提减值。 (6) 将年前和年后的实际销售数量与预计销售数量进行比对，与管理层讨论实际和预计之间 的差异原因。 (7) 选择样本来计算NRV, 如果NRV<cost, 则要对存货的入账成本进行调整。 (b)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to the receivable balance due from Ellah Co. (4 marks) 题目类型：word 官 方 答 案： (b)Receivable due from Ellah Co - Review correspondence with Ellah Co to establish if there was a discussion about payment dificulties and whether Ellah Co intends to fully settle the outstanding amount Review the age of the outstanding debt with Ellah Co and discuss the circumstances with the credit controller to establish if it has exceeded the agreed credit terms and consider if an allowance is required. - Review post year-end receipts from Ellah Co to establish how much of the debt was recovered by the audit completion date and to assess how much of the year-end balance remains outstanding. - Inspect board minutes to identify whether there are any significant concerns in relation to payments by Ellah Co. - Discuss with management of Purfect Co why no allowance has been made in respect of this debt and assess the justification. 得 分 标 准： (b)Substantive procedures for receivable due from Ellah Co 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 4 知识点标签：Syllabus D Audit evidence-4.The audit of specific items-Receivables 难易程度： 中 解 析： 本题考察的是针对Ellah公司的应收账款相关的实质性审计程序。这里有具体的客户公司， 因此答题时应注意适当联系题目背景进行作答。 每条一分，写出四条即可得满分。 NLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (1) 检查与E公司相关的往来信函，了解E公司是否有支付上的困难，能否全额支付这笔应收 账 款 。 (2) 检查长账龄的应收账款，与信用负责人讨论是否E公司的应收账款已经超过了赊销限额， 以及是否需要计提坏账准备。 (3) 检查期后E公司的付款情况，了解在审计完成前应收账款已经收回了多少，来推定年底 有 多 少 应 收 账 款 。 (4) 检查董事会纪要，来确定管理层针对E公司的付款是否存在重大的不确定性。 (5) 与管理层讨论为什么没有计提减值准备，并评估合理性。 (c)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to the legal claims following the contamination. (5 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (c)Contamination-legal claims - Review customer correspondence to establish the details of the claims and the amounts being claimed. - Review correspondence with Purfect Co's lawyers or,with the client's permission,contact the lawyers to establish the likely outcome of the customer claims made to date. - Discuss with the lawyers the likelihood and amount of potential future claims. - Inspect board minutes to establish details of the circumstances of the contamination and to ascertain management's view as to the likelihood that the existing claims willbe successful and the extent of possible future claims. - Compare levels of returns and claims to date against sales volumes of the product to assess the potential level of future claims. - Review post-year end payments for damage setlements and compare with any amounts provided at the year end to assess the reasonableness of the provision. - Obtain written representations from management that there have been no other contamination incidents and no other product liability claims of which management are aware and for which provision may be required. - Review the draft financial statements to establish that the legal claims have been appropriately provided for or disclosed in accordance with IAS 37 Provisions,Contingent Liabilities and Contingent Assets. 得分标准： (c)Substantive procedures for contamination -legal claims 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 知识点标签：Syllabus DAudit evidence-4.The audit of specific items-provisions and contingencies 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 本题考察的是针对法律诉讼的实质性审计程序，法律诉讼会导致预计负债provision 的产生， 因此需要重点关注。 每条一分，写出五条即可得满分。 (1) 获取公司与顾客之间的往来信函，了解法律诉讼的细节，以及涉及的金额。 (2) 获取公司与其律师之间的往来信函，或征求客户公司同意，直接联系其律师，来了 解法律诉讼的可能结果。 (3) 与律师讨论法律诉讼的可能结果，以及赔偿金额。 (4) 检查董事会纪要来了解具体污染的详情，并确定管理层关于可能性以及诉讼能否成 功等事项的观点。 (5) 比较现有的索赔金额与销量之间的关系，来评估整体法律诉讼所涉及的金额。 (6) 检查年后实际赔款的金额，并与年前计提的预计负债进行对比，来评估预计负债的 可能性。 (7) 获取管理层的书面声明书，保证没有其他的污染事项，污染也没有影响其他的产品， 不需要额外计提预计负债。 (8) 检查报表和附注，保证该事项已经正确按照IAS 37计提预计负债，或在附注中披露 完整。 The final audit is not nearing completion.The audit team is satisfied that legal claims received to date have been appropriately reflected in the financial statements. However,Purrfect Co's lawyer has advised you that it is possible that significant additional legal claims may be made by customers in future in respect of the contamination.The audit engagement partner has confirmed that this is a contingent liability that requires disclosure.The finance director has agreed to disclose some detail of the potential claims in the financial statements,but the audit team is yet to confirm the adequacy of these disclosures. (d)Discuss the issue and describe the impact on the auditor's report of Purrfect Co of both adequate AND inadequate disclosure of the contingent liability. (5 marks) (20 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (d)Issue and impact on auditor's report According to IAS 37,the possibility of additional claims should be disclosed as a contingent liability as i is possible but not probable and quantifiable. As the claims may be significant,this issue represents a matter which is fundamental to users'understanding of the financial statements.The impact on the auditor's report depends on whether this matter is deemed to be adequately disclosed in the financial statements. Adequate disclosure If Purfect Co adequately discloses the issue,then an unmodified audit opinion should be given but the auditor's report should include an emphasis of matter paragraph.This would draw attention to the disclosure in the financial statements by cross-referencing the user to the note in the financial statements which discloses the possible claims,emphasising that the audit opinion is unmodified. Inadequate disclosure If there is no disclosure in the financial statements or the disclosure is considered to be inadequate,then this indicates that the financial statements are materially misstated.As this lack of adequate disclosure is likely to be material but not pervasive,then a qualified opinion will be given.A basis for qualified opinion paragraph will be added to the auditor's report discussing the matter and the opinion paragraph will be modified to state that 'except for'the failure to adequately disclose the matter,the financial statements give a true and fair view. 得分标准： (d)Issue and impact on auditor's report Discussion of issue 1 Adequate disclosure 2 Inadequate disclosure 2 一 5 知 识 点 标 签： Syllabus E Review and reporting-1.Subsequent events -The responsibilities of auditors regarding subsequent events 难易程度：中 解 析： 本题考察的是对期后事项的处理，律师发现针对污染事项，期后可能出现更多法律诉讼，公 司财务总监已经将其披露为或有负债，但是审计项目组还在评估这些披露的准确性。因此要 先对这一事项进行讨论，这一事项对于报告使用者的理解至关重要，因此审计报告的意见由 披露是否完整来决定(1分)。 如果披露准确完整，应该给出无保留意见加强调事项段EOM, 并 在EOM中对这一事项进行 阐述，引起报告使用者注意的同时，说清楚这一事项并不影响审计意见(2分);如果披露不 完整，应该给出非无保留意见，并在报告中解释原因(2分)。 MOCK1 Section A CASE 1 The following scenario relates to questions 1-5 Martin Co has grown substantially since it was incorporated and the board of directors has now decided to seek a public listing. In order to prepare for the listing and apply good corporate governance practice,the board proposes to appoint independent non-executive directors,a new chairman,establish an audit committee and recruit an internal audit team.The applicable regulatory framework does not prohibit internal auditors from providing direct assistance to external auditors. The board of directors is currently composed of the managing director,who is the chief executive officer,the finance director,the marketing director and an executive chairman who will shortly retire and leave the board.All of the other board members have expressed their willingness to remain on the board. The finance director has suggested that,in addition to the annual financial statements,the board should issue further information in the form of a sustainability report.He also suggests that the external auditor,Sheen &Co,be asked to provide an appropriate assurance report on the additional information. 1.Which TWO of the following changes to the composition of the board of directors are in line with good corporate governance principles? A.Appointment of at least three non-executive directors B.Appointing the current chief executive officer as chairman C.Appointment of an independent chairman D.Resignation or removal of one of the current executive directors

stem_zh: 4. 答案：1. YES;2.YES;3.YES;4.NO
explanation_zh: 本题考察哪些内审工作会对外审工作有直接的帮助。 选项1:获取并了解内部控制系统。内部审计对公司内控也会执行测试和相应记录，因此对 外部审计师工作有所帮助，故本选项正确。 选项2:执行控制测试。内部审计对公司内控测试的结果会影响到外部审计师执行控制测试 量的多少，故本选项正确。 选项3:执行实质性细节测试。内部审计对公司财报也会执行相关测试，内审工作结果会影 响外部审计师执行细节测试量的多少，故本选项正确。 选项4:评估外部函证程序的结果。函证程序需要在外部审计师全程的监控下进行，不应当 将该责任给到内部审计，故本选项错误。 知识点标签： Syllabus C Internal control -Internal audit -Compare and contrast the role of external and internal audit 难易程度：中 5.To support his recommendations to the board,the finance director has drafted the following statements about the assurance report to be provided by Sheen &Co on the proposed sustainability report: (1)It enhances the credibility of the information being reported upon (2)It reduces the risk of management bias in the information being reported upon (3)It attests to the correctness of the information being reported upon (4)It draws the attention of the user to deficiencies in the information being reported upon Which of the above are benefits of the assurance report? A.1,2 and 3 B.2,3 and 4 C.1,2 and 4 D.1,3 and 4

stem_zh: 5. 答案：C 解 析 ： 本题考察鉴证报告的好处。 鉴证业务的产物是鉴证报告，是从业者根据相关标准对责任方提供的数据，通过获取充分恰 当的证据，对该数据进行验证，从而增强预期使用者对报告信息的可信度。 选项1:增强报告中信息的可信度。该描述符合鉴证业务特点，故正确。 选项2:减少报告信息中受管理层偏见影响的风险。该描述符合鉴证业务特点，故正确。 选项3:证明报告中信息的正确性。鉴证业务不能提供100%的保证，因此无法证明报告中 信息完全正确，故本选项错误。 选项4:引起使用者对报告中缺陷的注意。该描述符合鉴证业务特点，故正确。 故正确答案为C。 知 识 点 标 签： Syllabus A.Audit framework and regulation-Audit and other assurance engagements -Objectives of an assurance engagement 难易程度：中 高顿教育 CASE 2 The following scenario relates to questions 6-10 You have just joined Cedric&Co as an audit manager and your first audit assignment is Sharon Co,a listed company.Your review of Sharon Co's permanent audit file,last year's current audit file and correspondence file has highlighted the following potential risks to independence: (1)The audit partner has recently been in initial discussions with the Chairman of the Board of Sharon Co about becoming the successor to the current finance director. (2)The directors have suggested that if the audit can be completed within three weeks,rather than the usual four,they will be prepared to pay the same fee as last year as it would minimise the disruption caused to the finance and other departments. (3)Sharon Co has implemented a final salary pension scheme for all employees and has requested that a partner of Cedric &Co,who is a qualified actuary,carry out the valuation of the pension scheme liability to be included in the financial statements.The valuation involves a significant degree of subjectivity and the liability will be material. (4)The senior assigned to the current year's audit has notified the ethics partner of Cedric&Co that her husband inherited 10%of Sharon Co's shares during the year. You are also the manager on the audit of Essex Co.The directors of Essex Co have informed Cedric &Co that they are unhappy about the potential qualification of the auditor's report on their financial statements and are seeking a second opinion. 6.In relation to the investment in 10%of Sharon Co's shares during the year: Which of the following safeguards could be implemented by Cedric &Co in order to comply with ACCA's Code of Ethics and Conduct? A.The audit senior should be removed from the audit team B.An independent quality control review partner should evaluate the audit findings C.The audit senior's husband should dispose of the financial interest immediately D.Cedric &Co must resign from the audit engagement

7. 答案： (1) FAMILIARITY (2) SELF-INTEREST (3) SELF-REVIEW (4) SELF-INTEREST 解 析 ： 本题考查职业道德威胁的相关知识点。 描述1:审计团队现在的合伙人将会成为被审计单位下一任财务总监，这种情形下，由于之 前一直作为该项目的合伙人，对整个审计的过程都会非常了解，跳槽到客户处后，会产生亲 密关系的威胁 (familiarity threat) 描述2:客户的董事建议在更短的时间内完成审计工作，并且支付和去年相同的审计费用。 在保证审计工作质量的前提下，如果想要在更短的时间内完成相同的工作，那么审计师事务 所就需要在短期内投入更多的资源，这种情况下，审计费用很可能比以往年度收费要高，如 果审计客户不愿意去支付可能会额外产生的费用，那么就会导致自身利益 self-interest 的威胁。 描述3:由审计师 (Cedric 公司合伙人)去进行的评估，并且把评估结果记录在财报中，这 将会产生自我复核 self-review 的威胁，因为审计师之后还要审计财报中的结果。 描述4:审计经理的配偶(亲密家庭成员)持股被审计单位，那么审计经理在执行审计过程 中就有可能会面临“自身利益”带来的威胁，也就是self-interest 的威胁。 将上述四个描述的威胁分别列出来，即为： 1.Familiarity threat 2.Self-interest 3.Self-review 4.Self-interest 高顿教育 知识点标签： Syllabus A audit framework and regulation -A4 Professional ethics 难易程度： 易 8.Which of the following is a correct statement regarding the request for the valuation of the pension scheme liability? A.The service cannot be provided if the valuation will be material to the financial statements B.The service cannot be provided because the valuation involves a significant degree of subjectivity C.The service can be provided if members of the valuation team are excluded from the audit team D.The service can be provided if there willbe an independent review of the audit work

12. The directors of Scott Co have asked you to outline the appropriate audit opinion that willbe provided if the material uncertainty about going concern is not adequately disclosed. Complete the following sentence by dragging and dropping the appropriate audit opinion. If the implications of the uncertainty are not adequately disclosed,our opinion will be disclaimerqualified "except for"unmodified with a going concern sectionAudit opinions disclaimer qualified "except for" unmodified with a going concern section Audit opinions adverse unmodified with emphasis of matter paragraph unmodified 12.答案：qualified “except for”
explanation_zh: 根据题目案例中描述的情况，客户报表关于持续经营事项的披露不够充分，由于该事 项属于重大事项，如果为充分披露则会构成重大错报，但是由于公司并非完全隐瞒该事项， 而是披露不够充分，因此属于重大但是不广泛(material but not pervasive)的错报，审计师应 当出具保留意见，用“except for”来表达。 知识点标签： Syllabus E Review and reporting-E5.The Independent Auditor's Report--Modified audit opinion 难易程度：中 13.The audit engagement partner has concluded that the disclosure included in the financial statements of Scott Co in relation the material uncertainty about going concern is adequate. Complete the following sentence regarding the form of the auditor's report that should be issued from the options given. An auditor's report with _opinion and _paragraph should be issued. Opinion Paragraph a modified an other matter an unmodified a material uncertainty relating to going concern a qualified an emphasis of matter 13.答案：an unmodified;a material uncertainty relating to going concern 解析：本题考察可持续经营假设披露对审计意见和审计报告的影响。 当被审计公司存在的持续经营问题已经充分在财报中披露并解释，则报告不存在重大错报， 审计师应当出具无保留意见，但是会同时在审计报告中加入持续经营存在重大不确定性这一 段落，来向使用者予以提示。 知识点标签： Syllabus E Review and reporting-E5.The Independent Auditor's Report--The impact on the auditor's report when issuing a modified opinion 难易程度：中 14.Following the directors refusal to amend the financial statements of Tracy Co,the auditor has decided that the audit opinion must be modified because the financial statements are materially misstated. Which of the following factors are relevant in determining whether the effects of the misstatement are pervasive? 1.The nature of Tracy Co's business 2.The risky nature of the investments 3.The directors'refusal to make amendments 4.The proportion of the financial statements affected A.1,2 and 3 B.2 and 4 only C.2,3 and 4 高顿教育 D.1 and 4 only 14.答案：D 解析：本题考察错报广泛性的评估。 该事项影响的广泛程度，其中选项3管理层拒绝修改报表，这会引起审计师修改审计意见， 但无法判断该错报是广泛还是不广泛，所以与广泛性判断无关；选项2投资本身的风险，这 个也属于广泛存在的并不是客户公司所独有的，与广泛性判断无关；而选项1由于Tracy Co 本身从事投资业务，其业务性质决定案例中所描述的事项对公司经营影响巨大，选项4则是 最直观的考量，该事项对报表数据影响的比例，所以这两个选项决定了审计师最终做出“广 泛”错报的判断。 知识点标签： Syllabus E Review and reporting-E5.The Independent Auditor's Report--The impact on the auditor's report when issuing a modified opinion 难易程度：难 15.In relation to Tracy Co,which TWO of the following conditions could result in the inclusion of the valuations of the investments as a key audit matter in the auditor's report? A.The financial statements do not disclose the valuation methods and techniques used B.The valuations required significant auditor attention in the current period C.Series &Co express a modified opinion on the valuations D.The valuations are included in communications with those charged with governance 15.答案：BD 解析： 本题考察关键审计事项的定义. A. 财务报表没有披露估值所采用的方法； B. 当期估值事项需要审计师的特别关注； C.Series &Co发表了有关估值的修改的审计意见； D. 估值事项包含在与治理层的讨论中。 所谓审计报告中列示的关键审计事项，通常指的是在审计师与治理层沟通的事项当中选取出 来的，需要审计师给予额外关注和注意的事项，并且需要采取相应的审计程序去收集充分恰 当的证据，来解决该事项存在的风险。所以选项B 和选项D 符合这一定义。A 选项描述的 未披露相关事项通常不放入KAM, 如果该事项引起披露不充分需要修改审计意见则需要在 形成审计意见的基础段中做出相应描述；C 选项描述的发表修改审计意见通常也不在KAM 段中描述，而是在审计意见段中描述。 知识点标签： Syllabus E Review and reporting-E5.The Independent Auditor's Report--Format and content of key audit matters 难易程度：中

stem_zh: Q16 This scenario relates to three requirements. It is 1 July 20X5.Plaza Hotels Co(Plaza)operates eight hotels in various locations around the country and its year end is 31 July 20X5.Following a career move by the former managing director,a new managing director was appointed in October 20X4.The new managing director has extensive experience of working in the hotel sector. You are an audit manager of Offerman &Co and are currently planning the audit of Plaza.You attended the planning meeting with the audit engagement partner and the client's finance director, Adam Platt,last week and the minutes from the meeting are shown below: Minutes of Plaza planning meeting Plaza's directors,central administration and accounts department are located at its head office premises and wages payments to all employees together with all company supplier payments are made from there.Accounts staff at each hotel deposit hotel takings into the company's bank account at their local branch of the bank at the end of each day. The accounting system,which comprises integrated general,trade payables and trade receivables ledgers,relies on the daily input of revenue and expenditure at remote terminals at each hotel,for transfer to a secure central computer based in the head office accounts department.During the year, Adam Platt changed some of the general IT controls including those relating to the use of the remote terminals. The hotels have a cash or bank card payment policy for all customers. The remuneration package of each of the directors provides for the payment of a bonus based on the reported profits of the company.A similar remuneration package for each hotel general manager provides for a bonus based on the profits of their hotel. Independent contractors were employed to construct a new hotel on land already owned by Plaza. Work commenced in September 20X4 and the new hotel will begin trading in July 20X5. Each hotel offers a cafe,restaurant,bar,gym,conference and meeting facilities.Plaza owns all of the hotels'land and buildings.During the year,two of the hotels were extended substantially to create additional restaurant space,and a swimming pool was constructed at another.All hotels are furnished and equipped similarly in accordance with a company policy that provides for ongoing repairs,maintenance and replacement of furnishings and equipment. In May 20X5,food poisoning at one of Plaza's largest hotels resulted in nine guests being admitted to hospital.The directors have received legal advice confirming that Plaza is likely to have to pay compensation to settle the legal claims that have been lodged against it in this regard. The monthly counting of inventory(food,soft drinks,beer,wine and spirits)together with cash counts and reconciliation to bank and cash records is outsourced to a company,Courteous Co,that specialises in hotel management and control.Courteous has been used for many years by Plaza and its procedures are understood by Offerman &Co.Any issues that had arisen in the past were resolved to the auditor's satisfaction with no implications for the auditor's report.The year-end arrangements have already been made for 31 July and,as in the past,Offerman &Co willattend half of the physical counts. Requirements: (a)Define inherent risk and control risk and explain their relevance to the nature,timing and extent of audit work. (5 marks) 本题核心知识点：Assessing audit risks-The components of audit risk 题目类型：word 官方答案： Inherent risk and control risk Inherent risk is the susceptibility of an assertion about a class of transaction,account balance or disclosure to a misstatement that could be material,either individually or when aggregated with other misstatements,before consideration of any related controls. transaction,account balance or disclosure and that could be material(either individually orControl risk is the risk that a misstatement that could occur in an assertion about a class of transaction,account balance or disclosure and that could be material(either individually or when aggregated with other misstatements)will not be prevented,or detected and when aggregated with other misstatements)will not be prevented,or detected and corrected,on a timely basis by the entity's system of internal control. Both(along with detection risk)are components of audit risk.When combined,inherent statements. The auditor is required to assess the risk of material misstatement andrisk and control risk constitute the risk of material misstatement in the financial statements. The auditor is required to assess the risk of material misstatement and respond to that risk as the basis for determining the nature,timing and extent of audit respond to that risk as the basis for determining the nature,timing and extent of audit work(detection risk)to reduce audit risk to an acceptable level. For example,if the auditor does not plan to test the operating effectiveness of controls, high,the auditor will need to reduce the risk of not detecting material misstatements(andthe risk of material misstatement is the same as the assessment of inherent risk.If this is high,the auditor will need to reduce the risk of not detecting material misstatements(and thereby forming an inappropriate audit opinion on the financial statements)by performing thereby forming an inappropriate audit opinion on the financial statements)by performing extensive relevant substantive procedures.These will typically be carried out in a final audit conducted after the year. If,however,the auditor plans to test the operating effectiveness of controls,this will form initial expectation that the controls are operating effectively,the auditor should be able tothe basis of the auditor's assessment of control risk.If these tests confirm the auditor's initial expectation that the controls are operating effectively,the auditor should be able to reduce the level of detailed substantive procedures(e.g.reduced sample sizes)that would reduce the level of detailed substantive procedures(e.g.reduced sample sizes)that would otherwise be required as the risk of material misstatement is lower.Tests of control are typically undertaken during an interim audit,before the year end. 得分标准： 16 (a) Plaza Hotels Co Generally 1 mark per point explaining relevance to each of nature,timing and extent to a max ofDefinition of inherent risk Definition of control risk Generally 1 mark per point explaining relevance to each of nature,timing and extent to a max of Marks 1 1 1 1 3 Marks 5 知 识 点 标 签 ：Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-Assessing audit risks-The components of audit risk 难易程度： 难
explanation_zh: 本题考察审计风险中固有风险和控制风险的定义，并解释固有风险与控制风险与审计工作的 性质、时间和范围的联系。其中，解释固有风险和控制风险的定义各占1分，这部分属于定 义背诵、难度较低。结合固有风险和控制风险与审计工作的联系占3分，该部分需要解释固 有风险与控制风险共同组成重大错报风险，审计师需要设计对应的审计程序才能降低检查风 险，来降低总体的审计风险。这部分的解释较为灵活，考生需要结合执行控制测试对降低控 制风险和执行实质性程序来降低检查风险两个方面来辨析，在考试中属于灵活性强、难度较 大的问答题目。 (b)Using the minutes provided,identify and describe SEVEN audit risks,and explain the auditor's response to each risk,in planning the audit of Plaza Hotels Co. (14 marks) 本题核心知识点： Assessing audit risks-The auditor's response to each risk 题目类型：word 得分标准： Multiple locations(b) Audit risks and responses (only 7 risks required) Multiple locations General controls-changes Bonuses Cash susceptibility New construction Repairs and renewals Portable non-current assets m2pemnasrkatfioorneacclahimrisk identified +V/z mark for 2 description +1 mark for relevant response) Max 7 issues,2 marks each 14 知识点标签： Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-Assessing audit risks-The auditor's response to each risk 难易程度： 难 解析： Audit risk Audit response The finance director has changed some of the general IT controls (i.e.controls that should The auditor must document the changes (and confirm with a walk-through to assess design address risks arising from the use of IT) There is a control risk that these changes may reduce the operating effectiveness of information processing control and increase the risk of material misstatement. and implementation)and assess their impact on controls over information processing. The auditor should plan to perform appropriate tests of control(which should be modified from the previous year's audit).If weaknesses are identified, extended substantive testing will be necessary. 财务总监更改了一些信息系统的总控制(即 应对IT使用产生的风险的控制)。 这会导致控制风险的增加，这些变化可能降 低信息处理控制的操作有效性，增加重大错 报的风险。 审计师必须记录系统的更改(并通过穿行测 试确认评估内控的设计和执行),并评估它 们对信息处理控制的影响。 审计师应计划实施适当的控制测试(应在上 一年的审计基础上进行修改)。如果发现了 缺陷，就需要增加实质性测试的量。 .Note:控制测试对于评估控制风险有应对作用，虽然执行控制测试无法降低控制风险，但对 审计师了解公司的内控有效性以及对执行实质性程序的量有直接的作用。 . Audit risk Audit response The hotels have a high level of cash-based transactions. There is a risk that cash will be misappropriated leading to cash balances in the financial statements being understated Tests of control should be undertaken to confirm that controls over cash have been operating effectively(e.g.to ensure that all cash received is recorded and banked intact) The monthly cash work carried out by Courteous should be reviewed and opening cash balances reconciled via the reports from Courteous to the year-end audited cash counts and balances. 酒店的现金交易非常多。 存在现金被挪用的风险，导致财务报表中的 现金余额被低估。 应进行控制测试，以确认对现金的控制一直 在有效地运作(例如，确保收到的所有现金 都有记录并完整地存入银行)。应审查 Courteous每月的现金工作，并通过 Courteous的报告与年终审计的现金计数和 余额核对期初现金余额。 There is a risk that revenue and expenses will be understated if cash income is not recorded but used to pay for expenses(e.g.for casual workers). Substantive analytical procedures should be performed on revenue/expenses (e.g.by income/expense stream,month and hotel compared with prior years)and the reasons for any decline investigated. 如果没有记录现金收入，而是用于支付费用 (例如为临时工),则存在收入和费用被低估 的风险。 应对收入/费用执行实质性分析程序(例如按 收入/费用来源、按照月份和酒店与前几年 的同期比较)并调查的下降原因。 Note:本题背景中描述了众多有关于现金交易的事项，大量使用现金交易的企业，如果疏于 对现金的管理，出现内控失效及舞弊的风险是非常大的，因此审计师要特别关注。这个风险 点在本题中属于难度较大、不易识别的风险。 Audit risk Audit response Annual bonuses are made to directors and hotel general managers based on the profits of the company and each hotel. There is a risk that revenue willbe overstated, and expenses understated by the directors and general managers to maximise their bonus. Detailed tests for unrecorded liabilities and cut-off tests on purchases and revenue should be performed at the year end. Substantive analytical procedures on the breakdown of revenue and costs by facility (e.g.restaurant,accommodation,conference) and the reasons for any unusual activity investigated. 每年发给董事和酒店总经理的奖金是基于 公司和每个酒店的利润。 存在的风险是董事和总经理为了最大化自 己的奖金，会高估收入，低估支出。 应在年底对未记录负债进行详细检验，并对 采购和收入执行截止性测试。 对按业务(如餐厅、住宿、会议)分列的收入 和费用执行实质性分析程序并调查的任何 异常变动的原因。 Note:当题目中出现高管的薪酬与当年的收入或者利润挂钩的情形，通常审计师要保持警觉 的态度，注意高管是否会操纵收入和利润。 Audit risk Audit response There is a risk that capital and revenue expenditure on the new hotel and hotel extensions will be incorrectly classified Understatement of revenue expenditure will also increase the risk that annual bonuses will be overstated. Review a breakdown of the costs of construction to ascertain the split of capital and revenue expenditure. Substantive testing (e.g. examining contractors'invoices)should be undertaken to ensure that the classification in the financial statements is correct and that the expenditure has been accurately recorded. Confirm completeness of recording of any outstanding liabilities relating to the construction(e.g.by examining invoices and cash book payments after the year end). 新酒店和酒店扩建项目的资本和收入支出 有被错误分类的风险。 少报收入性支出也会增加年度奖金被高估 的风险。 审查建设成本的明细，以确定资本性支出和 收入性支出的分类。 应进行实质性测试(例如检查承包商的发 票),以确保财务报表的分类正确和支出的 记录准确。 确认所有与施工有关的未偿付负债的记录 是否完整(例如，检查年底后的发票和现金 帐面付款)。 Note:酒店扩建项目分类错误的风险比较容易识别，但对于少记收入性支出对于考生识别还 是有一定难度的，考生可以积累下这里资产负债表和利润表的勾稽关系。 Audit risk Audit response Similarly,the ongoing repairs,maintenance and replacement programmes for furnishings The auditor should review a breakdown of repairs and maintenance accounts and confirm and equipment further increase the risk that capital and revenue expenditures have been incorrectly classified. There is a risk that property,plant and equipment will be overstated if the carrying amounts of replaced assets are not removed from the statement of financial position. In addition,there is a risk that depreciation and profits or losses on disposals could be misstated if disposal proceeds are not accounted for. to invoices that expenses are not of a capital nature.Substantive analytical procedures should be performed by hotel. All material assets recorded in the records of the company as at the year end should be physically inspected to confirm their existence and condition. Undertake tests of control over the disposal of assets (e.g.that the disposals and the purchases of replacement assets are authorised)and detailed tests on the completeness of disposals (together with asset existence)and proceeds accurately recorded in cash book receipts. Undertake tests to ensure that the profit or loss on disposal of material non-current assets have been correctly calculated and accounted for(noting potential impact on directors’ bonuses). 同样，正在进行的家具和设备的修理、保养 和更换方案进一步增加了资本和收入支出 分类不正确的风险。 如果不从财务状况表中删除已更换资产的 账面价值，则存在高估房地产、厂房和设备 的风险。 此外，如果不计入处置收益，处置的折旧和 损益也有可能被错报。 审计员应审查维修和保养账目的细目，并追 溯到发票确认费用不是资本性质的。并且 执行实质性分析程序。 公司年末记录的所有重大资产都应执行实 物检查，以确认其存在和状况。 对资产处置的控制进行测试(例如，处置和 购买替代资产是否获得批准),并对处置的 完整性(以及资产是否存在)和现金帐面收据 中准确记录的收益进行详细测试。 进行测试，以确保处置重大非流动资产的损 益得到正确计算和解释(注意对董事奖金的 潜在影响)。 Because of the nature of non-current assets in a hotel,there is a risk that they may be misappropriated,and non-current assets will be overstated,and losses understated in the financial statements. Carry out tests of control on the hotels' controls over such items.For example, inspecting a sample of housekeeping reports showing that rooms were checked while guests were settling their bills on leaving. 由于酒店非流动资产的性质，存在被挪用的 风险，非流动资产会在财务报表中被夸大， 损失被低估。 对酒店对这类物品的控制进行控制测试。 例如，检查客房管理报告的样本，显示客人 在离开时结账时检查了房间。 Note: 酒店中的固定资产比较特殊，所以这里提到的资产被挪用的风险也比较贴合本题目背 景中的情形，属于比较偏实操、难以察觉的审计风险，难度较大。 Audit risk Audit response The compensation claim arising from food Obtain a direct confirmation letter from poisoning will require a provision in the statement of financial position (since payment is likely). There is a risk that this provision could be materially misstated. Plaza's legal advisor.Discuss with the managing director to ascertain whether,for example,Plaza expects to offer an out-of-court settlement(which,if accepted, would be certain)or contest the claim. Developments in the case should be monitored throughout the audit.If settlement is not made (paid)or agreed in writing before the financial statements are authorised for issue the estimate of the provision must be included in a written representation from management. 因食物中毒而引起的赔偿要求将需要在财 务状况报表中确认预计负债(因为可能会支 付)。 存在预计负债出现重大错报的风险。 直接向Plaza法律顾问发送函证。与董事及 总经理讨论，以确定Plaza是否希望提供庭 外和解(如果接受，将是肯定的)或抗辩索赔。 在整个审计过程中应关注案件的进展情况。 如果在财务报表批准发行之前没有作出(支 付)或以书面形式达成和解，则必须在管理 层声明书中确认该笔预计负债。 Note:题目中提及的食物中毒事件符合预计负债的确认条件，因此存在未计提预计负债的风 险 。 Audit risk Audit response At the year end,there will be inventory and cash counts(carried out by the external specialists,Courteous)at each of the eight hotel locations.The auditor expects to attend and observe only half of the physical counts There is a risk that material errors may arise over the inventory/cash counting procedures and the completeness,accuracy and existence of inventory and cash for any hotels not attended by the auditors. The auditor's understanding of the ability of Courteous to carry out the counts should be updated to consider any issues that arose during the year. The auditor should assess which of the hotels they willattend to observe the physical counts (e.g.those with material inventory or which have a history of significant errors). A review of the monthly reports submitted by Courteous should be carried out to identify any issues that are specific to a hotel or general across allhotels. For those hotels not visited,the auditor will need to review the level of exceptions noted during the counts by Courteous and discuss with management and Courteous any issues that arose during the count. Specific attention should also be paid to the analytical review covering those hotels not visited. 在年底，将在8个酒店的每个地点进行存货 和现金盘点(由外部专家Courteous执行)。 审计师对Courteous执行盘点的能力的了解 应当考虑到该年内出现的问题，并及时更 审计员只将参加并观察一半的现场盘点。 对于没有审核员参与的任何酒店，存货/现 金盘点程序以及存货和现金的完整性、准确 性和存在性都有可能出现重大错误。 新。 审计师应评估他们将前往哪些酒店参与现 场盘点(例如，年末金额存货金额重大或有 重大错误历史的酒店)。 应对Courteous提交的月度报告进行审查， 以确定任何特定于一家酒店或所有酒店的 普遍问题。 对于未被访问的酒店，审计员需要审查在统 计过程中注意到的例外情况，并与管理层和 Courteous讨论统计过程中出现的任何问 题。 同时应特别注意对未访问的酒店执行分析 性复核程序。 (c)At the end of the meeting,Adam Platt drew you to one side and confided in you that he had heard that the former managing director had resigned following some suggestions of fraud.He goes on to say that he did not raise this in the meeting because the new managing director has "quite an aggressive management style"and had told him that the matter“was sorted”. (i)Explain the auditor's responsibility for the prevention and detection of fraud. (2 marks) (ii)Explain TWO types of fraud that may result in the misstatement of financial statements and for each type provide an example that may have involved the former managing director. (4 marks) 本题核心知识点： Fraud,laws and regulations -Responsibilities of internal and external auditors for the prevention and detection of fraud and error 题目类型：word 官方答案： Fraud (i) Auditor's responsibility The auditor's responsibility in conducting an audit of financial statements is to obtain reasonable assurance that the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement,whether caused by fraud or error.Primary responsibility for prevention and detection of fraud(and error)lies with management and those charged with governance, not the auditor. When obtaining reasonable assurance,the auditor is responsible for maintaining professional scepticism throughout the audit,considering the potential for management override of controls and recognising that auditor procedures that are effective for detecting error may not be effective in detecting fraud. (ii) Types of fraud Although there are many forms of fraud,only two types will result in a misstatement of financial statements(and therefore will be of interest to auditors)-fraudulent financial reporting and misappropriation of assets. Fraudulent financial reporting involves misstatements or omissions of amounts or disclosures intended to deceive users of financial statements.For example,the former managing director may have deliberately overstated revenue because bonus incentives were based on reported profit. Misappropriation of assets includes the theft or misuse of company assets.For example, the former director could have stolen cash(embezzlement)and been able to conceal the loss through the falsification of records or documents. 得分标准： (c)(i) Auditor's responsibility for fraud To obtain reasonable assuranceTo maintain professional scepticism To obtain reasonable assurance (ii) Types of fraud Fraudulent financial reporting Misappropriation of assets (V₂mark for mere mention or 1 mark for clear explanation +1 mark for relevant example) 1 1 1 1 max 2 max 2 — 2 4 知识点标签：Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-Fraud,laws and regulations- Responsibilities of internal and external auditors for the prevention and detection of fraud and error 难易程度： 易 解 析： 本题考察审计师对舞弊的责任以及舞弊的分类，属于简单的概念背诵题。需要考生对定义和 准则进行准确记忆和背诵。 (iii)Discuss the effect of the finance director's comments on the audit strategy and extent of audit work for the current year. (5 marks) 本题核心知识点：Audit planning and documentation-The relationship between the overall audit strategy and audit plan 题目类型：word 官方答案： (ii ) Effect of the finance director's comments The auditor should exercise a higher level of professional scepticism to minimise the unavoidable risk that material misstatements resulting from fraud may not be detected (due to the inherent limitations of an audit). Even if the previous matter has been resolved,Adam may be subjected to undue pressure and influence,by the managing director,that could result in fraudulent financial reporting. Aggressive and dominating behaviour is often an indicator of the fraudster(e.g.the managing director)"warning off" enquiries that are getting too close to the truth. Fraud indicators and the fact that there may have been a fraud should be discussed in the engagement team meeting(between the audit manager,senior and key members of the audit team)and documented as a significant matter.Team members not involved in the discussions must be informed of the outcomes and specific effects on areas relevant to their responsibilities(e.g.through the audit plan or work programmes). 得 分 标 准： (ii i)Discussion of effect on strategy Professional scepticism Engagement team discussion Documentation of significant matter Tests of control Analytical procedures 1 工 1 1 工 5 知 识 点 标 签：Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-Audit planning and documentation- The relationship between the overallaudit strategy and audit plan 难易程度：难 解 析： 顺教 本题考察审计大纲和当期审计工作的影响。本题不是常规的背诵题，需要考生结合题目背景 中财务总监描述的情形，辨析其对审计大纲和当期审计工作所需要重新考量的事项。对考生 综合分析的能力非常高，属于难度较大的文字论述题。 高顿教盲

stem_zh: Q17 This scenario relates to three requirements. It is 1 July 20X5.Retta Kitchens Co(Retta)produces kitchen units from factory premises,and prepares annual financial statements to 31 December.Its board comprises four directors:a managing director and directors of sales,production and finance&administration.The company employs only one buyer,Robert Lowe,who reports directly to the managing director.You are an audit supervisor of Ansari &Co,which has recently been appointed as external auditor,and are currently reviewing the following documentation of Retta's controls over the purchase of tangible non-current assets. The directors and Robert meet in October each year to discuss the non-current asset requirements of each functional area for the following year.At the end of the meeting,an agreed list of acquisitions is approved and a copy is retained by all attendees.Robert then contacts potential suppliers ofthe approved purchases to confirm availability and the lowest price. In December,the directors and Robert meet to formalise and approve the capital expenditure budget.Following the meeting,a schedule is prepared detailing the approved acquisitions by category,expected month of purchase and budgeted cost as obtained by Robert.This schedule forms the basis of Retta's capital expenditure budget for the forthcoming year. Throughout the year,Robert places orders with suppliers ensuring that assets are acquired in the month as budgeted.A purchase requisition authorised by the functional director is not required because the acquisitions were approved during the budgeting process. Robert normally places an order by emailing the supplier.However,if required by a supplier,he sends a letter,which he signs. As part of his remuneration package,Robert is entitled to bonus payments equivalent to 10%of any saving he can negotiate on budgeted costs.Consequently,assets are not necessarily purchased from the suppliers he contacted during the budgeting process. At the end of each month,Robert calculates his bonus entitlement,which he forwards to the managing director with a copy of the order documentation.The managing director reviews this against his copy of the budget before authorising the accounts department to pay the bonus as part of Robert's monthly salary. 本题核心知识点：Internal control-Test of control 题目类型：word Requirements: (a)In respect of the non-current asset purchasing system for Retta Kitchens Co: (i)Identify and explain FOUR deficiencies; (i)Recommend a control to address each of these deficiencies;and (iii)Describe a test of controlAnsari&Co would perform to assess whether each of these controls,if implemented,is operating effectively. Note:The total marks will be split equally between each part.(12 marks) 官方答案： 17 (a) RETTA KITCHENS co Non-current asset purchasing system Deficiencies Robert,the buyer,determines both the budgeted price for each capital expenditure, as well as the actual price paid when the purchase is completed.The capital expenditure budget could include inflated purchase prices in breach of the company's policy to include only lowest confirmed prices.This could lead to a false impression of the buyer's subsequent efficiency in acquiring assets at favourable prices. Non-current assets are acquired in months as budgeted irrespective of actual requirements,and without the specific request of the relevant functional director. This could result in an unnecessary drain on cash flow,non-utilisation of acquisitions and losses due to an inefficient acquisition policy. Control recommendations An approved supplier list should be compiled;this should consider the price of goods,their quality and the speed of delivery. Documentation showing that the buyer obtained cost estimates from a range of approved suppliers should be reviewed and authorised by the managing director before the lowest cost estimates are presented to the directors in December. Assets should be acquired only on the specific request of the relevant functional director.Signed purchase requisitions should be submitted to and authorised by the managing director stating the reason for the expenditure(e.g.as budgeted-old asset beyond economical repair).A copy of the requisition should be retained and matched with the subsequent purchase order(see below). Test of control Review a sample of cost estimates from suppliers and confirm that they are on the approved list and that the cost estimates were reviewed and authorised by the managing director. Review a sample of processed capital expenditure requisitions and confirm that they are signed by the relevant functional direction,specify the reason for purchase and authorised by the managing director. Deficiencies Newly acquired assets that are not put into immediate use may be exposed to a risk of theft,particularly if they are desirable and portable(e.g.laptop computers). The capital expenditure budget and approved acquisitions schedule do not address the control and disposal of assets replaced.If assets being replaced are not planned to be disposed of,the company could lose material sundry income. Orders are placed informally by email or letter.Without documentary evidence, there is an increased risk that deliveries of unauthorised assets may be accepted or that the accounts department will pay for them.Purchasing errors are also more likely(e.g.duplicating orders). The buyer's remuneration package could result in purchasing decisions that are not in Retta's best interests(e.g.buying an that they are fit for purpose.inferior mode at a cheaper price). that they are fit for purpose. Control recommendations Assets should only be acquired for the time they are to be used. A non-current asset register should be maintained to record all acquisitions, commencement of use and disposals of capital items. Planned disposals of assets to be replaced should be incorporated in the capital expenditure budgeting process to include approval and control over setting disposal prices and receiving disposal proceeds. The buyer should raise multi-part sequentially numbered purchase orders after the receipt of authorised purchase requisitions.One purchase order copy hgoouodl eecfoeirwavedrerat)oa thndeawanortehheorustoethe accounts department for checking against the goods received and the supplier's invoice.
