The bonus should only be authorised by the managing director after the relevant specified assets have been put into use andare fit for purpose.functional directors confirm that the specified assets have been put into use and are fit for purpose. Test of control Agree that the time between receipt of the asset and when it is put into use is minimal. Inspect the register for evidence of regular review by the managing director and checks being carried out(e.g.last inspection date/date of disposal). Review the capital expenditure budget to ensure that replaced assets are correctly identified,authorised for disposal,proceeds received and accounted for(including recording in the asset register). Review a sample of purchase orders for evidence of matching with authorised purchase requisitions,goods received notes, entry into the asset register,the supplier's invoice and payment(e.g.copies attached or referenced in a grid stamp). Review each monthly bonus entitlement calculation for evidence that the managing functional directors that the acquired assetsdirector has received confirmation from functional directors that the acquired assets 得分标准： 17 (a) Marks Retta Kitchens Co Control deficiencies,recommendations and tests of controls 3 B 3 3 3(only 4 issues required) 3 B 3 3 3 Capital expenditure budgeting process Purchase requisitioning Newly-acquired assets Purchase ordering Buyer's remuneration (V2 mark for each deficiency identified+1V mark for explanation +1 mark for relevant recommendation +1 mark for appropriate test of control) Marks 12 知识点标签：Syllabus CInternal control-Tests of controls-Non-current assets 难易程度： 难
explanation_zh: 本题属于考察内部控制测试的常规题型，但是由于出现Non-current asset 的题目较少， 所以难度还是比较大的。题目问法以三步走的方式，即找缺陷，给建议，做测试，答题时需 注意明确列示。要求需列出4个缺陷，答题量适中，但是要注意对内控缺陷的分析部分， 一 定要列示其负面影响，再给出相应的改进建议，然后站在审计师的角度做出其运行有效性的 测试。 答案一： Non-current asset purchasing system Deficiencies Robert,the buyer,determines both the budgeted price for each capital expenditure, as well as the actual price paid when the purchase is completed.The capital expenditure budget could include inflated purchase prices in breach of the company's policy to include only lowest confirmed prices.This could lead to a false impression of the buyer's subsequent efficiency in acquiring assets at favourable prices. Control recommendations An approved supplier list should be compiled;this should consider the price of goods,their quality and the speed of delivery. Documentation showing that the buyer obtained cost estimates from a range of approved suppliers should be reviewed and authorised by the managing director before the lowest cost estimates are presented to the directors in December. Test of control Review a sample of cost estimates from suppliers and confirm that they are on the approved list and that the cost estimates were reviewed and authorised by the managing director. 解析： 这个缺陷是说，如果单独由采购员Robert 一个人负责决定采购资产的预算，那当实际花费 的金额超出预算时，可能会判定为采购员的能力和效率不足，但实际原因可能是由于商品价 格的正常上涨。所以建议公司应该建立起授权供应商制度，同时考虑价格，质量，发货速度 等因素，并对资产采购成本做出合理估计。对此，审计师则可以通过抽样的方式，确认所选 择的供应商是否在授权供应商名录中，成本估计的合理性，以及是否有相应的复核审批。 答案二： Non-current assets are acquired in months as budgeted irrespective of actual requirements,and without the specific request of the relevant functional director. This could result in an unnecessary drain on cash flow,non-utilisation of acquisitions and losses due to an inefficient acquisition policy. Assets should be acquired only on the specific request of the relevant functional director.Signed purchase requisitions should be submitted to and authorised by the managing director stating the reason for the expenditure(e.g.as budgeted-old asset beyond economical repair).A copy of the requisition should be retained and matched with the subsequent purchase order(see below). Review a sample of processed capital expenditure requisitions and confirm that they are signed by the relevant functional direction,specify the reason for purchase and authorised by the managing director. 解析 对于固定资产采购的决定，只考虑预算的规定而不考虑部门和公司的实际需求，这可能会导 致公司购进一些并不需要的资产，造成不必要的损失影响现金流。所以建议公司在采购固定 资产之前，要实际考虑部门需求，可以由相应职能部门先提出采购申请，有管理层审批后， 在进行具体采购操作。对此，审计师可以抽取一些采购申请的样本，审核其是否有经过严格 的审批流程，确保公司购买的是真正需要的资产。 答案三： that the accounts department will pay for that the accounts department will pay for Deficiencies Newly acquired assets that are not put into immediate use may be exposed to a risk of theft,particularly if they are desirable and portable(e.g.laptop computers). Control recommendations Assets should only be acquired for the time they are to be used. A non-current asset register should be maintained to record all acquisitions, commencement of use and disposals of capital items. Test of control Agree that the time between receipt of the asset and when it is put into use is minimal. Inspect the register for evidence of regular review by the managing director and checks being carried out(e.g.last inspection date/date of disposal). 解析： 新购进资产未及时使用，这一缺陷可能会导致资产被偷盗遗失损毁等，尤其对于像是笔记本 电脑这类的资产。所以建议公司要在真正需要资产的时间再进行购买，不要提前购买。对此， 审计师可以查阅资产的接收日期和开始使用的日期，审核是否间隔极短， 答案四： The capital expenditure budget and approved acquisitions schedule do not address the control and disposal of assets replaced.If assets being replaced are not planned to be disposed of,the company could lose material sundry income. Planned disposals of assets to be replaced should be incorporated in the capital expenditure budgeting process to include approval and control over setting disposal prices and receiving disposal proceeds. Review the capital expenditure budget to ensure that replaced assets are correctly identified,authorised for disposal,proceeds received and accounted for(including recording in the asset register). 解析： 资本支出预算未完全考虑被替换资产的处置问题，如果被替换的资产还有较高的使用价值， 则会造成公司的相关损失。所以建议公司在制定预算时，应当充分考虑被替换资产的处置情 况，并经过公司的严格审批。对此，审计师应该符合客户的资本支出预算和被替换资产的处 置情况。 答案五： Orders are placed informally by email or letter.Without documentary evidence, unauthorised assets may be accepted orthere is an increased risk that deliveries of unauthorised assets may be accepted or them.Purchasing errors are also more likely(e.g.duplicating orders). The buyer should raise multi-part sequentially numbered purchase orders after the receipt of authorised purchase requisitionsOne purchase order copy hgoouodl eecfoeirwavedrerat)oa thndeawanortehheorustoethe accounts department for checking against the goods received and the supplier's invoice. Review a sample of purchase orders for evidence of matching with authorised purchase requisitions,goods received notes, entry into the asset register,the supplier's invoice and payment(e.g.copies attached or referenced in a grid stamp). 解析： 采购订单没有经过正式的书面确认，而是通过电子邮件，所以可能导致公司接收未经批准的 资产，并支付钱款。所以建议公司制作一式多份的采购订单，给到仓库和财务部门。对此审 计师可以抽取一些采购订单的样本，去比对到采购需求单，收货单，发票等，确保采购需求 的真实。 答案六： The buyer's remuneration package could result in purchasing decisions that are not in Retta's best interests(e.g.buying an inferior model at a cheaper price). The bonus should only be authorised by the managing director after the relevant specified assets have been put into use andthat they are fit for purpose.functional directors confirm that the specified assets have been put into use and that they are fit for purpose. Review each monthly bonus entitlement calculation for evidence that the managing functional directors that the acquired assetsare fit for purpose.director has received confirmation from functional directors that the acquired assets are fit for purpose. 高顿教育 解析： 对于采购员Robert 的薪酬设定，可能对公司的利益造成损害。所以建议采购的资产，在真 正投入使用并符合公司实际需求后，再向采购员支付奖金。对此审计师可以查阅审核采购员 的奖金支付流程，看是否又经过严格的审批确认。 (b)Explain how a non-current assets register,if properly maintained,may be used by Retta Kitchen's Co to facilitate control over non-current assets.(5 marks) 官方答案： (b) Non-current asset register Retta's non-current asset register should provide an up-to-date record of all non-current assets owned by the company.The format of the register should allow for the groups of assets(e.g.factory plant and equipment,vehicles and office furniture)as reflected in the company's general ledger,to be identified by individual asset such that at any point in time reference may be made to individual assets as appropriate. Typically,the register should record date of acquisition,expected useful life,cost, depreciation and carrying amount with identifying details(e.g.serial number)and location of asset.Such information should provide management with the means of maintaining control over the use,safe custody and replacement of assets,some of which will be transportable,valuable and desirous and by their nature possibly subject to misuse or misappropriation. The register should be updated by individuals who are separated from the acquisition, custody and disposal of assets.In order to maintain effective control,it is important that checks be carried out regularly:from the register to assets(to ensure existence and condition)and from assets to the register (to ensure completeness of recording).These checks should be performed by a responsible individual,who is independent from the acquisition custodian,disposal and recording functions. Any discrepancies and damage noted when checking must be brought to management's attention and promptly investigated with appropriate follow up action. 得分标准： (b) Non-current assets register max 21 max 2max 2Description of structure/contents max 2 1 max 2 max 2 Management's responsibility(e.g.safe custody) Maintaining(who,frequency) Checking(existence,completeness) max 5 知 识 点 标 签：Syllabus D Audit evidence-The audit of specific items-evidence in relation to non-current assets 难易程度： 难 解 析：该题目考察的内容和方向在以往的AA 真题中并不多见，主要是探讨关于固定资产注 册表的用途，更多的是会计实务操作的知识。固定资产注册表作为记录固定资产相关事项的 明细账目，其登记的内容包括，固定资产的名称，编码，采购日期，采购价格，折旧方法， 使用年限，采购的历史成本，残值，累计折旧，账面净值等等一系列关键信息，所以是帮助 审计师进行固定资产科目审计的关键证据，也是公司自身进行固定资产管理的关键账目。所 以对于被审计客户公司来说，可以利用固定资产注册表来明确固定资产的基本情况，用途， 管理责任，日常维护，以及检查资产状态等等，是绝对不能忽视的重要数据汇总。 (c)Describe the substantive procedures to be carried out to obtain sufficient appropriate audit evidence over the completeness of non-current asset disposals. (3 marks) 官方答案： Tutorial note: The requirement was only for completeness.Any tests based on valuation, accuracy and cash proceeds will not earn marks. Obtain a schedule of non-current asset disposals by category. Cast the schedule and agree the total to the general ledger and the financial statements(including disclosures). Incorporate the testing of this schedule for completeness of disposals with the audit test for existence. Select a sample of material items to test for existence from opening balances plus additions for the year.For items that cannot be found,agree their inclusion in the schedule of disposals. If not on the schedule,identify and verify that the item was disposed of after the year end (and note on the Matters for Attention of Next Year's Audit schedule).If no evidence is available of post-year-end disposal,discuss with management why the asset cannot be accounted for and that the list of disposals is understated. Tutorial note: Marks will be awarded to candidates who use the asset register as the basis for their sample selection provided detail is given on testing the completeness and accuracy of the asset register. 得分标准： (c) Disposals Work on schedulemx2Detail as part of existence testing After-date sale Work on schedule mx2 max 3 知 识 点 标 签：Syllabus D Audit evidence-The audit of specific items-evidence in relation to non-current assets 难易程度： 易 解 析：此题考查的是对于固定资产科目的实质性审计程序，属于比较常规的题型，题目要求 从完整性认定的角度出发，对资产的处置进行实质性程序设计。可以从账账核对的角度，以 处置明细核对至固定资产整体的明细账，也可以从实到账的通过实际交易凭证来验证处置情 况账面记录的完整，还可以通过分析性程序等方式来进行验证，只要言之有理，切合题目要 求即可。每步审计程序能得到1分，所以共须写出3步审计程序。

stem_zh: Q18 It is 1 July 20X5.Poehler Co(Poehler)is a long established building renovations company and prepares its annual financial statements to 30 April.The financial statements for the year ended 31 May 20X5 include the following account balances,together with comparatives for the previous year: Account balances 31 May 20X5 31 May 20X4 Allowance Accounts Accruals Provision for irrecoverable debts payable 56,000 315,000 37,800 81,000 18,900 205,200 63,000 The provision of$81,000 relates to a legal obligation to carry out repairs to a public building damaged by employees of Poehler when renovating an adjoining building.Poehler's reported pretax profit for the year ended 31 May 20X5 was $990,000. 本题核心知识点： Audit evidence-Substantive procedure 题目类型：word Requirements: (a)For each of the account balances set out above,describe substantive procedures that the auditor should perform to confirm the completeness assertion and the accuracy,valuation and allocation assertion.(16 marks) 官方答案： Allowance for irrecoverable debts its make-up(e.g.expected credit losses on specific customers'accounts and aAgree the total($56,000)of the loss allowance to underlying working papers to a max of Provision 16 知识点标签：syllabus D audit evidence-D2 audit procedures-substantive procedures for obtaining audit evidence 难易程度： 中 解 析：这道题目考查了对于四个不同科目的实质性程序。 首先是关于坏账准备的实质性程序。由于坏账准备是资产类备抵科目，因此更容易存在的风 险是低估，并且涉及到金额，所以在实质性程序中，可以使用的审计程序有 “agree total” 加 总坏账准备的总金额、检查客户的还款意愿、通过分析性程序去比较两个年度的坏账准备、 检查长账龄报告、检查应收账款的期后收款情况、以及运用CAAT程序对于应收账款进行 分析。 第二个科目的考察是关于应付账款的。和大部分负债类科目相同的是，也是更容易存在低估 的风险。所以在此，可以执行的审计程序有： 检查应付账款的金额总数、 检查应付账款的对 高顿教育 账单、做实质性分析程序去比较今年和去年的应收账款波动情况从而进行差异分析、随机去 抽选一些应收账款进行发函、检查应收账款的截止日期、对于那些没有GRN 匹配的应付账 款，查明情况、检查应付账款的期后付款状况、检查应付账款的控制账户、使用CAAT程 序对于应付账款进行核对，识别非常规交易 第三个科目考察的是accruals。可以采用加总金额去核对数值上的准确性、通过比较两年的 差异去做分析性程序，检查利润表中的金额去核对总数、检查费用的金额去确认是否计提准 确、使用CAAT去加总费用，并且和以前年度进行比较、对存在重大差异的，与管理层进 行询问和讨论原因 第四个科目考察的是预计负债。因为题目中提到了预计负债的金额，所以要对预计负债的金 额准确性进行检查、还有相关的往来信函、董事会当中有关该预计负债的讨论、与律师发询 证函确认目前的负债的状态、和管理层讨论该项预计负债。 这道题主要考察了负债类的各种实质性程序，通常来说负债类的科目比较多的是存在被低估 的可能性，所以这里面的几个科目是比较类似的，通过查金额加总等，做分析性程序，以及 一些外部函证去做实质性程序的 。 (b)(i)Explain why an auditor may decide NOT to carry out a direct confirmation of accounts payable; and (2 marks) (ii)Identify TWO situations when such a direct confirmation may be deemed appropriate. (2 marks) 官 方 答 案： (b) Direct confirmation of accounts payable i) Why auditor may decide NOT to carry out appropriate audit evidence and the requirement to complete the audit on a timely andAn auditor must achieve a balance between the requirement to obtain sufficient appropriate audit evidence and the requirement to complete the audit on a timely and economic basis. economic basis. Third party evidence is a good source of audit evidence and a large proportion of the documentation available when auditing trade payables is produced by third parties(e.g. suppliers'invoices,statements and correspondence). Consequently,in the normal course of events,provided there is sufficient appropriate audit evidence available from other sources,the auditor may decide that there is no need to carry out a direct confirmation of suppliers(trade payables). (ii) Appropriate situations ● Required suppliers'statements are,for whatever reason,unavailable. · The auditor considers the understatement of trade payables to be a high risk. · Only copies(not originals)of suppliers'statements are available and there is some doubt about their authenticity. · The auditor or the company suspects fraudulent manipulation of payments to suppliers. · The auditor is of the opinion that controls over the company's purchases system are not operating effectively. 得分标准： (i) Why auditor may decide not to carry out(b) Direct confirmation of accounts payable (i) Why auditor may decide not to carry out Generally up to 1 mark per point up to a max of 2 (ii) Two situations when appropriate Generally 1 mark each example to a max of 2 4 —— 知识点标签：syllabus D audit evidence-D2 audit procedures-substantive procedures for obtaining audit evidence 难易程度：难 答案
explanation_zh: 本题并非常规会考查到审计师获得询证函的程序，而是在讲审计师为何不去做函 证。这里所考察到的就是发函的成本问题。审计师执行审计程序也需要考虑经济效益，正常 情况下，如果涉及的应付账款金额比较大，性质比较重要，属于material 的，那么审计师就 应该去进行函证，但是反之，如果金额比较小，并且性质不重大，那么审计师就可以选择不 函证/替代性审计程序。 第二小问，列出几种情形必须函证的。第一种是无法获取供应商对账单的，这种情况下函证 作为替代性审计程序，是必须要去做的。第二种，是审计师认为应付账款有很大风险被低估， 在这种情况下，因为风险高，所以需要通过函证的形式来获取审计证据(这种来自外部的第 三方的函证，可靠性最强),第三种情况是只能获得供应商对账单的复印件版本，由于复印 件版本的可靠性比较低，因此需要外部函证的可靠性对这个证据进行加强。第四种情况是可 能存在潜在的舞弊行为，这种时候，由于属于高风险，因此需要外部函证。最后一种是审计 师认为关于采购系统的控制是无效的，因此无法依赖内控，只能采用实质性程序。 高顿教育 MOCK2 Section A Case1 The following scenario relates to questions 1-5 It is 1 July 20X5.You are the audit manager for Angus Hotels Co(Angus),which runs a chain of eight four-star hotels.The audit senior has prepared an audit completion report for the year ended 31 March 20X5 in which he has noted three contentious issues requiring your attention: Food poisoning The Angus Premier Hotel received a solicitor's letter in April 20X5 claiming that the hotel was negligent in failing to ensure that the food provided at a business luncheon on 24 March 20X5 was “fit for consumption”.Many of the guests required hospitalisation because of food poisoning. The food had been provided by a specialist catering company,Delights Catering,whose staff, together with hotel staff,had prepared the lunch in the hotel kitchens.Angus's lawyers believe that although the claim against Angus will probably succeed,it will be offset by Angus's claim against Delights Catering for compensation. Storm damage The Angus Resort Hotel was severely damaged by a storm on 30 March 20X5.Fortunately,the hotel was empty at the time of the storm.In April 20X5,the company's insurers unconditionally agreed,in writing,to pay for the rebuilding of the hotel and its facilities in full, in accordance with the terms of the insurance contract. Bank overdraft The manager of the company's bank has just informed the board that the bank is unwilling to continue to provide Angus with an overdraft facility.This will place the company under considerable financial strain unless alternative funding can be raised within the next nine months. The senior considers this to be a material uncertainty and appropriate disclosure should be made. The draft financial statements as prepared by the client do not yet reflect these material issues. However,management's use of the going concern basis is appropriate. 1.Which of the following describes the auditor's responsibilities for the events that occurred after 31 March 20X5? A.To consider all events between the end of the reporting period and the date the financial statements are issued to shareholders B.To consider only material adjusting events that are required to be recognised in the financial statements before signing the auditor's report C.To respond appropriately to facts that become known only up to the date of the auditor's report that might lead to the amendment of the audit opinion D.To obtain sufficient appropriate evidence whether material events up to the date of the auditor's report have been appropriately reflected in the financial statements

stem_zh: 1. 答案：D 解 析 ： 本题考查ISA 560审计师对期后事项的责任，审计师对不同阶段的期后事项承担不同的责任。 高顿教育 期后事项分为三个时间段，三个重要的时间点分别是 F/S end date 财报截止日，audit report signed date审计报告签署日， financial report issue date 财报发行日。 选项A: 需将所有财务报表日至审计报告日发生的事项纳入考虑。 审计师只考虑重大的事项，所以该选项中考虑所有事项错误。 选项B: 只需要考虑审计报告日之前的重大调整事项。 审计师也需要考虑重大的非调整事项，所以该选项错误。 选项C, 仅对发生至审计报告日的事项且会导致审计意见调整的事项做出回应。 针对审计报告日后发生的事项，审计师也需做出回应，所以该选项错误。 选项D, 获取充分恰当的证据证明，是否审计报告日之前的事项都已经反映在财报上了。 针对财务报表日至审计报告日发生的事项，审计师要获取充分恰当的审计证据，所以该选项 正确 。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Syllabus E Review and reporting-EISubsequent events-The procedures for performing a subsequent events review 难易程度：易 2.In relation to the food poisoning,which TWO of the following treatments in the financial statement for the year ended 31 March 20X5 should,in combination,result in an unmodified audit opinion? (1)No adjustment to the financial statements as the claim was made in the following financial year (2)No adjustment to the financial statements as the claim can be offset against the claim against Delights Catering (3)Disclose the pending litigation against Angus Hotels Co in the notes to the financial statements (4)Disclose the claim against Delights Catering in the notes to the financial statements (5)Recognise the most likely damages to be paid to the guests in the financial statements (6)Recognise the most likely compensation to be received from Delights Catering in the financial statements
4. 答案：FALSE,TRUE,TRUE,TRUE。
explanation_zh: 本题考查管理层对可持续经营假设的责任，管理层需要对于企业是否可持续经营做出评估， 时间要求至少从财报截止日后12个月。 管理层必须向审计师提供，从财务报告日起算至少 12个月公司的现金预测。 错误，因为没有要求企业必须提供 现金流预测。 管理层必须考虑与所有现有信息相关的不确定事件 正确 管理层针对他们的未来计划应提供书面声明 正确 管理层必须预估他们在未来的12个月是否仍是持续 经营状态 正确 知 识 点 标 签 ： Syllabus E Review and reporting -E2 Going concern -The respective responsibilities of auditors and management regarding going concern 难易程度：中 5.The finance director has asked you to outline the appropriate audit opinions that will be provided depending on whether the disclosure made in Angus Hotel Co's financial statements for the year ended 31 March 20X5 about the going concern uncertainty is adequate or inadequate. Complete the following sentences by dragging and dropping the appropriate audit opinion. If the uncertainty is inadequately disclosed,our opinion will be Audit opinions Audit opinions adverse qualified “except for” unmodified with emphasis of matter paragraph unmodified qualified “except for”with emphasis ofmatter paragraph unmodified with a going concern section

stem_zh: 5. 答 案 ：unmodified with a going concern section;qualified “except for”。 解 析 ： 本题考查对可持续经营是否做出充分恰当披露对审计意见和审计报告的影响。 如果企业充分披露了其可持续经营的不确定性，那么审计报告的意见仍是无保留意见，但是 需要在基础意见段后加上与持续经营相关的重大不确定性段落。 如果企业没有充分披露其可持续经营的不确定性，由于目前的事项是重大且不广泛，那么审 计报告的意见是保留意见，在形成保留意见的基础段中，会添加except for 除 了XX 有错报 的表达语句。 知识点标签： Syllabus E Review and reporting-E2 Going concern -The reporting implications of the findings of going concern reviews 难易程度： 易 Case 2 The following scenario relates to questions 6-10 It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit senior assigned to a new client,Gravela Co.You have been asked to assist the audit manager in drafting an audit programme for non-current assets.The client has provided draft financial statements including the non-current asset note shown below: Land and buildings Plant and equipment Motor vehicles Robotic trucks Total Cost $000 $000 $000 $000 $000 (1)1 July 20X4 100 875 1,500 - 2,475 (2)Additions 10 125 525 995 1,655 (3) Disposals - (100) (325) - (425) 30 June 20X5 110 900 1,700 995 3,705 Depreciation (4) 1 July 20X5 60 550 750 1,360 (5) Expense 2 180 425 199 806 (6)Disposals (80) (325) (405) 30 June 20X5 62 650 850 199 1,761 Carrying amount 30 June 20X5 48 250 850 796 1,944 Carrying amount 30 June 20X6 40 325 750 - 1,115 6.Which THREE of the following documents and procedures are required to establish whether the preconditions for the audit of Gravela Co's financial statements for the year ended 30 June 20X5 are present? A.Audit strategy B.Work programmes C.Engagement letter D.Discussions with management and those charged with governance E.Understanding the entity's reporting requirements F.Written representations G.Completion of internal control evaluation questionnaires
8. 答案：Occurrence,Accuracy,Completeness,Classification
explanation_zh: 本题考察的是与固定资产新增相关的认定。 题干表明，从固定资产新增账目中选取一些样本进行测试。 第一项，将样本核对至固定资产收货单和采购发票，即账上记录的实际都发生了，从账到实， 体现的是发生性。 第二项，将固定资产采购的金额，税务处理，描述以及金额分配与采购发票上的信息进行核 对，保证数据的准确性。 第三项，将固定资产新增账目核对至固定资产总账，检查是否有遗漏，从明细加总核对到总 账，确认的是完整性。 第四项，检查费用科目，保证应该资本化计入资产的部分没有错误地记录到利润表中，费用 和资产分类正确，确认的是分类认定。 知识点标签：Syllabus DAudit evidence-D4.The audit of specific items-evidence in relation to non-current assets 难易程度： 易 9.Having reviewed the depreciation method for motor vehicles management has decided to change it in the financial statements for the year ended 30 June 20X5 from a straight-line basis over four years to 40%on the reducing balance.A full year's depreciation is charged on acquisitions and none in the year of disposal under both methods. The draft financial statements show profit before tax of S2.2 million.Complete the following sentence to correctly summarise the effect of the change. The change is and profit and assets will Materiality Financial statement impact material decrease not material increase

stem_zh: 9. 答案：not material,decrease
explanation_zh: 本题考察的是折旧方法的变更以及对重要性的判断。 管理层希望将车辆的折旧方式从直线法(折旧年限为四年)变为40%余额递减法，购买当年 折旧全额计提，处置当年不计提。 直线法下计提折旧的计算为原值/折旧年限，即每年计提等额折旧。 直线法下折旧计算：1700/4=425 余额递减法下计提折旧的计算，是用当年的账面价值乘以给定的折旧率40%,由于资产累计 折旧的增加，账面价值逐渐减少，因此折旧费用也是逐年递减的。 本期motor vehicles的原值为1700,累计折旧=期初累计折旧750-本年处置转出折旧325=425, 应注意这里不考虑表格里本期计提的折旧425,因为这是在直线法口径下计算的折旧，而此 处需更改为余额递减法，重新计算当期折旧费用。 余额递减法下折旧计算(账面价值*折旧率):(1700-(750-325))*40%=510 折旧方法变更后，折旧费用增加了510-425=85折旧费用变更占PBT 的 比 例 为 85/2,200=3.9%<5%,因此是不重大的。 折旧费用增加，固定资产账面价值减少，总资产减少。 知识点标签：Syllabus DAudit evidence-D4.The audit of specific items-depreciation 难易程度：难 10.The robotic trucks are self-driving.They have been shown as a separate category because of their specialised nature. Which of the following correctly summarises the audit procedures to be carried out on the depreciation expense for the robotic trucks for the year ended 30 June 20X5? A.Discuss with management,compare the useful life with similar assets in comparable companies and recalculate the depreciation expense B.Accept management's estimate of useful life,recalculate the depreciation expense and obtain a written representation supporting their estimate C.Ask management to obtain an expert's opinion to support their estimate of the expected useful life and depreciation expense calculation D.Obtain evidence from an auditor's expert.

stem_zh: 15. 答案：Self-interest and intimidation;report to those charged with governance.
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是道德威胁相关知识点。 如果修改了内部信息，会直接导致哪些道德威胁，并且最好的应对措施是什么? 首先会导致Self-interest threat, 因为如果不听从财务总监的话，可能会丢失掉工作，所 以出于自身利益考虑会影响到作为内审的独立性，并且是财务总监指使，属于管理层人 物，作为内审也会感受到压力，会产生 intimidation threat迫于压力的威胁。 advocacy threat 过度推介威胁未在此处体现，题目中没有说站在其他的立场去做推荐，故 不选； 面对这种情况，最好的解决办法是汇报给治理层，让治理层知晓并解决。不到万不得已 是不会辞职 (resign) 的，更不能直接同意财务总监的要求去签署内控记录sign off the internal records。 故本题答案为Self-interest and intimidation 和 report to those charged with governance 知识点标签： Syllabus A.Audit framework and regulation-4.Professional ethics -The threats to the fundamental principles 难易程度：中

stem_zh: Q16 This scenario relates to three requirements. You are the audit senior of Wicket Co,a company which manufactures high-class furniture. Wicket Co employs 200 weekly-paid employees comprising upholsterers,carpenters,joiners and general labourers.All employees are paid directly by bank transfer. The payroll is processed using a desktop computer which stores the payroll program,standing (master file)and transactions data relating to employees.On completion of payroll processing, the data is copied onto a removable hard drive which is stored in one of the filing cabinets in the accounts office. Hours worked are recorded on electronic clock cards.Each card is embossed with the employee's name,department,employee number and photo.The card contains a chip for storing data and requires a unique PIN to be entered each time the card is used.Employees clock in and out on arrival at and departure from the premises.This process is not supervised. At the end of each week,the factory manager,Mr Lamb,gives the accounts supervisor,Mrs Gooch,the clock cards for that week and collects processed clock cards,prepared by Mrs Gooch,for the following week.Mrs Gooch (from the clock cards)prints out a detailed summary showing for each employee the hours worked (split between basic and overtime) with departmental sub-totals and factory total.The printout is passed to Miss Smith,the payroll clerk,who enters the individual employee hours into the computer.The figures for gross and net pay are calculated by the program and the following reports are generated: Payroll: details per employee of gross pay,deductions and net pay;departmental and factory totals thereof and total hours split between basic and overtime; Summary: cumulative details to date per employee; Payslips: details of gross pay,deductions and net pay; Payment list: bank account details,net pay per employee and total net pay. The finance director,Mr Lewis,signs the payroll bank transfer after agreeing it to the total net pay on the payment list and passes the transfer to the managing director,Mr Stewart,who countersigns it. Mr Lamb gives a list detailing starters and leavers to Miss Smith,who enters these changes into the computer as and when the situation arises.She uses the same password as for payroll preparation even though there is a facility within the software for hierarchical passwords.Miss Smith then files the list with the personnel records in her filing cabinet. Your enquiries about the system indicate that there are no relevant procedures or controls other than those described above. Requirements: (a)In respect of the system of internal control of Wicket Co: (i)Identify and explain SIX deficiencies; (ii)Recommend a control to address each of these deficiencies;and (iii)Describe a test of control the auditor would perform to assess whether each of these controls, if implemented,is operating effectively. (18 marks) 本题核心知识点： Internal control-Test of control 题目类型：word 官方答案： (与下方解析放在一起) 得分标准： 16 (a) Wicket Co Deficiencies Generally 1 mark for explanation,1 mark for recommendation,1 mark for test of control.Six matters required max 18 Ideas clocking in/out overtime completeness/accuracy of data entry password backup starters/leavers overall supervision personnel records security of records CInternal control-3.Tests of controls-The payroll system知识点标签：Syllabus CInternal control-3.Tests of controls-The payroll system 难易程度：难

In either case,a security log should be maintained to record who has reviewed the process,date,time,any issues and action taken. (IiI) Test of control The log(and recordings if made)should be reviewed to see that reasonable observation is taken on any issues noted.Actual observationcarried out each week and action has been taken on any issues noted.Actual observation course of the audit. Review the computer logs to identify that regular password changes are made and that the password structure is hierarchical. Deficiency: 目前只有一个密码，当所有人都可以使用一个密码时会导致标准数据被 破坏或数据丢失。 Recommend: 应该设置不同层级的密码，并定期对密码进行更改。且应该用电脑记 录相关的密码更改。 TOC: 复核电脑记录以确保密码有定期更改，且密码分为不同层级。 (vii) 答案7: · Backup procedures are inadequate as the removable hard drive is not kept secure and could be lost/damaged. If the data is lost/damaged,its retrieval would be costly and time-consuming in the absence of the hard drive. The removable hard drive should be stored securely,in a fireproof safe,outside the accounts office.Ideally,backup should be made to a cloud security provider. Review the backup procedures to ensure that they are adequate,that(if used)the removable hard drive has been stored in a secure location. Select a sample of computer logs and review to ensure that regular backup is made to the cloud server(if used). Deficiency: 备份程序不完全，如：移动硬盘没有被很好的保护起来。如果硬盘丢失 会导致数据丢失，重新找回数据，会费时费力。 Recommend: 移动硬盘应该被安全保护起来，如：防火的保险箱。最理想的情况是， 最好有一个云存储。 TOC: 复核备份程序，以确保其是足够的，移动硬盘被放在了安全的地方。并复核 电脑记录，确保相关数据有定期云存储。 (viii) 答案8: · Standing data is adjusted for starters and leavers without authorisation. computer and agree to the original● Financial loss could result if: computer and agree to the original -new employees are taken on when idle time/spare capacity is available; - leavers are not removed and subsequently paid. Mr Lamb's list of starters and leaversshould be signed,as authorised,by Mr Mr Lamb's list of starters and leavers standing data amendments logged by theLewis.Mr Stewart should review all standing data amendments logged by the authorised input documents. Identify all starters and leavers from either personnel records or comparison of a payrollat the beginning of the year with a payroll towards the end of the year. Select a sample of starters/leavers and agree details to Mr Lamb's list and the computer log that the correct treatment has been applied. Agree documentation has been appropriately authorised. Deficiency: 新加入的人和离职的人数据更改并不需要相关人员授权。这会导致经济 损失，如：在闲散的时候招聘新新员工；没有及时的移除离职员工，导致工资的继续 支付。 Recommend:Mr Lewis 应复核Mr Lamb先生的新员工与离职员工清单，并签名。并 且复核电脑上相关入职离职数据并与原文件核对。 TOC: 从薪资记录找到所有新员工与离职员工，并选取部分，将其与新员工与离职 员工清单核对以确保相关电脑记录已正确处理。并检查其是否有复核记录。 (ix)答案9: (ix) Review the authorised list of starters and levels as part of the starters/leavers test above.A copy of the authorised list of starters and leavers should be given to Mrs Goochweekly before she prepares clock cards.·Mrs Gooch is not noified promptly of starters and leavers and may therefore prepare Review the authorised list of starters and levels as part of the starters/leavers test above. A copy of the authorised list of starters and leavers should be given to Mrs Gooch weekly before she prepares clock cards. inaccurate clock cards. ● A new starter may work without a clock card making it impossible to check their hours. · A leaver's clock card may be used by another employee causing a leaver to be paid. Deficiency:Mrs Gooch 没有被及时告知新员工和离职员工，这会导致工时记录不正 确，如：新员工没有打卡的工时卡；离职员工卡被他人误用，而导致薪资支付错误 Recommend: 新员工和离职员工的清单应及提前一周给到Mrs Gooch, 这样她可以 正确的准备打卡的工时卡 TOC: 检查相关人员的清单是否有及时给到Mrs Gooch (x)Review the budgets prepared by Mr Lamb and Mr Stewart.Obtain evidence of the monthly costs being compared with budget and答案10: (x) Review the budgets prepared by Mr Lamb and Mr Stewart.Obtain evidence of the monthly costs being compared with budget and There is no overall supervision of the payroll function.Financial loss may result from: -undetected(and therefore uncorrected) overpayments; -absence of monitoring hours worked,idle time,overtime,numbers of employees etc. The number of each category of employee should be budgeted by Mr Lamb and Mr variances followed up.Stewart.The actual monthly costs should be reviewed by Mr Lewiscompared with budget and variances followed up. variances followed up. Deficiency: 整个薪资系统无人检查，这会导致经济损失：如：未意识到的超额支付； 没有对正确工时进行检查如：休息时间，加班费，正确的员工数，会导致薪资支付 错误 Recommend: 每类员工都应有薪资预算。每类员工的实际薪资应与预算薪资相对比， 并复核差异原因。 TOC: 检查相关预算，并复核实际薪资与预算薪资相对比检查的记录 (xi)答案11: (xi) Lewis.He should check periodically the· No independent personnel records are kept outside the payrollfunction. Lewis.He should check periodically the Payroll errors may go undetected if personnel records are not kept up to date and checked (e.g.if a leaver is not removed from the payroll). changes should initially be kept by MrPersonnel records and notifications and changes should initially be kept by Mr computer standing data against these records. Ideally,the company should consider employing a human resources manager. Agree that personnel records are held by Mr Lamb(and no longer Miss Smith). Obtain a number of computer dumps of payroll records and compare to the records held by Mr Lamb to ensure they agree. Deficiency: 薪资部门之外没有人保存或复核相关薪资记录，那么薪资记录出错的时 候其他部门可能是不知晓的。 Recommend: 最开始薪资记录可以由Mr Lewis 保存，他可以定期检查电脑数据和原 始记录之间的差异，但是后续应聘用人力资源经理。 TOC: 复 核Mr Lewis 保存的薪资记录，以检查电脑中的记录是否与原始记录一致。 (xii) 答案12: · Personnel records are kept by the payrollclerk in a filing cabinet that also contains other records. · Staff looking for other records may gain relating to other employees(e.g.details ofunauthorised access to confidential details relating to other employees(e.g.details of maintenance payments). · Personnel records should be kept by Mr Lewis,not with files in the payroll office. ● As noted above,ideally a human resources manager should be employed to set up and run the HR function. Agree that Miss Smith is no longer maintaining personnel recordsFor the sample of starters/leavers,agree all details to the records held by Mr Lewis. Deficiency: 薪资个人记录与其他记录保存在一起，当其他的员工查找资料时，会看 到薪资资料，这样薪资记录就没有保密性了 Recommend: 薪资记录应由Mr Lewis 保存，与其他资料分开保管。如以上说的，可 以让HR 部分，负责人事部分 TOC: 检查文件是否有分开保管。如果Miss Smith不再保管个人记录了。所有的新 员工和离职员工要及时和Mr Lewis的记录核对。 (b)Define audit software and describe how it could be used in auditing payroll system.(5 marks) 本题核心知识点： Audit evidence-Automated tools and techniques 题目类型：word Wicket Co's current 官方答案： Audit software Audit software is any computer program that is used in the audit process.It may be as simple as a word processor(or a spreadsheet)or specifically designed as a database management system with inbuilt audit facilities. Its prime use is to process data,independent of the firm's system,in order to check that the processing,analysing and reporting functions of the client's system are functioning as intended(e.g.reperformance tests and re-analysis of information).It willalso be used by the auditor to facilitate substantive testing,substantive analytical review and data analytics. In the context of Wicket,where the payroll system is operated on a desktop system,it will be easy for the data to be downloaded to the internal auditor's laptop for analysis. Typical data analysis would include: · Identifying starters and leavers and agreeing details to independent records and for physical verification of the existence of new employees. · Identifying all employees that have been paid overtime for verification to independent supporting documentation. · Recalculation of gross pay,net pay and deductions for confirmation to amounts posted within the general ledger and transfers to the bank and tax authorities. · Rolling analytical review(week by week)to identify unusual variations to be investigated. 得分标准： (b) Audit software 1 mark each relevant point up to the maximum indicated max 5 Ideas definition use - - starters/leavers overtime - recalculations - analytical procedures 知识点标签： Syllabus DAudit evidence-5.Automated tools and techniques-The use of automated tools and techniques 难易程度：中 解析： 本题是解释审计软件，以及举例审计软件针对企业的相关运用。 定义：审计软件是在审计过程中使用的计算机程序。它可能是简单如文字处理器(或电子表 格)或专门设计为数据库内置审计功能的管理系统。 它的主要用途是处理独立于公司系统的数据，以便检查客户系统的处理、分析和报告功能如 预期在运行(例如，重新测试和重新分析信息)。它也将被用于审核员促进实质性程序，分 析性程序和数据分析。 ● 在 Wicket 公司，确定新入职者和离职者，并核对记录，以及线下确认新员工的存在。 ● 确认所有被支付加班费的员工都有相关的支持性文档 ● 重新计算薪酬总额、净额及扣减额，并与总账，银行和税务机关核对。 ● 滚动分析(每周),以确定不寻常的变化并调查。 (c)Mr Stewart has informed you that he is considering outsourcing the payrollsystem. Explain the impact that outsourcing the payroll system to a service provider would have on the planning of the audit.(7 marks) 本题核心知识点： Audit evidence-The work of others 题目类型：word 官方答案： Service provider ISA 402 Audit Considerations Relating to Entities Using Service Organizations deals with the user auditor's responsibility to obtain sufficient appropriate audit evidence when a client uses a service organisation. The user auditor is required: · To obtain an understanding of the services provided and their effect on the client's system of internal control,sufficient to identify and assess the risks of material misstatement;and · To design and perform audit procedures responsive to those risks. Where control activities are at the service organisation,the user auditor must still evaluate their design and determine whether they have been implemented If the involvement of the service organisation is considered significant,the user auditor must understand the service organisation's business,its environment and controls.Where appropriate,the auditor must consider the approach to test the effectiveness of the controls. To understand the effect of outsourcing the payroll to a service organisation,the auditor must consider,for example: · The nature and materiality of the transactions processed(in this case,routine weekly payroll),the financial reporting processes and assertions affected. · The controls that willbe exercised by Wicket over the service provider's processes and monitoring of its activities (e.g.input/output controls to ensure completeness, accuracy,validity). · User and/or technical manuals that the service organisation provides to the client. · Experience of the service provider(if used by other audit clients). As part of obtaining an understanding of the service provider's control system,the auditor should obtain an assurance regarding its design and implementation(a Type 1 report). From the detail provided,it is highly unlikely that the payroll system will be considered as anything other than low risk.Wicket should be able to implement sufficient controls over data entry and reconciliation to the payroll services provided. 得分标准： (c) Service provider 1 mark each relevant point up to the maximum indicated max 7 __ __Ideas __ __ - - ISA 402 impact on system of internal controls significance of activities risk of material misstatements planning considerations -nature of services provided -controls operated by Wicket -other(e.g.manuals/experience) Type 1 Conclusion 知识点标签：Syllabus D Audit evidence-6.The work of others-The audit considerations relating to entities using service organisations 难易程度： 难 高顿教盲 BoL pcAToN 解 析： 本题是解释如果企业将薪资外包，其对审计的影响是： 首先审计师需要针对外包取得充分恰当的审计证据 ● 了解所提供的服务及其内控对客户的影响，了解的程度需足以识别和评估重大风险错 报； ● 针对这些风险设计和执行审计程序。 当控制在外包商处时，审计师还需要了解其内控，并评估其设计和内控的执行。如果外包的 科目较重大，还必须了解外包机构的业务、环境和控制。恰当的时候，审计还要考虑测试控 制的有效性。 为了了解外包的薪资，审计师要了解： ● 交易的性质和其重要性，相关的财报处理过程以及影响的相关认定 ● Wicket实施的相关控制及如何监管相关活动 ● 外包机构提供的用户手册 ● 服务提供者的经验 为了解服务商的控制系统，审计师还可以获取type 1 report. 总之，工资系统不太可能被认为是低风险。 Wicket 应该为工资系统的数据输入和核对提供 足够的控制。 高顿教育

stem_zh: Q17 This scenario relates to two requirements. You are an audit manager in ASD&Co responsible for the audit of Five Dock Co,a public listed company.Five Dock Co researches,develops,designs and manufactures bespoke engineering solutions in solar power generation.The company employs 150 people on two sites;the research and development team and head office staff are located on one site and the manufacturing and engineering facilities on the other.The company uses state-of-the-art windows-based computer technology in its design and manufacturing processes including firm-wide integrated management and finance systems that allow any of the directors to “drill down”to the minutest detail of their function. You have attended,along with the engagement partner,a series of separate audit planning meetings with the finance director and the audit committee of Five Dock Co and are now reviewing your notes in order to produce the audit strategy and plan for the December year end. During the year,on the recommendation of its non-executive Chairman,Five Dock Co has invested a substantial amount in the shares of Burwood,a private alternative energy company, of which the Chairman is managing director and major shareholder. Development project 21A is behind schedule.Unexpected problems have emerged that will substantially increase the cost of the development and the production cost of the new product; this may negatively affect its future use.$1,200,000 of development cost was recognised as an asset in the statement of financial position for the previous year.A further $150,000 has been spent so far this year.The original budget was for a total of$900,000 development expenditure. In order to encourage performance,a bonus scheme has been introduced for senior management.In total,25%of the company's reported profits before tax in excess of the previous period's profits will be set aside to provide for bonuses.No bonus will be paid if profits do not exceed the previous period. Ever since the incorporation of Five Dock Co(six years ago)the audit committee has never considered it necessary to have an internal audit function,this role being undertaken on an ad-hoc basis by departmental managers.Because of pressure from several corporate investors, an independent internal audit function reporting directly to the audit committee was established during the year. During the year,Five Dock Co took out a substantial bank loan to finance investment in new projects.The loan agreement states that the company's gearing ratio (the proportion of loan capital to equity capital)must not exceed 30%.Any breach of the loan covenants would result in the loan being immediately repayable which would cause significant financial difficulties. Last year's financial statements had a gearing ratio of 20%and the management accounts for November show a gearing ratio of27%for the current year to date. Requirements: (a)Explain the purpose of the main contents of an audit strategy document and provide an example relevant to the audit of Five Dock Co for each of these contents. (8 marks) 本题核心知识点：Audit strategy 题 目 类 型：word 官 方 答 案： (a) Audit strategy document Purpose of main contents Understanding the entity's environment- Provides details of the industry in which the company operates and specific information about the activities and strategies of the individual client. Example Highly technical,competitor companies, expected growth and technological changes over the next few years. Accounting and internal control systems - Details of accounting policies of the client and previous assessments of the system of internal control indicating the expected extent of reliance on controls (if any). Risk assessment -The assessment of risk and the identification of significant auditfor the client and risk of fraud and error and the identification of significant audit areas and key audit matters for the areas and key audit matters for the auditor's report. Accounting policy for recognising income from customers-highly complex contracts. Planned reliance on computer-based systems for allaspects of Five Dock's business. Application of IFRS 15 Revenue from Contracts with Customers is likely to be a key audit matter in Five Dock. Materiality levels -The materiality levels for audit planning and performance purposes. Materiality at 5%for items of profit or loss. Performance materiality to be set by the partner using professional judgment. Nature,timing and extent of audit procedures -Details of the focus on audit work on specific areas.Detail on the extent of use of audit software and possible reliance on internal audit. Co-ordination,supervision and review of involvement of experts,client locations andstaffing requirements for the audit.work at the manufacturing location(e.g.audit work -Details the extent of involvement of experts,client locations and staffing requirements for the audit. work at the manufacturing location(e.g. Extensive use of CAATs to obtain sufficient, appropriate audit evidence. New internal audit function for this year. Need to assess if reliance can be placed on their work. head office,but some will need to carry outTwo locations -audit staff will be based at head office,but some will need to carry out non-current assets,inventory). Specialist IT systems auditors required to be part of the team. 得 分 标 准： (a) Audit strategy 1 mark each section of audit strategy document with purpose explained, 1 mark for the relevant example from scenario: max 8 Ideas - The entity's environment - Accounting and control systems - Risk and materiality - Nature,timing and extent of audit procedures Co-ordination,supervision and review 知识点标签：Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-6.Audit planning and documentation-The overall audit strategy and audit plan 难 易 程 度： 难 解 析： 题目分成两个部分， audit strategy 要包含要素的目的以及相应的举例，本题为8分， 一点 一分，故写4点目的以及举例即可。 答 案1: Purpose of main contents Understanding the entity's environment - Provides details of the industry in which the company operates and specific information about the activities and strategies of the individual client. Example Highly technical,competitor companies, expected growth and technological changes over the next few years.
explanation_zh: 通过提供公司所在行业的信息以及经营活动可以达到了解企业环境的目的 Example: 比如一些高科技和竞争对手公司，未来几年的增长以及科技方面的变动 答案2: Accounting and internal control systems - Accounting policy for recognising income Details of accounting policies of the client from customers-highly complex contracts. aeinnrevclofioorloisnsdisonltsh(eite)edm of yulnti .rfeolriaanllceasonpecctsomofputerFive- baDseocs 解析： 通过了解公司会计政策以及以前对内控系统的测试可以了解到公司目前的会计和内控系统 情况 Example: 比如对于一些复杂的合同，识别客户收入的会计政策；对 Five Dock公司业务的 电脑系统，审计师可以依赖的程度进行计划 答案3: Risk assessment -The assessment of risk for the client and risk of fraud and error and the identification of significant audit areas and key audit matters for the auditor's report. Application of IFRS 15 Revenue from Contracts with Customers is likely to be a key audit matter in Five Dock. 解析： 通过对客户舞弊、错报、重大审计风险以及关键审计事项的评估从而达成对客户风险评估的 目的 Example:IFRS15 收入相关的准则可能是Five Dock 公司的关键审计事项 答案4: Materiality levels -The materiality levels for audit planning and performance purposes. Materiality at 5%for items of profit or loss. Performance materiality to be set by the partner using professional judgment. 高顿教育 解析： 确定审计计划和执行层面需要用到的重要性水平 Example:profit or loss 采取5%的重要性水平， performance materiality 由合伙人的职业判 断来设置 答案5: Nature,timing and extent of audit procedures -Details of the focus on audit work on specific areas.Detail on the extent of use of audit software and possible reliance on internal audit. Extensive use of CAATs to obtain sufficient, appropriate audit evidence. New internal audit function for this year. Need to assess if reliance can be placed on their work. 解析： 通过审计需要特别关注的领域以及对内控的依赖程度来确定审计程序的性质、时间和程度 Example: 对 于CAATs 的使用来获取充分恰当的审计证据；对于今年新的内控，需要评估确 定外审可以依赖的程度 答案6: Co-ordination,supervision and review of audit work -Details the extent of involvement of experts,client locations and staffing requirements for the audit. Two locations -audit staff will be based at head office,but some will need to carry out work at the manufacturing location(e.g. non-current assets,inventory). Specialist IT systems auditors required to be part of the team. 解析： 了解专家的参与程度、客户地址以及审计成员需求来确认审计工作的协同合作、监督以及复 核情况 Example: 公司由两个办公地址-审计师主要在总部工作，但是部分审计师需要在厂房工作； 审计团队里需要IT 系统审计师 (b)Using the information provided,identify and describe SIX audit risks and explain the auditor's response to each risk,in planning the audit of Five Dock Co. (12 marks) (20 marks) 本题核心知识点： Audit risk 题目类型：word 官方答案： (与后面解析放在一起) 得分标准： 1 mark for describing the audit risk and 1 mark for explaining theauditor's response: max 12(b) Audit risk and auditor response 1 mark for describing the audit risk and 1 mark for explaining the auditor's response: max 12 Ideas Investment in Burwood Chairman abused position Impairment of development expenditure Profit related bonus scheme Manipulation of profits New internal audit Bank loan and gearing Bank loan disclosure Going concern 知识点标签：Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-3.Assessing audit risks -Audit risks in the financial statements 难易程度：难 解 析： 本题要求考生识别出题目中的审计风险并解释，并且针对每一个审计风险给出审计师的应对 方式，考生需要分别写出6个审计风险以及应对方式。 答案1: Auditor's responseThe auditor should carry out an impairmentAudit risk Auditor's response The auditor should carry out an impairment During the year,Five Dock invested a review of the investment at the year end.The latest financial statements of BurwoodBurwood,a private alternative energysubstantial amount in the shares of review of the investment at the year end. The latest financial statements of Burwood Burwood,a private alternative energy should be obtained and an auditor's expertcompany.There is a risk that the carrying should be obtained and an auditor's expert company.There is a risk that the carrying engaged to value the investment.impaired.amount of the investment could be engaged to value the investment. impaired. 解析： Audit risk: 在今年，Five Dock 投资一大笔钱在Burwood的股份中，风险为这笔投资可能 会受损。 Auditor response: 审计师应该在年底对这笔投资进行减值测试，获取到最新的财报并且让审 计师方的专家来对投资进行估值。 答案2: 高顿教育 The investment in Burwood was driven by the Five Dock's Chairman.There is a risk that the Chairman abused his position and transaction;that the purchase wasthat his integrity may be called into doubt. transaction;that the purchase was The commercial reality behind the purchase of the shares must be understood. The auditor must review the board minutes aware of the background to thisto confirm that all board members were aware of the background to this discussed,openly debated and approved. Higher levels of professional scepticism should be applied when discussing any matter with,or obtaining representations from,the Chairman. 解 析 ： Audit risk: 对 Burwood 的投资是由Five Dock的董事会主席主导的。董事会主席可能滥用 自己的职权，审计师需要对他是否正直进行合理怀疑。 Auditor response: 审计师需要理解投资背后的本质；审计师必须检查董事会会议纪要来确认 所有董事会成员都清楚交易的背景；审计师需要保持更高的职业怀疑态度，获取到董事会主 席的书面声明。 答案3: There is an increased inherent risk at the assertion level that deferred development expenditure is subject to a considerable degree of uncertainty and therefore its carrying amount may be overstated. The auditor needs to confirm that the asset recognition(capitalisation)criteria of IAS 38 Intangible Assets are met.The auditor should assess,in particular,further costs to complete,future revenues(or cost savings),and commercial viability. 解 析 ： Audit risk: 题中说到公司遇到了预期外的问题，增加了研发和生产的成本，而这会增加研 发支出的风险，因为对于研发支出数字的估计有很大的主观判断和不确定性，很可能会高估 账面价值。 Auditor response: 审计师需要确认支出是否符合无形资产的条件，尤其是之后的成本、未来 的收入以及企业发展能力。 答案4: A profit-related bonus puts pressure on management to achieve a high profit.This increases the risk that revenues may be overstated and/or expenses understated in order to achieve the bonus targets. Balances and transactions that areparticularly subjective to management's Balances and transactions that are estimations(e.g.allowances for trade receivables,provisions,revenue recognition,net realisable value of inventory)must be carefully reviewed with a high level of professional scepticism. 解 析 ： Audit risk: 题目中说到公司对高管有奖励机制，今年的PBT 超过去年的25%部分会给高管 作为奖金。这会增加财报收入被高估或者费用低估的风险。 Auditor response: 审计师需要保持高度的职业怀疑态度，并且对需要主观判断的科目认真检 查 。 答案5: In order to achieve a desired level of there is an increased risk that cut-off be manipulated. profit may The auditor should observe the adequacy of the client's procedures to ensure an accurate cut-off audit at the year-end physical count.All material profit-related transactions before and after the year-end (e.g.goods received,goods despatched, credit notes issued,bad debt write-offs) should be reviewed to ensure recorded in the correct accounting period. 解 析 ： Audit risk: 因为对于公司利润水平设定的奖励机制，会增加高层操纵 cut-off 的风险。 Auditor response: 审计师需要观察客户公司对于cut-off 的内控程序是否充分，确保年底盘 点的准确性。所有重大的和利润相关的交易都要仔细检查确保交易记录在了正确的会计期 间 。 答案6: A new internal audit function wasestablished during the year.There is a risk A new internal audit function was that inappropriate reliance will be placed on the work of internal audit. The auditor should document the tasks and capabilities of the department.The reasons for placing(any)reliance on the work of internal audit must be documented and included in the overall audit strategy and work programme(e.g.the length of time operative in the year,scope of work carried out,results and reports to the audit committee,quality of action taken by the audit committee). 解 析 ： Audit risk: 公司今年设立了内审部门，这会增加外审可能会不恰当的依赖内审工作的风险。 Auditor response: 审计师需要确认内审部门的能力，并且在审计策略中用文字阐述外审需要 依赖内审工作的原因。 答案7: Substantial finance(bank loan)was obtained during the year and the loan agreement covenants that the gearing ratio must not exceed 30%.As the gearing ratio is increasing(20%last year to 27%per November's management accounts).This further increases the risk that cut-off may be manipulated and the risk of window dressing to maintain an acceptable gearing ratio. The auditor should document the main provisions of the loan agreement to identify any other covenants that could influence the financial statements. Throughout the audit,the team will need to be alert to these risks.They will need to maintain professional scepticism and carefully review judgmental decisions and compare treatment against prior years. 解 析 ： Audit risk: 公司今年有一笔金额较大的贷款，贷款契约中要求公司的杠杆率不能超过30%。 高顿教盲 BoL pcAToN 而公司今年的杠杆率从去年的20%涨到了27%,公司为了维持住杠杆率可能会操纵交易的 cut-off。 Auditor response: 审计师应该记录贷款协议的主要条款来识别是否有其他可能影响财报的契 约。审计团队应该对风险保持警觉，保持较高的职业怀疑态度，仔细检查需要主观判断的科 目。 答案8: conclusions to ensure appropriateThere is a risk that the disclosures required (e.g.terms,collateral,interest)on the loan may not be accurate or complete. conclusions to ensure appropriate Review the loan agreement to determine IFRS checklist,audit knowledge and workwhat disclosures should be made.Use an IFRS checklist,audit knowledge and work disclosures have been made 解 析 ： Audit risk: 对于贷款事宜，公司可能没有准确或完整的进行披露 Auditor response: 检查贷款协议来确认应该对哪些内容进行披露。使用IFRS 的披露清单来 确认公司有恰当的披露 答案9: The auditor's going concern review shouldpay particular attention to the directors′assessment of Five Dock's future as a goingGoing concern risk would substantially increase if the loan is required to be immediately repaid. The auditor's going concern review should pay particular attention to the directors′ assessment of Five Dock's future as a going concern particularly if gearing does rise,other covenants are broken and the loanhas to be repaid.解 析 ： concern particularly if gearing does rise, other covenants are broken and the loan has to be repaid. Audit risk: 如果银行撤资的话，公司的可持续经营会有很大的风险。 Auditor response: 审计师应该对公司的可持续经营进行审计，尤其是杠杆率是否还会上升， 以及其他契约是否会违背而导致银行撤资。

stem_zh: Q18 This scenario relates to four requirements. Jayne Co buys and sells antique designs of garden statues made of stone,cast iron,bronze and marble for gardens.The company has retail outlets in several large garden centres.However,as space in the retail outlets is limited,many statutes are stored in a self-storage units located around the country. Credit terms are offered to major customers such as national conservation organisations and heritage hotels.Sales to the general public are for cash.During the year,Jayne Co financed the purchase of non-current assets with a bank loan.This loan is repayable in equal annual instalments for the next five years.Shortly after the reporting date,an employee of one of the self-storage facilities was seriously injured when a large statue toppled over.He is now claiming damages against Jayne Co. Requirements: (a)State FOUR examples of external confirmation relevant to the audit of Jayne Co.(2 marks) 本题核心知识点：Substantive Procedures-Receivables 题目类型：word 官方答案： (a) External confirmations · Trade receivable confirmation. · Legal advisor (lawyer)for pending litigation and claims. · Balances and other information from bankers("bank confirmation") · Inventory held by third parties. 得分标准： (a) Four examplesGenerally V mark each relevant example max 2 (a) Four examples Ideas Receivable confirmation - Legal enquiries 一 Bank confirmations - Inventory held by third parties 知识点标签：Syllabus DAudit evidence-4.The audit of specific items-direct confirmation of accounts receivable 难易程度：易 高顿教育 oLpipcifi oLp 解 析： 本题考察的是使用外部函证的情形。 通常在应收账款审计中，会向客户发函证询证余额；在银行存款审计中，会向银行发函证询 证余额；在审计法律诉讼事项时，会向律师发函来获取与该诉讼相关的审计证据；另外，当 存在第三方代管存货时，会向第三方发函证，询证与代管存货相关的金额和数量等信息。 (b)For EACH of the examples in(a)explain: ONE audit assertion that the external confirmation supports;and ONE audit assertion that the external confirmation does NOT support. (8 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： Audit assertions Tutorial note: Only ONE example of each assertion supported and not supported is required. Receivables confirmation Provides evidence of the existence of the trade receivable when a reply is returned directly from the customer to the auditor. Provides evidence on cut-off because sales or cash receipts recorded in the incorrect accounting period will have to be reconciled to the balance provided by the customer. Does not provide sufficient evidence of completeness of the receivables balance because customers may not query balances that are understated. The letter does not provide evidence of the accuracy,valuation and allocation of the receivables balance because confirmation of the debt does not mean it will be paid. Letter from legal counsel Enquiries of Jayne's legal advisor will provide evidence concerning the existence of any claims at the period end that the legal advisor has knowledge of (e.g.the claim by the employee at the self-storage facility). The lawyer may not necessarily confirm the accuracy,valuation and allocation of claims due to uncertainty about the future or the completeness of any legal procedures. In addition,the lawyer may be reluctant to confirm or admit any liability on the part of Jayne in writing(as this may be admissible as evidence). Bank confirmation A bank confirmation letter provides good evidence on the existence of the company's bank accounts as the bank has confirmed this information in writing. The confirmation will also provide evidence on: · existence and accuracy,valuation and allocation of facilities(e.g.loans,overdrafts, guarantees); · existence of assets held as collateral; · existence and accuracy,valuation and allocation of trade finance and derivatives; ● the completeness of bank and cash disclosures. It cannot necessarily be relied on to provide complete or accurate information.Most banks include a disclaimer on the letter referring to "errors and omissions excepted"indicating that the auditor must review this evidence against other cash and bank evidence obtained. Inventory held by third parties Written confirmation from the third party holding the inventory will provide evidence of the existence of that inventory where physical inspection/observation cannot be achieved(e.g. if not all the self-storage units will be visited).Where inventory held by a third party is not material to the financial statements,written confirmation is acceptable evidence of existence. However,the confirmation does not provide evidence regarding the accuracy,valuation and allocation of the inventory or cut-off. Confirming something exists does not necessarily mean it is in good condition or,for example,has been sold and is held fordespatch. However,the confirmation does not provide evidence regarding the accuracy,valuation and allocation of the inventory or cut-off. Confirming something exists does not necessarily mean it is in good condition or,for example,has been sold and is held for 得分标准： (b) Audit assertions Generally 1 mark each relevant assertion requirement max 8 Ideas - Receivable confirmation -existence,cut-off, completeness,accuracy,valuation and allocation -Legal enquiries -existence,accuracy,valuation and allocation -Bank confirmations -existence,accuracy,valuation and allocation - Inventory held by third parties -existence,accuracy, valuation and allocation 知识点标签：Syllabus D Audit evidence-4.The audit of specific items -direct confirmation of accounts receivable 难易程度： 中 解 析： 本题考察的是函证对应的认定。 高 顿 教 育 BoLpEueATo 题意：对于(a)中举例的函证类型，写出一条该函证可以支持的认定，以及一条该函证无法 支持的认定。 对于应收账款函证： 如果顾客直接回函，则为应收账款的存在性提供支持；另外，顾客的回函也可以证明应收账 款的截止性认定，因为只有记录在正确期间的销售和应收账款才能与顾客成功对账。 但应收账款函证无法证明应收账款的完整性和准确性，因为客户倾向于低估自己的应付账款， 导致回函数字被低估，金额不准确。 对于律师函证： 律师的回函可以为年底存在未决诉讼事项的存在性提供支持。 但由于诉讼得到不确定性，律师没办法预估准确的赔款金额，所以准确性和完整性无法保证。 另外，律师可能不愿意进行书面回函，因为担心书面回函可能会被当作其他证据使用。 对于银行存款函证： 银行的回函可以证明企业的存款、贷款、透支款和保证金等的准确性，金融资产和衍生品的 准确性，同时也证明了银行存款的存在性和相关披露的完整性。 但是并不代表函证可以提供所有我们需要的信息，很多银行的回函里是包含免责条款的，审 计师需要自己复核证据，如有需要，还要获取进一步审计证据。 对于代管存货函证： 如果审计师不能亲自去盘点，第三方的回函可以证明存货的存在性。如果代管存货金额不重 大，第三方的回函可以作为充分适当的审计证据。 但是，仅回函并不能验证存货的准确性，因为存货的存在并不代表存货状态良好，可以正常 销售，如果存货出现减值迹象，那么要对存货进行减值测试，存货的价值要重新计量。 (c)Explain the procedures to obtain a bank report for audit purposes from Jayne Co's bank and the substantive procedures that should be carried out on that report. (5marks ) 题目类型：word 官方答案： Bank loan (i) Procedure for obtaining a bank letter Obtaining a bank confirmation is a standard procedure for just about all clients.As Jayne has significant cash transactions and a loan from the bank(interest payments and probable collateral over the non-current assets purchased)obtaining the bank confirmation is essential. The auditor will produce a confirmation letter in accordance with local audit regulations and practices. The letter will be sent to the client to sign and authorise disclosure and will then be forwarded to Jayne's bank by the auditor. Alternatively,the client may already have provided a standard authority for the bank to respond to a bank letter each year.In this case,separate authority would not be required and the bank confirmation request should be sent directly to the bank by the auditor. Ideally the letter should be sent before the end of the accounting period to enable the bank to complete it on a timely basis(e.g.at the year-end). The bank willcomplete the letter and send it back directly to the auditor. Audit procedures on the bank letter include: · Agree the balances for each bank account to the relevant bank reconciliation and the year-end balance in the financial statements. · Agree total interest charges on the letter to the interest expense account in the general ledger. · For any details of loans,ensure repayment terms are correctly disclosed in the financial statements between current and non-current liabilities. · Ensure hat any other information within the confirmation that has to be disclosed is completely and accurately disclosed. 得分标准： (c) Bank letter procedures Generally 1 mark each relevant procedure max 5 Ideas Essential procedure Follow requirements of jurisdiction Client must sign Standing request held by bank Send before year-end Sent back directly to auditor Agree to bank reconciliation and general ledger Interest charges Correct disclosure in notes 知识点标签：Syllabus D Audit evidence-4.The audit of specific items-bank confirmation 难易程度：难
explanation_zh: 本题考察的是如何获取银行函证，以及获取到函证之后还需要执行哪些实质性审计程序。 本题客户公司存在重大现金交易金额，而且有银行长期借款，因此，获取银行函证是非常重 要的审计程序。 生成函证时应首先注意要符合当地法律法规的要求。 审计师生成函证后，要先发给客户签字确认并授权，再发回给审计师，由审计师直接寄给对 应的银行。(如果客户已经授权过，那么函证可以直接由审计师发给银行，不需要再进行授 权 ) 理想状态下，银行函证应当在年前发出，这样银行有足够时间进行回函。 在银行完成函证后，应直接寄回给审计师。 审计师拿到回函后，还应对回函进行以下审计程序： · 将银行回函中各个账户的金额与客户年底报表的金额逐一对照 · 将银行回函中给出的利息费用和企业自己记录的利息费用进行对照 · 对于长期负债，确保企业在做账时将流动负债和非流动负债正确计量并披露 · 保证银行回函中的事项都已经正确完整地披露在报表附注当中 (d)List the further substantive procedures that should be carried out on the bank balances in Jayne Co's financial statements. (5 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (d) Substantive procedures for the audit of bank balances (1) Obtain a copy of the year-end trial balance.Agree the bank balance on the trial balance to: —the year-end bank balance on Jayne's accounting system;and -the balance on the financial statements. (2) Obtain a copy of Jayne's bank reconciliation and carry out the following work: -cast the reconciliation; -agree the bank balance to the trial balance; 一 agree the bank statement balance to the year-end bank statement and confirmation; -audit any adjusting items(e.g.errors,interest charges); - agree any outstanding lodgements to the bank statement after the end of the year; -agree any unpresented cheques or similar expenses to the cash book before the end of the year and the bank statements after the end of the year; - reconcile the opening bank balance to the closing balance through each month's bank reconciliation;and —review the bank ledger and reconciliations for any unusual items(e.g. large/unexpected journal entries). 得分标准： (d) Substantive procedures on bank balances Generally 1 mark each relevant procedure Ideas Cast reconciliation Agree balance to trial balance and ledger Agree balance to bank statement and confirmation Adjustments -audit Outstanding lodgements/cheques to supporting documents Reconcile year opening balance to closing Review for unusual items 知识点标签： Syllabus D Audit evidence-4.The audit of specific items-Bank and cash 难易程度： 易 解 析： 题目考察的是除银行函证之外，针对银行存款的其他实质性审计程序。 (1)获取客户的科目余额表，将科目余额表对照至做账系统中的年末余额(即总账余额)以 及财务报表上的金额。应注意做账流程是从总账到科目余额表到财务报表，因此要保证 三者的数据是 一 致的。 (2)获取银行余额调节表(将银行对账单 bank statement 和 企 业 做 账 bank balance 进行对账的 单据),并进行以下操作： - 加总(重新计算以验证准确性) - 将银行余额表的数据对照至企业做账bank balance, 保证准确性 - 将银行余额表的数据对照至银行对账单 bank statement, 保证准确性 - 审计是否存在银行和企业之间的调整项，比如做账错误，利息费用等 - 对企收银未收，企付银未付等情况进行调整 - 将每个月的期初和期末金额与银行余额调节表进行对照，并检查是否有异常或大额交易 高顿教育 2022 MJ Section B Esk Co (a) Preconditions for an audit 本题核心知识点：Fraud 题目类型：word 官方答案： In order to establish whether the preconditions for an audit are present,Bannock &Co must: determine whether the financial reporting framework(for example IFRSR)to be applied by Esk Co in the preparation of its financial statements is acceptable.In considering this,the auditor should have assessed the nature of the entity,the nature and purpose of the financial statements and whether law or regulation prescribes the applicable reporting framework;and obtain the agreement of the management of Esk Co that they acknowledge and understand their responsibility: √ for the preparation of the financial statements in accordance with the applicable financial reporting framework,including where relevant their fair presentation; √ for the design and implementation of internal controls which management considers necessary to enable Esk Co to prepare financial statements which are free from material misstatement,whether due to fraud or error;and to provide Bannock &Co with access to all information which is relevant to the preparation of the financial statements such as records, documentation and other matters. √ Access to information includes any additional information which Bannock &Co may request from management for the purpose of the audit and an agreement to provide unrestricted access to Esk Co's staff in order that Bannock&Co can obtain relevant evidence. 得分标准： 以下采分点，每点可得一分，最多可得4分。 Financial reporting framework;management responsibility;preparation of the financial statements; design and implementation of internal controls;Access to information; 知识点标签：Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-1.Accepting audit engagements-The preconditions for an audit 解析：本题要求考生陈述审计的前提，该考点属于常规考点，建议考生在理解的基础上记忆。 (b) Gross profit margin,inventory holding period,receivables collection period and payables payment period ratios 本题核心知识点：Ratios 相关计算 题目类型：word 官方答案： Ratio 20X5 20X4 Gross profit margin 8·4m/30·9m x 100=27·2% 7·6m/27·5m x 100= 27·6% Inventory holding period 8·3m/22·5m x 365=135 days 6·4m/19·9mx 365=117 days Receivables collection period 7·2m/30·9m x 365=85 days 4·9m/27·5mx 365=65 days Payables payment period 2·4m/22·5mx 365=39 days 3·5/19·9mx 365=64 day 得分标准： 所有比率 (Gross profit margin;Inventory holding period;Receivables collection period; Payables payment period)需计算两年的数值，每个比率每一年的比率计算正确，可得0.5分， 共计4分； 知识点标签： Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-4.Understanding the entity and its environment-Key ratios used in analytical procedures 难易程度： 中 解析：本题要求考生计算各财务比率以协助识别重大错报风险，属于常考知识点，建议考生 掌握常见公式。 (c) Audit risks and auditor's respons 本题核心知识点： Risk assessment 题目类型： word 得分标准：识别出一个正确审计风险0.5分，正确解释该审计风险0.5分，正确应对该审计 风 险 1 分 。 知识点标签：Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-3.Assessing audit risks-Audit risks in the financial statements &The auditor's response to each risk 难易程度：难 解析： 本题要求考生识正确识别审计风险，正确解释该审计风险，以及应对该审计风险(详细解析 见下文)。 答案1: Audit risk Auditor's response Esk Co is a new client for Bannock &Co.As the audit team are not familiar with the accounting policies,transactions and balances of Esk Co,there will be an increased detection risk Bannock &Co should ensure it has a suitably experienced team assigned to the audit.In addition,adequate time should be allocated for team members to obtain an understanding of Esk on the audit. There is also less assurance over opening balances as Bannock &Co did not perform the audit last year. Co and the risks of material misstatement including a detailed team briefing to cover the key areas of risk. Increased audit procedures should be performed over opening balances. 解析： 审计风险：E 公司是B 实务所的新客户，由于对客户的熟悉程度有限，因此会引起检查风险。 风险应对：事务所应当安排审计经验更加丰富的团队来为E 公司服务，且针对其期初余额 增加进一步的审计程序。 答案2: Audit risk Auditor's response Esk Co purchased a patent in the year and has capitalised all costs associated with the purchase.There is a risk that the costs,such as the administrative cost incurred in negotiating the contract,have been capitalised which is not in accordance with IAS 38 Intangible Assets. There is also a risk that amortisation has not been calculated and accounted for correctly. There is a risk that intangible assets and profit for the year are both overstated. The audit team should obtain a breakdown of the total amount capitalised and review the costs to ensure they are all allowable under IAS 38.They should agree the purchase price of the patent to the contract and other costs to invoice and bank statements to confirm that the correct amount has been capitalised as an intangible asset. They should review the terms of the patent to agree its useful life of four years,recalculate the amortisation expense for the period and agree the carrying amount at the end of the period is correct. 解析： 审计风险：E 公司当年购置了一个新的无形资产，且把所有购置成本均资本化为无形资产。 针对购置成本，部分属于后续维护成本的不应当确认为无形资产，因此存在无形资产高估的 风险；并且，无形资产应当在恰当年限进行摊销，若未进行摊销，则会导致无形资产高估， 且相对的费用低估，进一步导致利润高估。 风险应对：审计团队应当进一步获取购置清单，确认其费用的性质；可以进一步向企业询问 摊销年限，以确认摊销金额是否恰当。 答案3: Audit risk Audit response Esk Co has borrowed $2 ·5m from the bank under a five-year loan. If the loan is not allocated correctly between non-current and current liabilities,this would lead to a classification error with liabilities being misstated. There is a risk that the finance cost associated with the loan has been omitted from the statement of profit or loss leading to understated finance costs and accruals The audit team should recalculate the split between current and non-current liabilities to ensure the classification is correct in accordance with relevant accounting standards and local legislation.Details of any security offered against the loan should be agreed to the loan agreement. The finance costs should be recalculated based on the loan amount and interest rates applied and agreed to the accruals schedule. 审计风险：E公司从银行借款金额为2.5m,期限为5年。该借款应当确认其还款时间，以 进一步确认其账户分类，因此该借款的长短期负债的分类认定存在重大错报风险。且对于银 行借款，相应会产生借款利息，因此该利息计算的准确性也会进一步导致利润的不准确。 风险应对：审计团队可以进一步实施审计程序确认长短期负债的分类，以及确认其合同内容。 于此同时，关于利息费用可以根据合同规定利息重新计算，以确认准确性。 答案4: Audit risk Audit response A batch of invoices was miscoded and was not recorded as trade payables.Investigations are still ongoing to identify whether there are any other batches of miscoded invoices.The payables payment period has decreased from 64 days to 39 days. There is a risk that there are other batches of miscoded invoices.If these are not identified and corrected by the year end,purchases and trade payables will be understated. The audit team should discuss the matter relating to the miscoded invoices with management to understand how the issue arose,where the miscoded invoices had been originally posted to and whether all invoices have now been correctly posted. Detailed testing of the trade payables balance, including a review of supplier statement reconciliations,should be carried out to ensure that all liabilities are recorded. 解析： 审计风险：部分应付账款因发票问题未入账，且从比率计算可看出，应付账款周转天数从 64天下降至39天。应付账款应当在采购完成时刻即入账，因此发票问题导致的应付账款未 入账，可能导致了应付账款账户余额的低估。 风险应对：审计团队应当考虑进一步了解和调查发票问题，确认其未入账原因。于此同时， 进一步针对应付账款余额进行测试，确认其是否存在记录不完整的低估问题。 答案：5 Audit risk Audit response Inventory of $1 · 1m was damaged as a result of the fire and has not been replaced.The inventory balance has increased by $1 ·9m in the year and the inventory holding period has increased from 117 days to 135 days.The increase in inventory and the holding period is inconsistent with the loss of inventory as a result of the fire. There is a risk that the damaged inventory has not been fully written off and remains within closing inventory or that there is other slow-moving inventory which has not been identified.Inventory may be overstated and cost of sales understated as a result. The audit team should discuss with management the process for identifying damaged inventory items following the fire and review the outcome of the inventory count to agree that the items identified have been written off correctly. They should also attend the year-end inventory count to identify whether any of the damaged items are still held within inventory at year end and confirm how management intends to value this damaged inventory in the year-end financial statements. 解析： 审计风险：价值1.1m 的存货出现损毁，且从财务比率计算得出，存货周转天数从117天增 加至135天。损毁存货存在未减值风险，那么导致存货本身存在高估风险。 风险应对：审计团队应当与管理层进一步讨论获取更多信息以确认被损毁存货是否依旧以原 始价值计价。并且，可以通过参与盘点，以确认存货损毁程度及其计价情况。 答案：6 Audit risk Audit response Esk Co has included a current asset of $1-1m in respect of an insurance claim relating to the fire To comply with IAS 37 Provisions,Contingent Liabilities and Contingent Assets,the amount claimed should not be recognised until the receipt of the claim is virtually certain. As the insurance company has not responded to the claim,recognising the amount claimed overstates profit and other receivables. Discuss with management whether any notification of payment has been received from the insurance company and review the related correspondence. If virtually certain,the treatment adopted is correct.If payment has been received,agree to post year-end cash book. If receipt is not virtually certain,the auditor should request that management remove it from profit and receivables.If the receipt is probable, the auditor should request management include a contingent asset disclosure not. 解析： 审计风险：由于火灾致使保险公司赔偿E 公司1.1m, 且 E 公司将其记录在流动资产中。根 据 IAS 37,当该赔偿确认可以收到时，才可以确认成资产。但其保险公司并未回复，因此 可能导致资产、利润、其他应收款的高估。 风险应对：审计团队应当与管理层讨论确认其1.1m 的可能性，若确认可以收到，则E 公司 的企业记账是准确的；若不确认可以收到，则应当与管理层进一步确认记账的准确性。 答案：7 Audit risk Audit response An additional bonus is payable to sales staff in the quarter to 31 August 20X5 which gives an incentive to achieve sales targets in that period This increases the incentive for staff to create fictitious sales or to record sales in the incorrect period in order to achieve the additional bonus. There is an increased risk that revenue and receivables are overstated due to fictitious sales The audit team should remain alert to the risk of fictitious sales and sales being recorded in the wrong period.They should extend cut-off testing around the year end and review the level of returns or orders cancelled post year end. 解析： 审计风险：该企业向销售人员支付奖金提成，这会导致销售人员为了获取高提成而舞弊，那 么就会增加高估收入和应收账款的风险。 风险应对：审计团队应当针对该舞弊行为提高警惕，并且进一步针对收入实施截止性测试。 答案：8 Audit risk Audit response Trade discounts offered to regular customers have been separately accounted for as an expense. The audit team should discuss with management the rationale for including discounts in cost of sales,how discounts are calculated and Trade discounts should be offset against revenue.There has been an increase in revenue but the gross profit margin has fallen slightly from 28%to 27%,consistent with the fact that there are additional expenses recorded. There is a risk that revenue and cost of sales are overstated as a result of the accounting treatment adopted. accounted for. For a sample of sales,they should recalculate the discount and review a breakdown of revenue and cost of sales to agree that discounts have been accounted for correctly. The audit team should request that discounts are reclassified to revenue in accordance with IFRSR 15 Revenue From Contracts with Customers. 解析： 审计风险：该企业向客户提供折扣，且将该折扣确认为费用。从财务比率计算得出，收入增 加但其毛利有轻微下降。该现象会导致收入和成本存在高估风险。 风险应对：审计团队应当与管理层讨论确认其折扣的合理性。并且，获取部分销售记录，重 新计算确认其准确性。 答案：9 Audit risk Audit response Esk Co's credit control manager has been off work since December 20X4 and has been replaced by an inexperienced manager.The receivables collection period has increased from 65 days in 20X4 to 85 days in 20X5,indicating that they are not collecting debts as efficiently in the current year. There is a risk that amounts will not be collected from credit customers and that receivables are overstated as a result. Bannock &Co should discuss with the directors the credit control procedures in place and the process for identifying and following up on aged and irrecoverable debts.Extend post year-end cash receipts testing and a review of the aged receivables ledger to be performed to assess valuation. Also consider the adequacy of any allowance for receivables. 解析： 审计风险：该企业的信贷经理于20X4 年12月离职，且该职位由一经验不足的人员替代。 由财务比率计算可得，应收账款周转天数自去年65天增加至85天。这可能是由于该经验不 足的新的信贷经理导致，可能存在应收账款余额存在高估风险。 风险应对：审计团队应当与管理层讨论，确认其信贷控制流程。针对其期后收款，测试其应 收账款余额计价的准确性。 答案：10 Audit risk Audit responseEsk Co is under a tax investigation relating tosales tax and it is likely that the company will berequired to pay a penalty and fine of$0 ·6m.Therefore a provision should be recognised asthere is a probable outflow of resources as aresult of a past event.Esk Co has not recogniseda provision nor has any disclosure been made.There is a risk that provisions are understatedThe audit team should obtain a copy of the letter from the tax authorities and discuss the matter with the directors.They should obtain and review documentationfrom the tax consultant to assess the likelihood and amount of any penalties and fines to be paid. Audit risk Audit response Esk Co is under a tax investigation relating to sales tax and it is likely that the company will be required to pay a penalty and fine of$0 ·6m.
