(10 marks) 题目类型：word 官 方 答 案： ( 与 解 析 放 在 一 起 ) 得 分 标 准： (c)Control deficiencies and recommendations Credit limits No copy of sales order Discounts not reviewed Access master data No GRN to finance Document count controls No PLCA rec Other Maximum 5 issues,2 marks each 顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 2 222 22 2 22 2 22 2 2 2 2 2 10 知 识 点 标 签： Syllabus C Internal control-3.Tests of controls-The sales and purchases system 难易程度：难 解 析： 本题要求考生识别并解释审计中发现的内控缺陷并提出相应的建议，以下是本题详细考点解析， 请考生注意考官判分规则：内控缺陷的识别0.5分，解释0.5分，一个有效recommend为 1 分 。 A credit check is performed on all new customers,after which a credit limit is set by the finance director,and these limits remain unchanged unless the customer requests an increase. If credit limits are not reviewed regularly,they could be out of date,resulting in limits being too high and therefore sales being made to poor credit risks or,alternatively,too low and therefore Petra Co losing potential revenuee Credit limits should continue to be set by the finance director,however,these limits should be reviewed on a regular basis and amended as appropriate by a responsible officiale 解析：对所有新客户执行信用检查，之后由财务总监设置信用额度，除非客户要求增加，否则这些 限额保持不变。如果不定期审查信用额度，它们可能会过时，导致限额过高，销售的信用风险增加； 或者太低，导致PetraCo 损失潜在收入。 Recommend: 信用额度应继续由财务总监设定，但是，这些限额应定期审查，并由负责人酌情 修 改 。 答案2: Customer orders are recorded on a pre-printed three-part form.No copy of the order form is sent to the sales department of Petra Co and hence they would not be able to monitor if orders are being fulfilled on a timely basis.If orders are not fulfilled on a timely basis,this would reduce customer goodwille The sales order form should be amended to become four-part,with the fourth copy being sent to the sales department.Upon dispatch,the goods dispatch note should be matched to the order.A regular review of unmatched orders should be undertaken by the sales department to identify any unfulfilled orders↵ 解析：销售订单记录在预先打印的一式三联表单上。订单的副本不会发送给Petra Co的销售部门， 因此他们将无法监控订单是否及时完成。如果不及时履行订单，这将降低商誉。 Recommend: 销售订单应修改为一式四联，第四部分副本发送给销售部门。发货时，货物发货单应 与订单相匹配。销售部门应定期审查不匹配的订单，以识别任何未履行的订单。 答案3: Sales staff have discretion to grant sales discounts to customers of up to 8%but discounts granted are not reviewed.↵ This could result in unauthorised discounts in excess of 8%being allowed and a loss of revenue as they may award unrealistic discounts simply to meet sales targets.↵ All discounts to be granted to customers should be authorised in advance by a responsible official,such as the sales director.If this is not practical,then the supervisor of the sales staff should undertake this role.A copy of the authorisation should be sent to the sales department and the customer's master file data amended for discounts allowed by a responsible official.The master file data system should be amended to prohibit discounts in excess of 8%being entered.On a regular basis,the sales director should undertake a review of discount levels granted on sales orders and ensure they are in line with authorised levels.↵ 解析：销售人员有权酌情向客户提供高达8%的销售折扣，但授予的折扣不会被审查。这可能会导 致允许超过8%的未经授权的折扣和收入损失，因为销售人员可能仅仅为了达到销售目标而给予不切 实际的折扣。 Recommend: 授予客户的所有折扣应事先由负责人(例如销售总监)授权。如果这不切实际， 那么销售主管应该承担这个角色。授权书的副本应发送给销售部门，并修改客户的主文件数据， 以便负责人授权折扣。应修改主文件数据系统，禁止输入超过8%的折扣。销售总监应定期审查 销售订单上授予的折扣级别，并确保它们符合授权级别。 答案4: Access to the master file data for suppliers is available to all those in the purchasing department who are able to make changes. As all members of the purchasing department can make changes to data and therefore add new suppliers to the payables ledger system, this increases the risk of fraude Amendments to master file data should be restricted so that only authorised members of the department are able to make changes.In addition,a log of changes to master file data, including details of which staff member made the change,should be produced and reviewed by a responsible official on a regular basis and signed as evidence of their reviewe 解析：采购部门中所有能够进行更改的人员都可以访问供应商的主文件数据。由于采购部门的所有 成员都可以更改数据，从而可将新的供应商添加到应付账款分类账系统中，这增加了欺诈的风险 Recommend: 应限制对主文件数据的修改，以便只有部门的授权成员才能进行更改。此外，应 由负责人定期制作和审查主档案数据的更改日志，包括更改工作人员的详细情况，并签名作为审 查的证据 .答案5: . GRNs and orders are matched and filed in the warehouse and the finance department does not receive a copy.Therefore,on receipt of purchase invoices,they are not being agreed to the relevant GRNs and orders prior to input into the payables ledger.↵ This could result in invoices being paid for goods which were not received or ordered A copy of the GRN should be provided on a timely basis to the finance department.On receipt,all purchase invoices should be matched to the related GRNand purchase order and this should be undertaken prior to the invoice being logged in the payables ledger 解析：GRN 和订单在仓库中匹配并归档，财务部门不会收到副本。因此，在收到采购发票时，在输 入应付账款分类账之前，未与相关的GRN 和订单核对。这可能会导致为未收到或订购的货物支付发 票。 Recommend: 应及时向财务部门提供GRN 的副本。收到后，所有采购发票应与相关的GRN 和 采购订单相匹配，这应在发票记录到应付账款分类账之前进行。 答案6: ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM A payables ledger clerk only utilises document count controls when inputting invoices into the payables ledger.Document count controls can confirm the completeness of input.However, they do not verify the accuracy or validity of input. If the invoices are not input correctly,suppliers may not be paid on time or may be paid incorrect amounts.This could lead to a loss of supplier goodwill or suppliers withdrawing credit facilities The payables ledger clerk should instead input the invoices in batches and apply information processing controls,such as control totals, rather than just completeness checks to ensure both completeness and accuracy over the input of purchase invoices.In addition,sequence checks should be built into the system to ensure completeness of input. 解析：应付账款分类账员工仅在将发票输入应付账款分类账时使用文档计数控件。文档计数控件可 以确认输入的完整性。但是，它们不验证输入的准确性或有效性。如果发票输入不正确，供应商可 能无法按时付款或可能收到不正确的金额。这可能导致供应商商誉损失或供应商撤回授信额度。 Recommend: 应付款分类账员工应分批输入发票，并应用信息处理控制(如控制总计),而不仅 仅是完整性检查，以确保采购发票输入的完整性和准确性。此外，序列检查应内置到系统中，以 确保输入的完整性。 答案7: On a monthly basis,payables ledger control account reconciliations should be undertaken with all reconciling items fully investigated. The account reconciliation should be reviewed by a responsible official who should evidence this review by way of signatureThe total on the payables ledger is not On a monthly basis,payables ledger control account reconciliations should be undertaken with all reconciling items fully investigated. The account reconciliation should be reviewed by a responsible official who should evidence this review by way of signature monthlycompared to the general ledger on a monthly basis,hence payables ledger control account reconciliations are not being undertaken. Failing to undertake these reconciliations means that errors in the payables ledger may not be identified promptly,resulting in suppliers being under or overpaid.In addition, errors may be present in the general ledger resulting in the payables balance in the financial statements being under or overstated↵ 解析：应付账款分类账上的总额不按月与总分类账进行比较，因此不进行应付账款分类账控制账户 对账。未能进行这些对账意味着可能无法及时识别应付账款分类账中的错误，从而导致供应商支付 不足或多付。此外，总分类账中可能存在错误，导致财务报表中的应付账款余额少记或多记。 Recommend: 应按月进行应付账款分类账控制账户对账，并全面调查所有调节项目。账户调节 应由一名负责人审查，该负责人应以签名的方式证明这一审查。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 2023 M/JQ16(d) (d)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to Petra Co's purchases and other expenses. (4 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (d)Substantive procedures for purchases and other expenses -Calculate the operating profit and gross profit margin and compare to the prior year and to budget and investigate any significant differences. -Review monthly purchases and other expenses to identify any significant fluctuations and discuss with management. -Review the annual purchases and other expenses on a line-by-line basis,compare to the prior year and investigate any significant differences. -Recalculate the accuracy of a sample of purchase invoice totals and related taxes and confirm that the expense has been correctly included in the general ledger. -Recalculate the year-end prepayments and accruals to ensure the accuracy of the expense charge included in the profit or loss. -Select a sample of post year-end expense invoices and ensure that any expenses relating to the current year have been accrued. -Select a sample of expense payments from the cash book and trace to the relevant expense account in the general ledger to ensure the expense has been included and classified correctly. -Select a sample of goods received notes(GRNs)from throughout the year.Agree them to purchase invoices and the purchase day book to ensure the completeness of purchases. -Select a sample of GRNs immediately before and after the year end.Agree to the purchase day book to ensure the expense is recorded in the correct accounting period 得分标准： (d)Substantive procedures for purchases and other expenses 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 4 知识点标签： Syllabus D-Audit evidence-D2-substantive procedures for obtaining audit evidence 难易程度： 中 解 析 ： 此题考查的是对于采购以及费用科目的实质性审计程序问题，属于比较常规的考法。题目中描述， 被审计单位编制了月度管理账目，其中包括了对关键费用的详细分析。题目并无其他详细信息，那 我们在考虑答案时，可以从以下几个方面入手，包括实质性分析程序，重新计算采购发票以确认其 准确性，重新计算费用涉及的预付以及暂估的准确性，确认采购以及费用记录在了恰当的期间，以 及确认采购及费用记录的完整性等。 每步审计程序能得到1分，所以共须写出4步审计程序。 2023M/JQ16(e) (e)Describe THREE corporate governance deficiencies faced by Petra Co and provide a recommendation to address each deficiency to ensure compliance with corporate governance principles. (6 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： (与解析放在一起) 得分标准： (e)Corporate governance deficiencies and recommendations Marketing director Chair Frequency of director re-election NEDs no financial experience Annual bonus NEDs Other Maximum 3 issues,2 marks each 教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 2 2 2 2 2 2 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 2222 22 22 6 知识点标签：Syllabus AAudit framework and regulation-3.Corporate governance-Good practice for corporate governance 难易程度： 中 解析： 本题要求考生识别并解释公司治理中的缺陷并给到对应的建议，需要考生对公司治理有清晰的理解。 以下是本题详细考点解析，请考生注意考官判分规则：识别缺陷0.5分，解释0.5分，一个有效 recommend为1分。 答案1: It is proposed that the current marketing director be appointed as the Chair of the company when the current Chair retires. As a former executive director,this director has been previously recently employed by the company and so will not be independent on appointment as advised by corporate governance principles.A lack of independence may result in the Chair not bringing the necessary level of independence and objective judgement to the rolee The Chair of Petra Co should be independent on appointment and hence the marketing director should not be appointed as Chair,as they have been an employee within the last five years and therefore not considered independent.An individual who is fully independent of Petra Co should be appointed to the role of Chair when the current Chair retires 解析：被审计单位建议现任营销总监在现任董事会主席退休时被任命为公司董事会主席。 作为前执行董事，该董事曾于公司任职，因此根据公司治理原则的建议，该营销总监不能保证其独 立性。缺乏独立性可能导致董事会主席不能为该角色带来必要的独立性和客观判断力。 Recommendation: 任命的主席应该是独立的，因此营销总监不应该被任命为主席，因为他 在过去五年内一直是企业员工，因此不被视为独立。现任董事会主席退休时，只有完全独立 于Petra Co的个人应被任命为新董事会主席。 答案2: ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM Annually at the company's general meeting, two directors are subject to re-election. The shareholders should review on a regular basis that the composition of the board of directors is appropriate,and they do this by regular re-election of all directors. All directors should be subject to annual re- election by the shareholders.At the current year's general meeting,it should be proposed that all directors should be subject to re- election↵ 解析：每年在公司股东大会上，两名董事要接受重新选举。股东应定期审查董事会的组成是否合适， 并通过定期重新选举所有董事来做到这一点。 Recommendation: 所有董事均须经股东每年重选。在本年度的股东大会上，应建议所有董 事均进行重新选举。 答案3: All members of the audit committee were previously involved in sales or purchasing related roles.At least one member of the audit committee should have recent and relevant financial experience. None of the non-executive directors(NEDs) appears to have held a financial role and so it is unlikely they possess the required financial experience to be able to understand the financial statementse The company should consider recruiting a new independent NED who has the required recent and relevant financial experience.This process may be undertaken as part of the re-election process for directorse 解析：审计委员会的所有成员以前都从事销售或采购相关职务。审核委员会至少有一名成员应具备 近期及相关的财务经验。非执行董事似乎均未担任过财务职务，因此他们不太可能具备所需的财务 经验来理解财务报表。 Recommendation: 公司应考虑招聘一名新的独立NED, 该NED 具有所需的近期相关财务经 验。此过程可作为董事重新选举程序的一部分进行。 答案4: The NEDs'remuneration is in the form of an annual bonus.However,remuneration paid to NEDs should reflect the time and responsibilities attached to the role,as the inclusion of performance related elements, especially those tied to short-term performance targets,can affect the independence of NED↵ The remuneration of the NEDs should be revised so they are paid an annual fee for their services,which is unrelated to how Petra Co performs,and should reflect the time commitment and responsibilities attached to the role.The board as a whole should determine an appropriate level of remuneration for the NEDs↵ 解析：非执行董事的薪酬以年终奖的形式发放。然而，支付给非执行董事的薪酬应反映该职位所投 入的时间和责任；非执行董事薪酬加入与绩效相关的元素，特别是与短期绩效目标相关的元素，会 影响NED的独立性. Recommendation: 非执行董事的薪酬应进行调整，以便他们获得的薪酬与Petra Co的业绩表 现无关，并应反映该职位所投入的时间和责任。董事会整体应确定非执行董事的适当薪酬水 平 Case 2-Q17 题目 This scenario relates to two requirements. It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit supervisor with Indigo &Co and are planning the audit of your client,Lapis Co,for the year ending 30 September 20X5.Forecast profit before tax for the year is $68.9m and forecast revenue is $192.3m.The audit manager has attended a planning meeting with the finance director and has provided you with the following notes of the meeting: Planning meeting notes Lapis Co manufactures televisions at six factories located across Europe and purchases most of its raw materials from overseas suppliers.These raw materials are shipped directly to one of the company's factories and the goods are usually in transit for up to six weeks.Lapis Co has responsibility for goods in transit from the point of dispatch by the supplier.The company's internal audit department undertakes controls testing across all factories,visiting each site at least once every year.The audit manager has discussed with the finance director that the external audit team may rely on the controls testing which is carried out by the internal audit department. The company sells televisions to wholesale customers and directly to individual members of the public via the company's website.A significant wholesale customer has recently informed Lapis Co that it is experiencing financial difficulties,however the finance director indicated that an allowance for receivables is not required in the year-end financial statements. Lapis Co offers customers a three-year warranty on any new televisions purchased.The finance director has confirmed that the warranty-provision for the year ended 30 September 20X5 will remain at a similar level to the prior year In December 20X4 Lapis Co changed one of its television speaker suppliers to a cheaper alternative.This has resulted in an increase in warranty claims for television speaker deficiencies. In May 20X5,a payroll clerk was dismissed after it was discovered that they had carried out a number of fraudulent transactions.Controls have since been implemented to prevent this reoccurring. The finance director has informed the audit manager that she only intends to disclose the amount of remuneration payable to each director in the financial statements.Local legislation in the country in which Lapis Co is based requires disclosure of the names of the directors and the total amount of remuneration payable to each director. One of Lapis Co's suppliers is offering the company an annual rebate on the condition that it purchases a minimum number of units by 30 September 20X5.The amount of the rebate willbe claimed in November 20X5.It is likely from orders placed to date and forecast orders that Lapis Co will exceed the minimum volume required to claim this rebate,therefore,it is anticipated that the draft financial statements will include a receivable of$0.8m. Lapis Co is developing a new smart television model.All $1.6m of costs incurred to date willbe capitalised within intangible assets by the year end.The model is stillunder development and it is not anticipated that it will be available for commercial production until 20X6. In order to finance the development of the new smart television model,Lapis Co secured a $2.5m interest-bearing bank loan in April 20X5.This is repayable in arrears over four years in quarterly instalments. The directors of Lapis Co are intending to propose a final dividend once the financial statements are finalised. (a)In line with ISA 220 Quality Management for an Audit of Financial Statements,describe the auditor's responsibilities in relation to supervising and reviewing the work performed during the external audit of Lapis Co. Note:You do not need to refer to the scenario to answer this requirement. (4 marks) 本题核心知识点：Quality management 题目类型：word 官方答案： (a)Quality management Overall,the audit engagement partner is required to take responsibility for overall supervision of the audit and reviews performed;however,this work is often performed by other senior members of the audit team. Supervision GOLDEN ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM During the audit of Lapis Co,the auditor should keep track of the progress of the audit engagement,which includes monitoring progress against the audit plan,assessing whether the objective of work performed has been achieved and considering the ongoing adequacy of assigned resources. The competence and capabilities of individual members of the engagement team should be considered,with on-the-job training and coaching provided to develop skills and competencies where necessary. Supervision also includes creating an environment where engagement team members can raise any concerns without fear of repercussion. In addition,part of the supervision process involves taking appropriate action to address any significant matters arising during the audit of Lapis Co and modifying the planned approach appropriately. The supervising auditor is also responsible for identifying matters for consultation or consideration by more experienced engagement team members such as the audit manager or audit engagement partner. Review The auditor would be required to review the work completed by the team and consider whether this work has been performed in accordance with the audit firm's policies,International Standards on Auditing and other regulatory requirements. The auditor should also consider whether all significant matters have been raised for audit engagement partner attention or for further consideration and,where appropriate consultations have taken place,whether appropriate conclusions have been documented. The auditor should consider if there is a need to revise the nature,timing and extent of work performed.The auditor should also consider if the objectives of the engagement procedures have been achieved and if the work performed supports the conclusions reached and has been properly documented. Overall,consideration should be given as to whether sufficient and appropriate evidence has been obtained to provide a basis for the auditor's opinion. 得分标准： (a)Quality management 1 mark per well-explained point Restricted to 4 知识点标签： Syllabus A Professional ethics &Quality management-4.Quality management-Engagement performance 难易程度：易 解析 ： 本题要求考生识别并解释财务报表审计的质量管理，描述审计师在监督和审查公司的工作中 所承担的责任。Quality management是考试中常见的默写分析题，需要考生掌握质量管理的内容。 Quality management 需要包括以下内容： Supervision 1.跟踪审核业务的进展，包括根据审核计划监控进展，评估所执行工作的目标是否已经实现，并 考虑分配资源的持续充分性。 2.应考虑审计项目组个别成员的能力和能力，并在必要时提供在职培训和指导，以发展技能和能 力 。 3.监督还包括创造一种环境，让项目团队成员可以提出任何担忧，而不必担心后果。 此外，监督过程的一部分包括采取适当的行动来解决在审计Lapis Co期间出现的任何重大问题， 并适当地修改计划的方法。 4.识别审计项目组更有经验的成员(如审计经理或审计业务合伙人)咨询或考虑的事项。 Review: 1.审计师将被要求审查小组完成的工作，并考虑这项工作是否按照审计公司的政策、国际审计准 则和其他监管要求进行。 2.考虑是否已提出所有重要事项以供审计业务合伙人注意或进一步考虑。 3.考虑是否需要修改所执行工作的性质、时间和范围。 4.考虑审计业务程序的目标是否已经实现，所开展的工作是否支持所得出的结论，并已适当记录。 总体而言，应考虑是否已获得充分和适当的证据，为审计意见提供依据。 事务所应采取措施确保审计业务的正确执行，良好的质量管理包括指导、监督和审查。考生可根 据分值相应作答，每点 一 分，有效回答4点即可。 本 题 核 心 知 识 点 ：Audit risk 题目类型：word (b)Describe EIGHT audit risks and explain the auditor's response to each risk in planning the audit of Lapis Co. (16 marks) (20 marks) 得分标准 ： (b)Audit risks and auditor's response Goods in transit Reliance on IA No allowance for receivables Warranty provision Fraud Directors'remuneration Rebate receivable Developmen expenditure New loan Dividend Other 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION Maximum 8 issues,2 marks each ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 22 222222 2222 22 2222 22 2222 2 2 2 2 16 知 识 点 标 签： Syllabus B Planning and risk assessment-3.Audit risk-Identifying audit risk 难易程度：难 解 析： 以下是本题详细考点解析，请考生注意考官判分规则：审计风险的识别0.5分，解释0.5分， 一 个 有 效response 为 1 分 。 Audit risk Auditor's response 答 案 1 : Lapis Co purchases its raw materials from overseas suppliers and has responsibility for goods at the point of dispatch,with materials in transit for up to six weeks. At the year end,there is a risk that cut-off may not be accurate and inventory,purchases and The audit team should undertake detailed cut-off testing of purchases of raw materials at the year end.The sample of shipping documentation immediately before and after the year end relating to goods from overseas suppliers should be increased to ensure that cut-off is complete payables may be understated as the company may not correctly recognise the raw materials from the point of dispatch. and accurate 解 析 ：Lapis Co从海外供应商那里采购原材料， 并负责发货点的货物，材料的运输时间最长可达 六周。 在年底，由于公司可能无法正确识别从发货点 开始的原材料，因此存在截件可能不准确，库 存，采购和应付账款可能被低估的风险。 Recommend:审计团队应在年底对原材料采购 进行详细的截止日测试。应增加与海外供应商货 物有关的年末前后运输文件样本，以确保截止日 完整准确。 答 案 2 : Indigo &Co may place reliance on the controls testing work undertaken by the internal audit (IA)department. If reliance is placed on work which is inadequate for the purposes of the audit,then the external audit team may form an incorrect conclusion on the strength of the internal controls at Lapis Co This could result in Indigo &Co performing insufficient levels of substantive testing,thereby increasing detection risk. The external audit team should meet with IA staff,read their reports and review their files relating to controls testing performed at the factories to ascertain the nature of the work undertaken.Before using the work of IA,the audit team will need to evaluate and perform audit procedures on the entirety of the work which they plan to use,in order to determine its adequacy for the purposes of the audit.In addition,the team will need to re-perform some of the testing carried outcby IA to assess its adequacy 解 析 ：Indigo&Co可信赖由内部审计(IA)部门进 行的控制测试工作。 如果内审的工作与审计目的不匹配，那么外部审计 团队可能会对Lapis Co的内部控制的有效性得出 不正确的结论。这可能导致Indigo&Co执行的实 质性测试程度不足，从而增加检测风险。 Recommend:外部审核小组应与内部审计人员 会面，阅读他们的报告，并审阅他们控制测试的 文件，以确定所进行工作的性质。在使用内部审 计的工作之前，审计小组需要对他们计划使用的 整个工作进行评估和执行审计程序，以确定其是 否足以达到审计的目的。此外，小组将需要重新 执行内部监督进行的部分测试，以评估其是否足 够。 答 案 3 : A significant wholesale customer has informed Lapis Co that it is experiencing financial difficulties.Lapis Co's finance director does not believe an allowance for receivables is required in the draft financial statements for the year ending 30 September 20X5. There is a risk that trade receivables will be overvalued.This customer balance may not be recoverable and so trade receivables will be overstated and the allowance for receivables understated if an allowance is not recognised Review and test the controls surrounding the way in which the finance director identifies old or potentially irrecoverable receivables balances and other credit control processes to ensure that they are operating effectively. Review correspondence with this customer and discuss with the finance director the rationale for not maintaining an allowance for receivables, despite the financial difficulties experienced by this customer.Extend post year-end cash receipts testing,in particular for this significant customer,in order to assess valuation and the need for an allowance for receivables 解 析 ：一个重要的批发客户通知Lapis公司，它正 在经历财政困难。Lapis公司的财务总监认为，在 截至2015年9月30日的年度财务报表草案中不需 要对应收账款形成坏账准备。 应收账款存在被高估的风险。该客户的应收账款余 额可能无法收回，因此，如果不确认一项抵减，则 贸易应收款项将被高估，而应收款项的抵减将被低 估。 Recommend:审查和测试财务总监识别旧的或 可能无法收回的应收账款余额和其他信贷控制 程序的控制方式，以确保它们有效运作。 审查该客户的回函，并与财务总监讨论不做坏账 准备的理由，尽管该客户经历了财务困难。延长 年终现金收入测试，特别是针对这一重要客户， 以评估估值和应收款坏账准备的需要。 答案4: The company changed one of its television speaker suppliers in December 20X4 to a cheaper alternative and this has led to an increase in warranty claims for television speaker deficiencies. If the overall number of customers claiming on the warranty has increased,then the warranty provision should possibly be higher.As the finance director is anticipating that the overall level of the provision will be similar to the prior year,there is a risk the provision and expenses are understated. Discuss with management their procedures for estimating the warranty provision and specifically if they have identified the reason for the increase in claims and the effect of this on the estimate.Review the level of claims received during the year and post year end and compare this to the provision made at the year end to assess the adequacy of the provision. 解 析 ：该公司于2004年12月将其铲平供应商之 改为更便宜的替代品，这导致产品缺陷的保修索赔 增加。 如果要求保修的客户总数增加了，那么预计负债可 能应该更高。由于财务主任预计预计负债的总体水 平将与上一年相似，因此有可能低估预计负债和费 用。 Recommend:与管理层讨论其评估预计负债的 程序，特别是他们是否确定了索赔增加的原因及 其对评估的影响。审查在年度和年度结束后收到 的索偿数额，并将其与年终的预计负债数额进行 比较，以评估预计负债是否充足。 答 案 5 : In May 20X5,a payroll clerk was dismissed as they had carried out fraudulent transactions at Lapis Co.Controls have since been implemented to prevent this reoccurring.There is a risk that the clerk may have undertaken a significant number of fraudulent transactions which have not yet been identified. The loss as a result of the fraudulent transactions would need to be written off to the statement of profit or loss.If these have not been discovered, profit may be misstated.Control risk is also increased as the controls previously in place did not prevent the fraud Discuss with the finance director the details of the fraud perpetrated by the payroll clerk and what procedures have been adopted to date to identify any adjustments which are needed in the financial statements.In addition,discuss with the finance director what additional controls have been put in place to identify any similar frauds.Additional substantive testing should be conducted over the affected areas of the accounting records,particularly payroll,to establish if there have been any further fraudulent transactions.In addition,the team should maintain their professional scepticism and be alert to the risk of further fraud and errors. 解 析 ：2015年5月，Lapis公司的一名应付职员因 进行欺诈性交易而被解雇。此后实施了控制措施， 以防止此类事件再次发生。有一种风险是，该职员 可能进行了大量尚未查明的欺诈交易。 欺诈交易造成的损失需要在损益表上一笔勾销。如 果这些没有被发现，利润可能会被错报。控制风险 也增加了，因为以前的控制措施并没有防止欺诈 Recommend:与财务总监讨论应付职员欺诈的 细节，以及迄今为止采取了哪些程序来确定财务 报表中需要进行的调整。此外，与财务总监讨论 已经采取了哪些额外的控制措施来识别任何类 似的欺诈行为。应对会计记录的受影响领域，特 别是薪金，进行进一步的实质性测试，以确定是 否有任何进一步的欺诈交易。此外，团队应保持 专业的怀疑态度，并警惕进一步欺诈和错误的风 险。 答案6: The directors only disclosed the amount of remuneration payable to each director,which does not comply with local legislation which also requires the names of the directors to be disclosed. The directors'remuneration disclosure will not be complete and accurate if the names and individual total payments are not disclosed and hence the financial statements will be misstated as a result of the non-compliance. ’Discuss this matter with management and review the requirements of the local legislation to determine if the disclosure in the financial statements is included appropriately.If disclosure is inadequate,then request management to amend the directors' remuneration disclosures and review for compliance with local legislation 解 析 ：董事只披露每位董事的薪酬数额，这并不符 合当地法律的规定，因为法例亦要求披露董事的姓 名。 GOLDEN ED 如果没有披露董事的姓名和个人付款总额，则披露 的董事薪酬将不完整和准确，从而导致财务报表因 不合规而被错报。 Recommend:与管理层讨论此事，并审查当地 立法的要求，以确定财务报表中的披露是否适 当。如果披露不充分，则要求管理层修改董事薪 酬披露，并审查是否符合当地法律。 答案7: Lapis Co is planning to include a $0 ·8m receivable relating to a supplier rebate based on purchases for the year. The receivable should only be recognised if the company has purchased the required volume levels and the amount claimed is virtually certain to be received.If the annual volumes are overstated,then the value of the receivable recognised may be overstated and cost of sales may be understated. Discuss with management the basis of the rebate calculation and agree the calculations back to supporting documentation,including the contract with the supplier.Review post year-end correspondence with the supplier for evidence of the rebate being applied or post year-end bank statements for evidence of receipt 解 析 ：Lapis Co计划计入一笔80万美元的应收账 款，这笔款项与供应商今年的采购回扣有关。 只有当公司购买了所需的数量，且索赔金额几乎肯 定会收到时，才应确认应收账款。如果年销售量被 高估，则确认的应收帐款价值可能被高估，销售成 本可能被低估。 Recommend:与管理层讨论返利计算的基础， 并将计算结果与支持性文件相比较，包括与供应 商的合同。审核与供应商的回函，以证明退税已 被申请，或审查年终银行对账单，以证明收款。 答 案 8 : Lapis Co intends to capitalise within intangible assets all costs incurred of $1 ·6m in respect of the development of a new smart television model.IAS®38 Intangible Assets requires research costs to be expensed to profit or loss and only development costs which meet specific criteria to be capitalised as an intangible asset.All of this expenditure has been included as an intangible asset.If research costs have been incorrectly classified as development expenditure,there is a risk that intangible assets are overstated and expenses understated Obtain a breakdown of the expenditure capitalised and agree to supporting documentation as to whether the costs relate to the research or development stage.Discuss the accounting treatment with the finance director to assess whether the criteria for capitalisation under IAS 38 are being met 解 析 ：Lapis Co打算将因开发一款新型智能电视 而产生的160万美元的所有成本计入无形资产。国 际会计准则第38号无形资产要求将研究费用计入 损益，只有符合特定标准的开发成本才能作为无形 资产资本化。所有这些支出都作为无形资产计入。 如果研究费用被错误地分类为开发支出，就有可能 高估无形资产而低估费用。 Recommend:取得已资本化的开支细目，并将 有关费用明细与研究或发展阶段有关的证明文 件相对比。与财务总监讨论会计处理，以评估是 否符合《国际会计准则第38号》的资本化标准。 答 案 9 : A $2 ·5m interest bearing loan was obtained in April 20X5 and will be repaid in quarterly instalments over four years. If the loan is not allocated correctly between non-current and current liabilities,this would lead to a classification error with current and non-current liabilities being misstated.In addition,the company may fail to accrue for the interest,resulting in finance costs and accruals being understated Review the loan agreement.to confirm the details and re-perform the company's calculations to confirm that the loan has been correctly split between non-current and current liabilities.Recalculate the interest accrual and agree the amount to finance costs and the accruals schedule 解 析 ：一笔250万美元的有息贷款于2015年4月 获得，将在四年内按季度分期偿还。 如果贷款没有在非流动负债和流动负债之间正确 分配，这将导致分类错误，误报流动负债和非流动 负债。此外，公司可能无法计提利息，导致财务成 本和应付账款被低估。 Recommend:审查贷款协议以确认细节，并重 新执行公司的计算，以确认贷款在非流动负债和 流动负债之间已正确划分。重新计算应计利息， 并就融资成本和应计利息表的金额达成一致。 答案10: The directors are intending to propose a final dividend once the financial statements are finalised.In line with IAS 10 Events after the Reporting Period,the dividend is a non-adjusting event and should not be recognised as a liability in the 20X5 financial Discuss the issue with management and confirm that the dividend will not be recognised within liabilities in the 20X5 financial statements.The financial statements need to be reviewed to ensure that adequate disclosure of the proposed dividend is included in compliance with IAS 10. statements.The obligation only arises once the dividend is declared,and this occurs post year end.The dividends should,however,be disclosed in the notes to the financial statements assuming they are declared before the financial statements are authorised for issue. If the dividend is recognised,it will result in an overstatement of liabilities.Failing to disclose the proposed dividend will result in a lack of completeness of disclosure. 解 析 ：一旦财务报表定稿，董事们打算提议进行最 后一次分红。根据《国际会计准则第10号：报告期 后事件》,支付股息是一项非调整事项，不应在 20X5财务报表中确认为负债。这项义务在分红宣 布后即出现，但题目中的事件发生在资产负债表日 后。但是，如果股息是在财务报表授权发行之前宣 布的，则应在财务报表附注中披露股息。 如果股息被确认，就会导致负债的夸大。未披露此 事件将导致披露不完整。 Recommend:与管理层讨论该问题，并确认股 息不会在20X5的财务报表的负债中确认。需要 对财务报表进行审查，以确保股息的充分披露符 合国际会计准则第10号。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM Case 3-Q18 题目 This scenario relates to five requirements. It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit supervisor of Owl &Co,responsible for the final audit of Heron Co for the year ended 31 May 20X5 which is due to commence shortly.Heron Co is a manufacturer of colour dyes used in the textile industry.Its draft financial statements show total assets of $65.4m and profit before tax of$8.9m.The following matters have been brought to your attention: Additions to plant and equipment Heron Co incurred significant capital expenditure in the year as it purchased a new manufacturing line.All costs incurred in the purchase and installation of the manufacturing line have been recognised as plant and equipment within non-current assets.The amount capitalised of $3.6m includes the purchase price of $2.7m,delivery and installation costs of $0.3m,refundable purchase tax of $0.5m and $0.1m incurred in training staff on how to operate the new plant and equipment. In addition to the $3.6m capitalised,Heron Co incurred costs of $0.2m testing the quality of the dye being produced by the new manufacturing line.The finance director has also capitalised this cost within plant and equipment.Heron Co started using the new manufacturing line in December 20X4 and it has a useful life of eight years. Bank balances The bank figure included in Heron Co's draft financial statements comprises four bank account balances:an overdraft of $2.4m which is the company's main current account and a total of $0.6m relating to three savings accounts.The finance director has informed the audit team that all four accounts have been reconciled as at the year end. Provision for legal claim Parrot Co,a customer of Heron Co,has made a claim for $0.8m against the company.Parrot Co is claiming that a customised yellow dye purchased from Heron Co in March 20X5 was sub-standard and that,as a result,Parrot Co had to scrap a large batch of clothes it was producing.The finance director has included a provision of $0.6m in the draft financial statements for the year ended 31 May 20X5 as she believes that this is the likely sum to be paid to settle the claim.The yellow dye was not sold to any other customers and Heron Co does not hold any inventory of the dye at the year end. (a)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to the matters identified regarding Heron Co's ADDITIONS to plant and equipment. (5 marks) 题目类型： word 官方答案： -Obtain the detailed breakdown of the costs incurred for the new manufacturing line,cast the breakdown and confirm that it is included in the non-current assets register in order to confirm completeness of the addition. -Confirm the purchase price of $2·7m and delivery and installation costs of $0·3m to supplier invoices and that the invoices are in the name of Heron Co in order to confirm valuation and rights and obligations. -Discuss the treatment of the refundable purchases tax of $0·5m with the finance director as this should be excluded from cost.Agree to inclusion in the tax control account. -Request that management expenses the $0·1m training costs and to profit or loss as they are not eligible for capitalisation.Confirm to ajournal entry that the adjustment has been made. -Review the breakdown of the costs of $0·2m incurred when testing the new line.Discuss with management and agree to supporting documentation to confirm the nature of these costs to ensure they are eligible for capitalisation. -Select a samplefrom the non-current assets register and physically verify the new manufacturing line on the factory floor to confirm existence. -Discuss with management the basis of the eight-year useful life and how it was derived and agree to supporting documentation such as the replacement policy. -Recalculate the depreciation charge to confirm that the calculations have been appropriately time apportioned and that depreciation only commenced from December 20X4 when the asset was bought into use. 得分标准： (a)Substantive procedures for plant and equipment 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 5 知识点标签： Syllabus DAudit evidence-D4 The audit of specific items -evidence in relation to non-current assets 难易程度： 中 解析 ： 本题考察的是对于固定资产新增的审计，注意这里的refundable purchase tax 可抵扣进项税 税 和training staff cost 培训费是不可以计入固定资产的初始计量成本的。 因此可以拿到新增固定资产的明细进行加总，对于2.7m 的买入成本和0.3m 的配送安装费， 应当核对至发票来确认其准确性和权利归属。同时，可抵扣进项税应作为应付税费的抵减， 培训费应作为费用出现，不能在固定资产的账上体现。 将0.5m 的测试费用对照到相关的单据，确保其满足资本化的条件。 实地盘点固定资产来确认存在性。并且对于固定资产的折旧，评估其折旧政策的合理性，同 时重新计算 ， 确保折旧费用计算的准确性 。 每条一分，写出5条即可。 (b)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to Heron Co's bank balances. (5 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案 ： -Obtain a bank confirmation letter from Heron Co's bankers for all four of its accounts. -Agree all balances listed on the bank confirmation letter to the company's bank reconciliations or the trial balance/general ledger in order to ensure completeness of bank balances. -For the current account,obtain Heron Co's bank reconciliation and cast it to check the additions in order to ensure arithmetical accuracy. -Agree the balance per the bank reconciliation to an original year-end bank statement and to the bank confirmation letter. -Agree the reconciliation's balance per the cash book to the year-end cash book. -Trace allthe outstanding lodgements to the pre year-end cash book,post year-end bank statement and also to the paying-in book pre year end. -Trace all unpresented cheques through to a pre year-end cash book and post year-end bank statement.For any unusual amounts or significant delays,obtain explanations from management. -Examine any old unpresented cheques to assess whether they need to be written back. -Review the cash book and bank statements for any unusual items or large transfers around the year end,as this could be evidence of window dressing. -Examine the bank confirmation letter for details of any security provided by Heron Co,with regards to the bank overdraft or any legal right of set-off as these may require disclosure. -For the savings accounts,review any reconciling items on the year-end bank reconciliations and agree to supporting documentation -Review the financial statements to ensure that the disclosure of bank balances is complete and accurate,and that the overdraft is within current liabilities and the savings accounts within current assets 得分标准 ： (b)Substantive procedures for provision for bank balances 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 5 知 识 点 标 签 ：Syllabus DAudit evidence-D4 The audit of specific items-bank and cash 难易程度： 中 解 析 ： 本题考察的是银行账户的审计。 对于银行账户，审计师应亲自获取函证，并与企业做出的银行余额调节表进行对照，确保账 户的完整性。重新计算银行余额调节表的数据以证明准确性。将银行余额调节表上的数字与 银行对账单、企业现金帐，以及期末报表数字进行对照。 如有企收银未收和企付银未付，了解原因并检查调节是否正确。如有长期未支付的支票，检 查是否需要进行转回。如果在年底有大额的转账记录，检查明细并调查原因，评估是否有粉 饰报表的迹象。 对于透支款，检查是否存在相关的抵押，如果有抵押，应在报表附注进行正确披露；对于存 款账户，将调整项对照到银行余额调节表和其他相关支持性文件。并确保所有与存款、透支 款相关的事项都在披露中正确体现。 每条一分，写出5条即可。 (c)Describe substantive procedures the auditor should perform to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence in relation to Heron Co's provision for the legal claim. (5 marks) 题目类型： word 官方答案： -Discuss with management the facts of the case to determine the nature of the claim and why only $0·6m provided. -Review correspondence with Heron Co's lawyers or,with the client's permission,obtain confirmation from the client's lawyer about the likely outcome and possibility of payment. -Inspect correspondence received from the customer regarding the claim in order to assess whether a provision should be recognised and,if so,whether the amount of the provision is reasonable. -Inspect the post year-end cash book and bank statements to identify whether any payments have been made and compare any actual payments to the amounts provided in the financial statements. -Inspect relevant board minutes and discuss with the finance director to ascertain whether payment is probable and the basis for the provision. -Review the expense accounts in the statement of profit or loss for inclusion of legal costs and agree to correspondence from the legal advisers. -Obtain a written representation from management that they believe the provision is valued appropriately and is complete. -Review the financial statement disclosures relating to the provision to ensure they are in compliance with IAS 37 Provisions,Contingent Liabilities and Contingent Assets 得分标准： (c)Substantive procedures re provision for legal claim 1 mark per well-described procedure Restricted to 5 高 顿 教 育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 知识点标签： Syllabus D Audit evidence -D4 The audit of specific items -Non-current liabilities,provisions and contingencies 难易程度： 中 解析： 本题考察的是对于预计负债的审计，这里涉及与客户之间的诉讼，因此需要了解经济利益流 出的可能性，以此来评估是否需要计提预计负债。 与客户管理层讨论，了解0.6m 预计负债确认的合理性。向客户的律师发函证，并获取客户 与原告之间的往来信函，评估预计负债的可能性和合理性。 检查期后付款情况，并与本期计提的预计负债做对比，同时检查董事会会议记录，了解未来 经济利益的流出的可能性是否能达到很可能。 检查利润表，确保与预计负债相关的费用已经正确计量。获取管理层声明书，得到管理层关 于预计负债准确性和完整性的保证。最后检查与预计负债相关的披露，确保其与IAS 37 准则 规定是一致的。 每条一分，写出5条即可。 It is now 28 August 20X5 and the audit of Heron Co is almost complete.The auditor's report is due to be signed shortly.The following matter has been brought to your attention: On 14 July 20X5,Sparrow Co,a customer of Heron Co with a receivables balance of $692,000 at 31 May 20X5,notified Heron Co that it was experiencing significant cash flow difficulties and would be unable to make any payments for the foreseeable future.The finance director of Heron Co believes that as Sparrow Co is a long-standing customer and has been trading for many years, the outstanding amount will be received in full in due course,and has therefore not adjusted the receivable balance in the financial statements for the year ended 31 May 20X5. (d)(i)Explain whether the 20X5 financial statements of Heron Co require amendment in relation to the outstanding balance with Sparrow Co;and (ii)Describe TWO audit procedures which should be performed in order to form a conclusion on any required amendment. (5 marks) (20 marks) 题目类型： word 官方答案： Subsequent event (i) The information regarding Sparrow Co's cash flow difficulties was received on 14 July 20X5,after the year end,but provides further evidence of the recoverability of the receivable balance at the year end.If Sparrow Co is experiencing cash flow difficulties just a few months after the year end,it is highly unlikely that the $692,000 was recoverable as at 31 May 20X5 and hence this is an adjusting event in accordance with IAS 10 Events after the Reporting Period. The receivables balance is overstated and consideration should be given to adjusting this balance,if material,either through the use of an allowance for receivables or by writing off the balance relating to Sparrow Co depending on the assessment of the recoverability of the balance. The total amount outstanding at the year end was $692,000 and is material as it represents 7·8%(0·692m/8·9m)of profit before tax and 1-1%(0·692m/65·4m)of total assets.Hence the directors should amend the 20X5 financial statements by making an allowance or by writing off the receivable balance relating to Sparrow Co, depending on their assessment. (ii) The following audit procedures should be applied to form a conclusion as to the adjustment: -The correspondence with the customer should be reviewed to assess whether there is any likelihood of payment. -Discuss with management and review board minutes to obtain an understanding as to why they feel an adjustment is not required. GOLDEN EDUCATION ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM -Review the post year-end cash book and bank statements to see if any payments have been received from the customer. 得分标准： (d)Subsequent event (i) Discussion of issue (ii) Procedures 1 mark per well described procedure Restricted to Total marks 知识点标签： Syllabus E Review and reporting-E.1.Subsequent events -The procedures for performing a subsequent events review 难易程度： 中 解 析 ： 本题考察的对于期后事项的评价与处理。这里讨论的是由于客户破产，导致应收账款无法收 回的事项。对该事项的讨论如下： 1)定性，这里是期后发生的事项，对于本期已经存在的事项提供了进一步证据，也就 是在期后得知了本期的应收账款无法收回，因此应被判定为调整事项。 2)对于报表的影响：这一事项会导致本期应收账款高估，因此要进行调整，计提坏账 或者坏账准备。 3)重要性水平的判断：根据计算，这一事项已经达到了重要性水平，因此需要调整， 否则将影响报表意见。 审计程序： 1)获取往来信函，评估应收账款是否还有收回的可能性。 2)针对管理层不调整的做法，与管理层讨论，并评估合理性。 3)检查期后收款情况，以确定应收账款在期后是否实际收回。 每条一分，写出5条即可。 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION December 2018 1.Which of the following details should be disclosed in respect of the revaluation of the head office if the auditor is to conclude that the disclosures are adequate? (1)Effective date of the revaluation (2)Name of the valuer (3)The amount of the revaluation increase (4)Carrying amount of the head office under the cost model A.1,2 and 3 only B.1,3 and 4 only C.2,3 and 4 only D.1,2,3 and 4 答案：B 解析： 本题考察如果审计师要保证总部办公室重估金额披露充分恰当，需要披露哪些详细信息。 根据国际财务报告准则IAS 16 PPE规定：对于采用重估模型进行核算的PPE, 需要在财务 报告中披露重估日期、重估增值的金额以及在成本模型核算下资产的账面价值，而对重估人 的姓名不作披露要求，故答案选B。 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D6 the work of others 难易程度：中 2.All adjustments required by the auditors of X Co have been made to the financial statements with the exception of an adjustment relating to faulty goods held in inventory at the year end.The audit work concluded that the cost of this inventory exceeded its net realisable value by $2.9m. The directors dispute the audit team's figures and believe that the realisable value of the inventory still exceeds its cost.Profit before tax for the year was $131.4m. Which of the following correctly describes the effect of this matter on the auditor's report? A.Unmodified opinion with no further disclosure B.Unmodified opinion with disclosure in an emphasis of matter paragraph C.Qualified opinion due to material misstatement D.Qualified opinion due to inability to obtain sufficient appropriate audit evidence 答案：A 解析： 本题考察如果残次存货在报表上的金额未经减值调整，审计师应当发表什么审计意见以及如 何影响审计报告。 $2·9m/$131·4m=2.2%<5%, 残次存货的错报金额不超过PBT 的 5 % , 说 明 不 属 于material misstatement 重大错报，可以不调整，也不需要强调事项段加以说明。因此审计师可以发表 标准无保留意见的审计报告，故答案选A。 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-D5 the independent auditor's report 难易程度：中 March 2019 1.Which of the following must be included in an unmodified auditor's report? (1)A statement that the auditor believes the audit evidence obtained is sufficient and appropriate (2)Title indicating the report is that of the independent auditor (3)Description of the meaning of materiality (4)A statement that the auditor is independent of the entity and has fulfilled their ethical responsibilities A.1,2 and 3 only B.1 and 3 only C.2 and 4 only D.1,2,3 and 4 答案：D 解析： 本题考查根据ISA 国际审计准则相关要求，哪些事项应该体现在标准无保留意见的审计报 告中。 (1)一份审计师在审计过程中获取了充分恰当的审计证据的声明，应体现在无保留意见的 审计报告中的基础意见段里，正确； (2)应体现在无保留意见的审计报告的开头，用来和其他报告加以区分，正确 (3)重要性水平的含义，应体现在无保留意见审计报告中，审计师对财务报表的职责部分， 正确 (4)一份审计师确保独立性，并履行了相应道德职责的声明，无保留意见的审计报告中的 基础意见段里，正确； 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-D5 the independent auditor's report 难易程度：易 2.The auditors have discovered that the chairman's report of XYZ Co,a listed company,is inconsistent with the financial statements and it has been determined that the material inconsistency is in the chairman's report. Which of the following auditor's reports will be issued for XYZ Co if the directors refuse to amend the inconsistency? A.Qualified opinion with the material inconsistency explained in an other matters paragraph B.Unmodified opinion with the material inconsistency explained in the other information section C.Qualified opinion with the material inconsistency explained in an emphasis of matter paragraph D.Unmodified opinion with the material inconsistency explained in the key audit matters section 答案： B 解析：本题考查考生对ISA 国际审计准则具体规定的掌握和理解。题目信息未表示 financial statements 存在重大错报，因此审计意见应该是unmodified opinion。但 ISA720 要求：如果 被审计方的其他信息(此题为chairman's report)与财报信息存在重大不一致，则应该在审 计报告的other information section中加以声明。 知识点标签： knowledge of the International Standards on Auditing(ISAs) 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-D5 the independent auditor's report 难易程度：难 June 2019 Example 1 X Co is a listed company and has an audit committee. Which of the following responsibilities should be included within the terms of reference for the audit committee? (1)Reviewing and monitoring the external auditor's independence and objectivity (2)Appointing and removing the external auditors (3)Evaluating and monitoring the effectiveness of the internal audit function A.1,2 and 3 B.1 and 2 only C.1 and 3 only D.2 and 3 only 答案：C 解析：本题考察审计委员会职责的知识点。 描述1:复核以及监督外部审计师的独立性以及客观公正。这属于审计委员会的责任。 描述2:任命以及解聘外部审计师。外部审计师的任命以及解聘属于shareholder(股东)的权 力，审计委员会仅仅可以建议外部审计师的任命以及解聘，因此描述2不正确。 描述3:评估以及监督内部审计职能的有效性。这属于审计委员会的责任。 故选C。 知识点标签： Corporate governance -audit committee 知识点标签：Syllabus A audit framework and regulation-A3 corporate governance-the roles of audit committees 难易程度：中 Example 2 A&Co is the auditor of Z Co for the year ended 31 December 20X8.The detailed audit work is due to be completed by 30 June 20X9.The directors are planning to approve the financial 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION statements on 31 July 20X9 and then issue them to the shareholders on 15 August 20X9.The management of Z Co has performed an assessment of the company's ability to continue as a going concern based on a cash flow forecast prepared to 31 December 20X9. To which date must A&Co's assessment cover when evaluating management's assessment of Z Co's ability to continue as a going concern? A.30 June 20X9 B.31 July 20X9 C.15August 20X9 D.31 December 20X9 答案：D 解析：本题考察可持续经营假设的知识点。 案例描述，Z Co的资产负债表日为20X8.12.31; 现场审计工作预计于20X9.6.30 完成；管理 层计划于20X9.7.31批准财务报告并于20X9.8.15向股东公告财务报告。Z Co的管理层已经 基于截至20X9.12.31的现金流预测，进行了可持续经营能力的评估。 问题为，审计师对被审计单位管理层的可持续经营能力评估进行复核时，应该涵盖到哪一天。 可持续经营假设中，需对可预见的将来的可持续经营能力进行评估，可预见的将来通常是指 资产负债表日后十二个月。在本题中，即为31 December 20X9。 故选C。 知识点标签：Syllabus E review and reporting-E2 going concern 难易程度：中 September 2019 Example 1 You have been assigned to the audit of bank and cash for X Co.X Co has a number of bank accounts and due to the nature of its business will hold a significant amount of cash at head office at the year end. Which of the following audit procedures included in the audit programme willtest for EXISTENCE of bank and cash? A.Agree a sample of accounts detailed on the bank confirmation letters to the trial balance B.Review all relevant bank statements to verify that the accounts are held under X Co C.Attend the cash count at the year end and reperform the count D.Review the disclosure included in the financial statements to verify only bank accounts per the bank letters are disclosed 答案：C 解析：本题考察实质性程序的知识点。针对银行存款以及现金的存在性应该执行哪些审计程 序 。 选项A: 在银行存款询证函中筛选样本，核对至科目余额表。提供的是completeness 完整性 相关的证据。 选项B: 复核所有的银行对账单，以确认这些账户属于被审计单位。提供的是rights and obligation 权力以及义务相关的证据。 选项C: 参加现金的盘点工作以及执行现金的重新盘点，可以提供现金流预测存在性相关的 证据。 选项D: 复核财务报告中的披露，以验证仅仅只有根据银行信函填写的银行账户被披露。提 供的是presentation 披露相关的证据。 故选C。 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items-bank and cash 难易程度：中 Example 2 One objective of the final overall review stage of the audit is to ensure that the evidence gathered in the course of the audit supports the audit opinion. Which of the following questions,which are answered as part of the final review,support this objective? (1)Was the audit plan suitably modified to allow for changing circumstances? (2)Has the audit firm's continued independence been considered? (3)Have all deficiencies in internal control been communicated to management? (4)Has work been performed in accordance with relevant auditing,legal and professional standards? B.1 and 2 C.2 and 3 D.3 and 4 答案：A 解析：本题考察审计完成阶段的知识点。审计总体复核阶段的一个目的是确保收集的审计证 据能够支撑审计结论。问以下哪一种说法可以作为完成阶段的一部分支撑这个目的? 选项1:审计计划是否有根据环境的变化进行恰当的修改。审计计划工作并非审计业务的一 个孤立阶段，而是一个持续的、不断修正的过程，贯穿于整个审计业务的始终。比如说：对 重要性水平的调整，对某类交易、账户余额和披露的重大错报风险评估的修改，以及对进一 步审计程序的修改，都会意味着对审计程序的修改。我们需要在完成阶段确保审计计划有根 据环境的变化进行恰当的修改，这样才能确保我们获取到了充分恰当的审计证据。因此，是 正确的。 选项2:是否有考虑会计师事务所的持续独立问题。这个问题会贯穿整个审计过程，但是不 会确保收集的审计证据能够支撑审计结论。 选项3:是否所有的内控缺陷都已向管理层沟通。审计师需要向管理层沟通重大缺陷而不是 所有缺陷。且该问题不会确保收集的审计证据能够支撑审计结论。 选项4:审计工作是否有根据相关的审计，法律以及职业标准执行。审计工作有根据相关的 审计，法律以及职业标准执行，能够增强审计工作的质量，会确保收集的审计证据能够支撑 审计结论。 故选 A。 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-E4 audit finalisation and the final review 难易程度：易 December 2019 Example 1 You are an audit manager working for W&Co which has audited X Co for the last seven years. The board has decided that X Co should be listed on a stock exchange and the board has asked W &Co to advise the company on how to become compliant with corporate governance guidelines. Which of the following are typical requirements contained within best practice corporate governance guidelines? (1)The remuneration committee should only consist of independent non-executive directors (2)The chief executive officer should be responsible for leadership of the board and ensuring its effectiveness (3)The non-executive directors should provide constructive challenge and strategic guidance (4)The audit committee's key role is appointing and liaising with the external auditor A.1 and 3 only B.2 and 4 only C.1,3 and4 D.2,3 and 4 答案：A 解析：本题考查公司治理的知识点。询问以下哪些描述符合公司治理的最佳实践。 选项1:薪酬委员会应由独立的非执行董事构成。 选项2: CEO 应负责领导董事会并确保其运行效率。该职责应由chairman 董事长履行，因 此是错误的。 选项3:非执行董事应提供建设性的质疑和战略指导。 选项4:审计委员会的主要职责是任命以及联系外部审计师。审计委员会的职责之一是联系 外部审计师，但是这并不是其主要职责。审计委员会也不负责任命外部审计师。任命外部审 计师的权力属于股东shareholder,审计委员会仅仅只能提供相关建议。因此是错误的。 故选 A。 知识点标签：Syllabus A audit framework and regulation-A3 corporate governance 难易程度：易 Example 2 It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit supervisor of Y&Co and have been assigned responsibility for completing the detailed going concern testing for Z Co for the year ended 30 April 20X5.Z Co's audit should be finalised and the financial statements signed by 30 September 20X5. Management's assessment of Z Co's ability to continue as a going concern covers the period to 30 November 20X5. Which of the following actions should Y&Co take in relation to Z Co's going concern assessment? A.Request that management extends the assessment period to 30 September 20X6 B.Request that management extends the assessment period to 30 April 20X6 C.Perform additional audit procedures to confirm Z Co's going concern status D.Review management's assessment to 30 November 20X5 and only request that it is extended if it raises doubt that Z Co is a going concern 答案：B 解析：本题考察可持续经营假设的知识点。 案例描述，现在的时间是20X5.7.1, 被审计单位的资产负债表日为20X5.4.30, 财务报表批准 日为20X5.9.30.被审计单位管理层对 Z Co(即被审计单位)可持续经营能力进行了评估，时间 涵盖到20X5.11.30. 问题为，审计师针对被审计单位管理层的可持续经营能力评估，应执行什么程序? 选项A: 要求管理层将评估时间延长至20X6.9.30. 选项B: 要求管理层将评估时间延长至20X6.4.30. 选项C: 执行其他的审计程序以确认被审计单位的可持续经营能力状态。 选项D: 复核管理层截至20X5.11.30 的可持续经营能力评估，仅在审计师对其可持续经营 能力有疑虑时要求其延长评估时间。 可持续经营假设中，需对可预见的将来的可持续经营能力进行评估，可预见的将来通常是指 资产负债表日后十二个月。因此，在本题中，对可持续经营假设的评估应涵盖到30 April 20X6。 故选B。 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-E2 going concern 难易程度：易 March 2020 Example 1 Which TWO of the following statements should be included in a written representation letter? A.All transactions have been recorded in the accounting records and are reflected in the financial statements B.Due to inherent limitations of the audit,there is a risk that some material misstatements will not be detected C.Professional judgement and scepticism have been exercised throughout the course of the audit D.Significant assumptions used in making accounting estimates are reasonable 答案：A&D 解析： A.所有交易均已记录在会计记录中，并反映在财务报表中 B.由于审计的固有局限性，存在无法发现某些重大错报的风险 C. 在整个审计过程中运用了专业判断和怀疑态度 D.作出会计估计时使用的重要假设是合理的 这个问题考察了ISA 580 Written Representations 。ISA 要求审计师就管理层的职责和A 选 项 所描述的内容提出书面陈述。同时还有许多其他国际审计准则要求特定的书面陈述。其中包 括 ISA 540审计会计估计，公允价值会计估计，以及书面形式的相关披露，如D 选项所描述。 B 选项的声明应该包含在letter of engagement,C 选项应该呈现在auditor report中。所以A 和 D 是正确答案。 CATION PLATINUM 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-E3 written representations 难易程度：易 Example 2 It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit manager at X&Co,currently finalising the audit of Y Co for the year ended 31 March 20X5.You are performing the final review in preparation for signing the auditor's report.During the year one of the company's properties was revalued by an independent expert valuer. Which TWO of the following are audit procedures X&Co should perform in conducting its overall review of the financial statements of Y Co? A.Make an assessment of Y Co's ability to continue as a going concern B.Design and perform analytical procedures to confirm the financial statements are consistent with the auditor's understanding of the entity C.Undertake money laundering identification procedures to reconfirm the identity of the directors ofY Co D.Assess the information obtained from the external expert in respect of the property revaluation E.Obtain and retain documentation to confirm the legal title of all non-current assets F.Reassess materiality to confirm whether it remains appropriate in the context of Y Co's final financial statements 答案：B&F 解 析 ： A.评 估Y 公司持续经营的能力 B.设计并执行分析程序，以确认财务报表符合审计师对实体的理解 C. 执行洗钱识别程序，以重新确认Y 公司董事的身份 D.评估从外部专家处获得的有关财产重估的信息 E.获取并保留文件，以确认所有非流动资产的法定所有权 F.重新评估重要性水平，以确认其在Y 公司的最终报告中是否仍然适用 C 、D和 E 的程序都是有效的审计程序，但C 对管理层进行反洗钱相关的背景调查属于项目 承接阶段的工作，D 和 E 作为现场工作的一部分进行。A 的程序无效，因为管理层将对公 司持续经营的能力进行评估，审计人员需要收集足够证据来说明管理层评估和使用持续经营 假设是恰当的。 知识点标签： Syllabus D audit evidence-D2 audit procedures-analytical procedures used as substantive procedures 难易程度：易 July 2020 1.It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit supervisor and are conducting the year-end audit of X Co. You are currently undertaking the audit testing in relation to non-current assets. Which TWO of the following procedures would provide substantive audit evidence in respect of the COMPLETENESS assertion for plant and machinery? A.For a sample of assets held in the factory and warehouse record the asset identity number as marked on the asset and trace back to the relevant entry in the non-current asset register B.Review board minutes to confirm that all major items of capital expenditure are noted and have been authorised C.Trace a sample of costs recognised in the repairs and maintenance account to invoices and determine the nature of the expenditure and assess whether any capital items have been expensed D.For a sample of fully depreciated assets,enquire with management to confirm whether the assets are still being used in the operations of X Co 答案：AC 解析：本题考察哪些实质性审计程序可以验证固定资产的完整性认定。 A 选项：在厂房选取一些固定资产，记录其编号并追查到固定资产登记簿中，这里的方向是 从实到账，即实际存在的固定资产在账上都有记录完整，所以可以验证完整性。 B 选项：检查董事会纪要，以确保所有重要的资本性支出都有被正确的记录和授权。这个是 test of control 而不是substantive procedures,即保证所有的重要支出都得到授权，可以相信 企业的内控，但并不能表示所有的支出都有被正确记录，因此B 选项无法证明完整性认定。 C 选项：在修理费用中选取一些样本并追查到发票，检查其支出性质，以确认没有资本性支 出被错误地计入了费用中，资本性支出没有错记漏记，这可以验证固定资产的完整性。 D 选项：对于已经全额计提完折旧的固定资产，询问管理层这些固定资产是否还在被公司使 用，即之前的折旧年限估计是否正确，折旧计算是否准确，这个查的是存货的Valuation计 价性认定。 知识点标签： Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：中 2.It is 1 July 20X5.A&Co are the external auditors of B Co for the year ended 31 March 20X5. B Co has sourced external finance for the first time during the year.The draft financial statements show non-current liabilities in relation to loan finance of$1.2m. Which of the following procedures should be performed to confirm the loan liability balance at the year end? (1)Review directors'board minutes for evidence of approval of the external finance (2)Agree the loan payments recorded in the general ledger to the bank statement to confirm capital has been repaid (3)Agree the year-end loan liability balance to the bank confirmation letter (4)Compare loan liabilities at the end of the year to balances in the previous year A.1 and 2 B.3 and 4 only C.1,3 and 4 D.2 and 3 答案：D 解析：本题考察哪些属于长期借款的审计程序。 选项(1):检查董事会纪要，以确保外部融资借款得到了正确的授权。这个是test of control 而不是substantive procedures, 即借款有正确授权，可以相信企业的内控，但并不能为长期 借款的任何一项认定提供证明，不属于实质性审计程序。 选项(2):将总账中长期借款的金额与银行对账单进行核对，以证明收到了对应的资金，这 里获取了来自银行的第三方证据，可以证明长期借款的准确性，符合题意。 选项(3):将长期借款的金额与银行回函进行核对，这里也是获取了来自银行的第三方证据， 可以证明长期借款的准确性，符合题意。 选项(4):将本年年末的长期借款与之前进行比较，这里题目中的公司是第一次获取外部融 资，之前没有长期借款，因此本年与往年的数据没有可比性，不符合题意。 知识点标签： Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：中 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION Sept/Dec 2020 It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit manager of Brown&Green Co and you are currently working on the completion stage of the audit of Strawberry Co,a listed company specialising in the manufacture of smart phone accessories,for the year ended 31 March 20X5.The draft financial statements of Strawberry Co show revenue for the year of $500m and total assets of $210m. You are reviewing the outcome of the audit work documented by your team.You have become aware of the following two issues: Issue 1-Reduction in sales On 18 March 20X5,the board of directors approved a strategic plan which will help it increase the sales of smart phone chargers in the future.The strategic plan is to upgrade Strawberry Co's manufacturing facilities,which will allow it to manufacture higher quality and technologically advanced products.To fund the planned upgrade,the company issued equity share capital to the general public in May 20X5,which generated cash of $4m. ONLINE DELIVERY PLATINUM Issue2-Letter from the government environmental agency Strawberry Co received a letter dated 15 May 20X5,from the government environmental agency advising that water samples taken from a public lake close to Strawberry Co's manufacturing site have shown traces of a harmful substance which is produced during its manufacturing process. The agency has concluded that Strawberry Co is the source of the contamination and is liable for a fine.The board of directors has denied any responsibility and have forwarded the case to the company's legal advisers.

stem_zh: Question 1 Which of the following statements correctly describes Brown &Green Co's responsibility in relation to subsequent events occurring between the date on which the auditor's report is signed and the date on which the financial statements are issued? A.Brown &Green Co should obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence and design audit procedures to ensure that all subsequent events are identified. B.Brown &Green Co should obtain a list of subsequent events from the directors of Strawberry Co and include these in the written representation letter C.Brown &Green Co has no duty to perform any procedures after the date on which the auditor's report is signed and therefore any subsequent events in this period will be dealt with in next year's audit D.Brown &Green Co should discuss any subsequent events they become aware of with the directors of Strawberry Co to determine whether the financial statements need amended 答案：D
explanation_zh: 本题考察审计师对于期后事项的责任。 本题的问题是，在审计报告签署日至财务报告发出日期间，审计师对于新发生的期后事项应 该付什么样的责任。在这个阶段，审计师只需要询问管理层，与管理层进行讨论，以确定报 告是否需要修改，故C 选项错误，D 选项正确。 在年末至审计报告签署前，审计师需要执行充分恰当的审计程序，确保所有的期后事项都被 发现，故A 选项错误。 审计师需要在审计报告签署前就问管理层获取 written representation来了解所有期后事项， 而非审计报告签署后，故B 选项错误。 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-E1 subsequent events 难易程度：易

stem_zh: Question 2 Explain,by choosing the relevant boxes in the statements below,how the issue of share capital should be treated in the financial statements of Strawberry Co. The issue of share capital is an adjusting an adjusting a non-adjusting event gives newinformation about an event that did not exist at year- enddateand it is matenialbecause itwas approved prior to year end andso gives information about events gives new information about an event that did not exist at year- enddate and it is matenial because it therefore it requiresexistingat year-end date therefore it requires to be accounted to be disclosed notreatment for in the current in the current in the current year financial year financial year financial statements statements statements 答案： a non-adjusting event,gives new information about an event that did not exist at year-end date,to be disclosed in the current year financial statements.
explanation_zh: 本题考察期后非调整事项的处理。 公司为了融资，在年后发行股票，但是这个活动与本年已经存在的事项没有关联，属于新的 一年发生的新事项，因此是非调整事项non-adjusting event, 只需在当年的报表后进行正确 披露即可，无需调整。 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-El subsequent events 难易程度：易

stem_zh: Question 3 The audit team has performed various substantive procedures in order to obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence relating to the potential fine for environmental damage. Which TWO of the following are appropriate audit procedures to perform in respect of the letter from the government environmental agency? A.Send a letter addressed to the government environmental agency to confirm the matter. B.Examine post year-end board meeting minutes to identify any reference to further developments of the case. C.Review the correspondence with the company's legal advisers to assess the probable outcome of the case. D.Test the effectiveness of the client's internal control systems in relation to the prevention of environmental damage. 答案：BC
explanation_zh: 本题考察期后事项的审计程序。 S 公司被认为给附近的水域带来了污染，可能会被罚款，题目的问题是哪些说法可以为这一 事项提供审计证据。 A 选项：给政府环保机构发询证函来验证此事。这个做法不恰当，审计师没有权限直接给环 保机构发函。 B 选项：检查期后的董事会纪要，已确认是否有此事进一步发展的记录。期后的讨论和发展 可以为此事的存在性和赔偿金额等提供进一步证据，进而帮助审计师判断这些事件有没有在 本年的报表上正确记录并披露。 C 选项：检查公司与律师的往来信函，以确定该事件可能的结果，这也可以为本年已经存在 的事件提供进一步审计证据。 D 选项：测试客户关于防止环境损害的内控系统是否有效，这是控制测试而非实质性审计程 序，也没办法为此事提供审计证据，因此不正确。 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-E1 subsequent events 难易程度：易

stem_zh: Question 4 Assuming 'Issue 2'is a material subsequent event,match the relevant audit opinion to the following two outcomes. t is probable that the government agencywill win the case,but as the letter wasreceived after the year end,the directorsdo not plan to account for or disclose it inthe financial statementsQualifiedIt is possible but not probable that thegovernment agency will win the case andtherefore the directors have disclosed thematter in the financial statementsAdverseDisclaimerModified with emphasis of mafterUnmodified with emphasis of matter t is probable that the government agency will win the case,but as the letter was received after the year end,the directors do not plan to account for or disclose it in the financial statements Qualified It is possible but not probable that the government agency will win the case and therefore the directors have disclosed the matter in the financial statements Adverse Disclaimer Modified with emphasis of mafter Unmodified with emphasis of matter 答 案 ：Outcome 1:Qualified,Outcome 2:Unmodified with emphasis of matter
explanation_zh: 本题考察审计意见段如何出具。 Outcome 1: 政府机构很有可能赢取诉讼(概率大于50%),即公司有必要对污染进行赔偿， 诉讼结果在年后才收到，但是管理层不想对此在本年的报表中进行披露。本题题干中假设这 是一个重大的期后事项，根据IAS 10 期后事项准则，此事应该在本年的报表中进行披露， 如果没有披露，则报表出现了重大错报，此时错报是重大但不广泛的(只影响了披露),所 以要出具qualified opinion。 Outcome 2: 政府有可能赢取诉讼(概率小于50%),而公司也正确在报表中披露该事项。也 就是说公司的做账没有问题，只是这个期后事项属于重大事项，需要引起报表使用者的注意， 因此出具的是 Unmodified opinion, 并 辅 以emphasis of matter 段落来强调该事项即可。注意， EOM 是在管理层正确做账，只是该事项需要进行强调的时候才会出现，即只会出现在 unmodified opinion 的报告当中。 知识点标签：Syllabus E review and reporting-E5 the independent auditor's report 难易程度：中

stem_zh: Question 5 The two issues will be included in a written representation from management.All audit work will be finished by 31 July 20X5.The auditor's report is due to be signed by Brown&Green Co on 28 September 20X5.Strawberry Co's board plans to issue the financial statements on 21 October 20X5 which will be followed by an annual general meeting on 30 October 20X5. Which of the following would be the most appropriate date for the directors of Strawberry Co to sign the written representation? A.31 July 20X5 B.28 September 20X5 C.21 October 20X5 D.30 October 20X5 GOLDEN EDUCATION 答案：B
explanation_zh: 本题考察管理层声明书的获取时间。 根据ISA 580 Written Representation准则规定，管理层说明书的获取时间要越靠近报告签署 时间越好，但是不可以晚于报告签署，这里最靠近报告签署日的就是28 September 20X5, 即报告签署当天，因此选择B 选项。 知识点标签：Syllabus E review and reporting-E3 written representations 难易程度：易 March/June 2021 It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit supervisor at York &Co and you are involved in the audit of Lancaster Co for the year ended 31 May 20X5.The company owns a significant amount of non-current assets including a number of properties. Additions,disposal and depreciation Lancaster Co depreciates its properties,on the straight-line basis,at a rate of 5%per annum.The draft depreciation charge on buildings for 20X5 is $2m compared with $1.7m in 20X4. On 31 May 20X5,Property A was sold for sales proceeds equal to 40%of its original cost.The property initially cost $6m and had been owned and depreciated for seven years. The audit programme includes the following tests to be carried out in relation to additions made during the year: (1)Agree a sample of additions recorded in the non-current asset register to the cash book and purchase invoice ensuring that the purchase date is accurate and it is recorded at the correct amount (2)Compare total budgeted additions to actual additions in the year and investigate and corroborate any significant differences Revaluation On 31 May 20X5,the directors had all of the company's remaining buildings revalued by an external expert.In the detailed audit approach it states that York &Co willrely on this valuation as part of the current year audit procedures.

stem_zh: Question 1 Which TWO of the following audit procedures would test for OVERSTATEMENT of Lancaster Co's non-current assets?
options_zh: ["A. Agree disposals recorded in the non-current asset register to cash book and sales invoice B.Physically inspect a sample of assets selected from the non-current asset register C.Inspect a sample of assets found at a location and agree to the non-current asset register D.Inspect the condition of assets held to determine the need for any impairment 答案：B,D 解 析 ： 题目问的是哪两个审计程序可以测试公司高估了固定资产。", "A. 将固定资产清单中记录的处置情况与现金账和销售发票进行核对，可以确认处置的发生 性，但不能确认固定资产是否高估。", "B. 对清单中抽样选取的固定资产进行实地检查，可以通过实地抽样检查的方式保证清单中 记录的固定资产都是真实存在的，没有高估，故此选项正确。", "C. 实地检查并抽取一些资产，与固定资产进行核对，这样只能保证记录的完整性，但是不 能确认是否高估。", "D. 检查资产的情况，看是否有减值的需要。这样做的目的是以免有些资产需要减值但是在 账上面并没有体现出来，那么就会导致账面高估，正确。 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：中"]

stem_zh: Question 2 Which of the following assertions are tested by the procedures included in the audit programme for additions? (1)Completeness (2)Classification (3)Existence (4)Accuracy,valuation and allocation A.1 and 3 only B.2 and 4 only C.1,3 and 4 only D.1,2,3 and 4 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目问的是题中针对新增资产 (additions)所做的程序都可以确认哪几个认定，题中关于这 部分有两个程序： (1) 对固定资产清单中记录的新增进行抽样，核对到现金账和采购发票，来确认采购日 期和金额的准确性。这一程序可以确认新增的资产是真实存在的 (existence), 并且对于资 产的估值是准确的 (Accuracy,valuation and allocation),还可以确认日期的cut-off, 但此题 选项中没有，所以同学们可以作为积累。 (2) 将预算的总新增和实际发生的新增进行比较，如有重大差异进行调查。这属于分析 性程序 (Analytical procedure), 首先将总数进行对比，可以判断完整性 (completeness), 也 可以保证新增的资产都是真实存在(existence), 也可以保证金额、估值是无误的(Accuracy, valuation and allocation)。但是因为这只是把总数之间进行比较，判断不出分类是否正确 (classification)。 故以上两个程序可以确认(1)(3)(4),选 C。 知识点标签： Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：中

stem_zh: Question 3 You are now considering substantive audit procedures for depreciation across all categories of non-current assets held by Lancaster Co. Which TWO of the following are substantive audit procedures for testing depreciation?
options_zh: ["A. Review the non-current asset register to ensure that all assets are assigned a useful life B.Perform a proof in total for the depreciation charge of $2m included in the financial statements and investigate any significant differences C.Review the board minutes for evidence of approval of useful lives D.Discuss with management the reasons for the $300,000 difference in the current year depreciation compared to the prior year 答案：B,D"]
explanation_zh: 题目问的是哪两个选项是测试折旧的实质性审计程序? A. 检查固定资产清单保证所有的资产都有确定使用年限，这属于对内控的测试 (test of control),不是实质性审计程序，错误； B. 对财报中$2m 的折旧费进行总数验证，对重大差异进行调查，这个属于分析性程序，也 属于实质性审计程序，正确； C. 检查董事会会议纪要看是否对使用年限进行了批准，这也是内控测试，错误； D. 和管理层讨论今年和去年$300,000折旧费的差异，这属于实质性审计程序，正确。 知识点标签： Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：中

stem_zh: Question 4 Recalculate the expected loss on disposal of Property A,giving your answer to ONE decimal place. $. m 答案：$1.5m
explanation_zh: 累计折旧：$6m*5%*7years=$2.1m 账面价值：$6m-$2.1m=$3.9m 处置价格：$6m*40%=$2.4m 出售亏损：$3.9m-$2.4m=$1.5m 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：易

stem_zh: Question 5 In respect of the revaluation,which TWO of the following statements regarding reliance on the external expert are TRUE? A.In line with ISA 620 Using the Work of an Auditor's Expert,reliance can only be placed on an expert appointed by York &Co B.Obtaining the valuation report would constitute sufficient and appropriate evidence over the carrying amount of the buildings C.Reference to the work of the external expert should not be included in the auditor's report D.The objectivity of the valuer must be assessed before placing reliance on the valuation report 答案：C,D
explanation_zh: 题目问的是关于重估，哪两个选项关于依赖外部专家的描述是正确的。 A.ISA 要求只能依赖事务所指派的专家，没有这种说法，错误； B. 获取到估值报告可以对建筑的账面价值获取到充分恰当的审计证据，错误。 只是获取报告不能成为充分恰当的审计证据，审计师需要对报告里面的内容以及专家进行评 估，来确认估值是否合理； C. 审计报告中不能指出外部专家，正确； D. 在使用估值报告之前必须先检测估值师的客观性，正确。 知识点标签： Syllabus E review and reporting-E5 the independent auditor's report 难易程度：中 Sept/Dec 2021 It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit supervisor of Willow&Co and you are involved in the audit of Ash Co for the year ended 31 May 20X5.You have been allocated responsibility for the audit of bank and cash and share capital. Bank and cash Ash Co has various accounts with two banking institutions.It holds a number of longstanding accounts with Silver Oak bank and a number of new accounts have been opened during the year with Moneytree bank.However,the management of Ash Co has refused to grant Willow &Co permission to obtain a bank confirmation letter from Moneytree bank.You have asked for an explanation but have not received a satisfactory response. The area of bank and cash has been deemed as high risk due to a number of errors which were found during the prior year audit.The audit engagement partner has therefore emphasised the importance of the procedures performed in this area of the financial statements Share capital During the year to 31 May 20X5,Ash Co issued 100,000$1 equity shares.Ash Co maintains all of its own records in this area.The audit engagement partner has raised concerns over whether the transaction has been carried out in compliance with appropriate laws and regulations.

stem_zh: Question 1 You are reviewing the audit plan for Ash Co and have allocated a number of procedures to be performed on bank and cash to your audit assistant.In order to help your audit assistant perform the work you want to give them more detail regarding the procedures. Which type of audit procedure is being demonstrated by each of the following tests included in the audit plan of Ash Co? obtain Ash Co's bank reconciliation and cast to ensure mathematical accuracy REPERFORMANCE NSPECTION RECALCULATION EXTERNAL CONFIRMATION obtain a bank confirmation ltter from Ash Co's bankers REPERFORMANCE INSPECTION RECALCULATION EXTERNAL CONFIRMATION Perform a cash count for comparison with the results of the cash count conducted by Ash Co REPERFORMANCE INSPECTON RECALCULATION EXTERNAL CONFIRMATION 答案GOLDEN EDUCATION 答案 Test 1=recalculation, Test2=External confirmation, Test 3=Reperformance. 解 析 ： 这道题主要考察考生对不同类型审计流程的了解，审计师在审计过程中是如何使用和获取的 审计证据的。 第一个，复核银行对账单来保证其数字的准确性，这个执行的是recalculation procedure 重新 计算程序。 第二个，获取银行询证函是通过银行这种第三方来进行验证，属于external confirmation。 第三个，尽管客户公司已经进行过现金盘点，审计再次执行现金盘点并且和账面金额进行核 对属于reperformance procedure 重新执行。 知识点标签： Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items 难易程度：中

Question 2 Your audit assistant has gathered the following audit evidence in relation to bank and cash: (1)Print out from Ash Co's online banking system provided by the accounts clerk (2)Bank reconciliation prepared by the audit assistant using client documents (3)Results of cash count performed by internal audit (4)Bank confirmation letter received from Silver Oak bank In order to respond to the increased level of risk you want to make sure you are using the most reliable evidence. Which of the following options correctly ranks the audit evidence,starting with the MOST reliable? A.2,4,1,3 B.2,3,4,1 C.4,3,1,2 D.4,2,3,1 答案：D
explanation_zh: ISA 500审计证据表明，用于审计的信息的可靠性证据受其来源、性质和所处环境的影响。 可以概括如下： -当审计证据从外部独立的实体获取，其可靠性会提高 -当内控是有效的，内部生成的证据的可靠性会提高 -审计师直接获得的审计证据更可靠 -书面形式的审计证据比口头的证据更可靠 就Ash Co收集的证据而言，从Ash Co的银行收到的信函(4)是最可靠的。这是证据来自 实体之外的独立第三方。审计师提供的证据通常被视为可靠的证据 但是在(2)中描述中，对账单是通过客户的账户文件编制的，其可靠性会有所影响。审计 证据(1)和(3)都是由审计客户提供的，但由于内部审计可以当作一个独立的第三方，所 以(3)的可靠性要高于(1) 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D1 assertions and audit evidence 难易程度：易

stem_zh: Question 3 Which TWO of the following actions should Willow &Co take following Ash Co's refusal to allow Willow &Co to seek a bank confirmation from Moneytree bank? A.The risk of material misstatement including fraud risk needs to be re-evaluated B.The audit plan must be revised and alternative procedures considered C.Amodified opinion must be issued on the grounds that insufficient evidence is available D.Send the bank confirmation request without authorisation as the bank communicates directly with the auditor GOLDEN EDUCATION 答案：A&B
explanation_zh: 根据题干信息，Ash Co 限制了Willow&Co 收集审计证据的能力。因此，审计 师需要重新评估审计风险，同时也应该适当修订审计计划，并确定是否可以通 过其他方式获得充分适当的证据。选项C 不正确，虽然最终结果可能是给出 modified opinion, 但可能会有进一步的程序，因此不宜得出此结论。选项D 不正确，因为 未经Ash Co.许可，银行不会回应该请求。 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items-bank confirmation 难易程度：易

stem_zh: Question 4 You have been given the following bank reconciliation prepared by Ash Co: The following issues have been identified during the testing of the bank reconciliation: (1)Cheques totalling $300,000 which were not posted until 2 June 20X5 are included in the cash book at the year end (2)Customer payments totalling $700,000 which were paid into the bank on 3 June 20X5 are included in the cash book at the year end (3)Bank charges for May 20X5 totalling $100,000 were not charged by the bank until June 20X5 What is the resultant effect on the bank and cash balance as a result of these issues? A.Bank and cash is overstated by $400,000 B.Bank and cash is understated by $300,000 C.Bank and cash is overstated by $500,000 D.Bank and cash is understated by $400,000 答案：A
explanation_zh: 这个问题考察了银行对账审计的相关问题。在本题中，在编制现金账簿时发现了两个问题。 第一个，截至20X5 年6月2日才入账的30万美元的支票已包含在年终现金账簿中。 第二个，20X5 年6月3日支付给银行的客户付款总额为70万美元，包括在年终现金簿中。 这样导致的结构就是多报了40万美元。 第三个，20X5 年5月的银行手续费总计10万美元，直到20X5 年6月才由银行收取。因为 银行没有在6月之前收取银行费用，那么这些将在年末确认为预计项目，因此不会对年末银 行和现金余额产生影响。 知识点标签： Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items-cash and bank 难易程度：易 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION Which of the following procedures would address the audit engagement partner's concern in relation to the share issue? A.Inspect board minutes for evidence of review regarding the terms of and approval of the share issue B.Inspect Ash Co's constitution documents for evidence that the share issue is permitted C.Obtain a written representation from management to confirm that the share issue is in compliance with laws and regulations D.Agree the quantity and recipients ofthe share issue to Ash Co's share register 答案：B 解析： 这道题考察的是股票发行的有关审计程序。 选项B 检查 Ash Co的章程文件，以获取允许股票发行的证据。这个是适当的审计程序，因 为这是解决这一问题的唯一程序。 选项A 查阅董事会会议记录，以获取有关股票发行条款和批准的审查证据。虽然拿到了董 事会的批准，但还是不会确认该问题是否合法。选项C 获得管理层的书面陈述，以确认股 票发行符合法律法规。与其他选项一样不属于适当的证据。选项D 将提供有关股票发行的 记录，但不提供交易符合法律法规的证据。因此，选项B 是正确答案 知识点标签：Syllabus D audit evidence-D4 the audit of specific items-share capital,reserves and directors'emoluments 难易程度：中 March/June 2022 It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit manager at Doge &Co,a medium-sized firm with several offices.As part of your role,you are responsible for undertaking procedures relating to the acceptance of new clients.You are currently involved in the acceptance of four new clients. Bradgate Co Bradgate Co has invited Doge &Co to perform a limited assurance review of its financial statements.Doge &Co does not provide any other services to the company. Trimp Transport Co The board of directors of Trimp Transport Co have set target key performance indicators(KPIs)to assess the company's performance for the year ended 31 March 20X5.The board has asked Doge &Co to perform an assessment of performance to 31 March 20X5 and to prepare a report for the board as to whether the KPIs have been achieved.The board will provide access to books and records relating to the KPIs.Doge &Co does not provide any other services to Trimp Transport Co.
